# MedOne-AI<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />
  <title>MedOne AI — Dashboard</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/style.css">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/dark.css">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/responsive.css">
</head>
<body>
  <div id="app" class="app-layout">
    <aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
      <div class="brand">
        <div class="logo">M1</div>
        <h1>MedOne AI</h1>
      </div>
      <nav class="nav">
        <a href="index.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Dashboard</a>
        <a href="practice.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Practice</a>
        <a href="mock.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Mock Exams</a>
        <a href="review.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Review</a>
        <a href="analytics.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Analytics</a>
        <a href="settings.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Settings</a>
      </nav>
      <div class="sidebar-footer">
        <button id="collapse-btn" class="btn small">Toggle</button>
      </div>
    </aside>

    <div class="main">
      <header class="topbar">
        <div class="left">
          <button id="burger" class="burger" aria-label="Toggle menu">&#9776;</button>
          <div class="page-title">Dashboard</div>
        </div>
        <div class="right">
          <div class="search">
            <input id="global-search" placeholder="Search cases, topics..." />
          </div>
          <button id="theme-toggle" class="icon-btn" title="Toggle dark mode">🌓</button>
          <a href="settings.html" class="icon-btn" title="Settings">⚙️</a>
        </div>
      </header>

      <main class="content" id="content">
        <section class="overview cards">
          <article class="card">
            <h3>Today's practice</h3>
            <p>2 completed, 3 pending</p>
            <a href="practice.html" class="btn">Go</a>
          </article>

          <article class="card">
            <h3>Mock Exam</h3>
            <p>Next exam in 7 days</p>
            <a href="mock.html" class="btn">Open</a>
          </article>

          <article class="card">
            <h3>Review</h3>
            <p>12 flagged items</p>
            <a href="review.html" class="btn">Review</a>
          </article>

          <article class="card">
            <h3>Analytics</h3>
            <p>Accuracy: 78%</p>
            <a href="analytics.html" class="btn">View</a>
          </article>
        </section>

        <section class="recent">
          <h2>Recent Activity</h2>
          <ul id="recent-list" class="list">
            <li>Completed practice: Cardiology case 4</li>
            <li>Flagged: Respiratory — abnormal CXR</li>
            <li>Took mock: Weekday mock 2</li>
          </ul>
        </section>
      </main>

      <footer class="footer">
        <small>MedOne AI — offline demo • Theme by Medical Blue</small>
      </footer>
    </div>
  </div>

  <script type="module" src="js/app.js"></script>
  <script type="module" src="js/router.js"></script>
  <script type="module" src="js/utils.js"></script>
</body>
</html><!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />
  <title>MedOne AI — Practice</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/style.css">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/dark.css">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/responsive.css">
</head>
<body>
  <div id="app" class="app-layout">
    <aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
      <div class="brand">
        <div class="logo">M1</div>
        <h1>MedOne AI</h1>
      </div>
      <nav class="nav">
        <a href="index.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Dashboard</a>
        <a href="practice.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Practice</a>
        <a href="mock.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Mock Exams</a>
        <a href="review.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Review</a>
        <a href="analytics.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Analytics</a>
        <a href="settings.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Settings</a>
      </nav>
      <div class="sidebar-footer">
        <button id="collapse-btn-2" class="btn small">Toggle</button>
      </div>
    </aside>

    <div class="main">
      <header class="topbar">
        <div class="left">
          <button id="burger-2" class="burger" aria-label="Toggle menu">&#9776;</button>
          <div class="page-title">Practice</div>
        </div>
        <div class="right">
          <div class="search">
            <input id="practice-search" placeholder="Search practice cases..." />
          </div>
          <button id="theme-toggle-2" class="icon-btn" title="Toggle dark mode">🌓</button>
          <a href="settings.html" class="icon-btn" title="Settings">⚙️</a>
        </div>
      </header>

      <main class="content" id="practice-content">
        <section class="controls">
          <label>
            Topic
            <select id="topic-select">
              <option>Cardiology</option>
              <option>Respiratory</option>
              <option>Endocrinology</option>
            </select>
          </label>
          <label>
            Difficulty
            <select id="difficulty-select">
              <option>Easy</option>
              <option>Medium</option>
              <option>Hard</option>
            </select>
          </label>
          <button id="start-practice" class="btn primary">Start Practice</button>
        </section>

        <section id="case-area" class="case-area">
          <h2>Start a practice session</h2>
          <p>Select topic and difficulty then press Start Practice.</p>
        </section>
      </main>

      <footer class="footer">
        <small>MedOne AI — Practice</small>
      </footer>
    </div>
  </div>

  <script type="module" src="js/app.js"></script>
  <script type="module" src="js/practice.js"></script>
  <script type="module" src="js/router.js"></script>
</body>

<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />

</head>
<body>
  <div id="app" class="app-layout">
    <aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
      <div class="brand">
        <div class="logo">M1</div>
        <h1>MedOne AI</h1>
      </div>
      <nav class="nav">
        <a href="index.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Dashboard</a>
        <a href="practice.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Practice</a>
        <a href="mock.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Mock Exams</a>
        <a href="review.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Review</a>
        <a href="analytics.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Analytics</a>
        <a href="settings.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Settings</a>
      </nav>
      <div class="sidebar-footer">

      </div>

      <header class="topbar">

</html><!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />
  <title>MedOne AI — Settings</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/style.css">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/dark.css">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/responsive.css">
</head>
<body>
  <div id="app" class="app-layout">
    <aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
      <div class="brand">
        <div class="logo">M1</div>
        <h1>MedOne AI</h1>
      </div>
      <nav class="nav">
        <a href="index.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Dashboard</a>
        <a href="practice.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Practice</a>
        <a href="mock.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Mock Exams</a>
        <a href="review.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Review</a>
        <a href="analytics.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Analytics</a>
        <a href="settings.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Settings</a>
      </nav>
      <div class="sidebar-footer">
        <button id="collapse-btn-6" class="btn small">Toggle</button>
      </div>
    </aside>

    <div class="main">
      <header class="topbar">
        <div class="left">
          <button id="burger-6" class="burger" aria-label="Toggle menu">&#9776;</button>
          <div class="page-title">Settings</div>
        </div>
        <div class="right">
          <div class="search"></div>
          <button id="theme-toggle-6" class="icon-btn" title="Toggle dark mode">🌓</button>
          <a href="settings.html" class="icon-btn" title="Settings">⚙️</a>
        </div>
      </header>

      <main class="content" id="settings-content">
        <section>
          <h2>Appearance</h2>
          <label class="switch">
            <input id="toggle-dark" type="checkbox">
            <span class="slider"></span>
            Dark Mode
          </label>

          <h2>Preferences</h2>
          <label>
            Default Topic
            <select id="default-topic">
              <option>Cardiology</option>
              <option>Respiratory</option>
              <option>Endocrinology</option>
            </select>
          </label>

          <h2>Storage</h2>
          <p>This is an offline app — data is stored locally in your browser (localStorage).</p>
          <button id="reset-settings" class="btn">Reset settings</button>
        </section>
      </main>

      <footer class="footer">
        <small>MedOne AI — Settings</small>
      </footer>
    </div>
  </div>

  <script type="module" src="js/app.js"></script>
  <script type="module" src="js/storage.js"></script>
  <script type="module" src="js/router.js"></script>
  <script type="module" src="js/utils.js"></script>
  <script type="module">
    import Storage from './js/storage.js';
    // page-specific settings wiring
    const darkToggle = document.getElementById('toggle-dark');
    const defaultSelect = document.getElementById('default-topic');
    const resetBtn = document.getElementById('reset-settings');

    darkToggle.checked = Storage.get('darkMode') === true;
    defaultSelect.value = Storage.get('defaultTopic') || defaultSelect.value;

    darkToggle.addEventListener('change', e => {
      Storage.set('darkMode', e.target.checked);
      document.documentElement.classList.toggle('dark', e.target.checked);
    });

    defaultSelect.addEventListener('change', e => {
      Storage.set('defaultTopic', e.target.value);
    });

    resetBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      if (confirm('Reset settings to defaults?')) {
        Storage.reset();
        location.reload();
      }
    });
  </script>
</body>
</html>:root{
  --bg: #f6fbff;
  --surface: #ffffff;
  --muted: #6b7684;
  --text: #0b2540;
  --accent: #0b63b7; /* medical blue */
  --accent-600: #065a9f;
  --success: #0e9f6e;
  --danger: #d9534f;
  --shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(11,38,64,0.08);
  --radius: 10px;
  --max-width: 1200px;
  font-family: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial;
  -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  -moz-osx-font-smoothing:grayscale;
}

*{box-sizing:border-box}
html,body,#app{height:100%}
body{
  margin:0;
  background:var(--bg);
  color:var(--text);
  line-height:1.4;
  -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
}

/* Layout */
.app-layout{display:flex;min-height:100vh}
.sidebar{
  width:260px;
  background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(11,99,183,0.06), transparent);
  border-right:1px solid rgba(11,99,183,0.06);
  padding:18px;
  display:flex;
  flex-direction:column;
  gap:16px;
}
.brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}
.brand .logo{
  width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:8px;background:var(--accent);color:#fff;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;
  box-shadow:var(--shadow);
}
.brand h1{font-size:18px;margin:0;color:var(--accent-600)}
.nav{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;margin-top:6px}
.nav-link{
  display:block;padding:10px 12px;border-radius:8px;color:var(--text);text-decoration:none;font-weight:600;
}
.nav-link:hover{background:rgba(11,99,183,0.06);color:var(--accent-600)}
.nav-link.active{background:var(--accent);color:white;box-shadow:var(--shadow)}

.sidebar-footer{margin-top:auto}

.main{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;min-height:100vh}
.topbar{
  display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:12px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(11,99,183,0.04);background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.6), transparent);
}
.topbar .left{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}
.page-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent-600)}
.burger{display:none;background:transparent;border:0;font-size:20px}
.search input{padding:8px 10px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid rgba(11,99,183,0.08);min-width:180px}

.icon-btn{border:0;background:transparent;font-size:18px;margin-left:8px;cursor:pointer}
.content{padding:20px;max-width:var(--max-width);margin:0 auto;flex:1}
.footer{text-align:center;padding:12px;border-top:1px solid rgba(11,99,183,0.04);background:transparent}

/* Cards and components */
.cards{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:16px;margin-bottom:22px}
.card{background:var(--surface);padding:18px;border-radius:10px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);border:1px solid rgba(11,99,183,0.03)}
.card h3{margin:0 0 8px 0}
.btn{padding:8px 12px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid rgba(11,99,183,0.12);background:transparent;color:var(--accent-600);cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;display:inline-block}
.btn.primary{background:var(--accent);color:white;border:0}
.btn.small{padding:6px 8px;font-size:13px}

/* Lists, grids */
.list{list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0}
.list li{padding:10px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(11,99,183,0.03)}
.grid{display:flex;gap:16px}
.metric{background:var(--surface);padding:12px;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);flex:1;text-align:center}

/* Switch */
.switch{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;cursor:pointer}
.switch input{display:none}
.switch .slider{width:46px;height:26px;background:rgba(11,99,183,0.08);border-radius:999px;position:relative;transition:all .2s}
.switch .slider::after{content:'';position:absolute;left:3px;top:3px;width:20px;height:20px;background:white;border-radius:50%;box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);transition:all .2s}

/* when checked we'll use JS to apply .dark class on html to flip the appearance */
html.dark {
  --bg: #071423;
  --surface: #071a2a;
  --muted: #9fb6d0;
  --text: #eaf6ff;
  --accent: #1e9bff;
  --accent-600: #0b63b7;
  --shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
}

/* small responsive improvements */
@media (max-width: 1000px){
  .cards{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
}
@media (max-width: 720px){
  .sidebar{position:fixed;left:-320px;top:0;bottom:0;z-index:40;transition:left .25s}
  .sidebar.open{left:0}
  .burger{display:inline-block}
  .cards{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .search input{min-width:120px}
  .app-layout{overflow-x:hidden}
  .topbar{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:10}
}/* This file is intentionally small; primary dark rules live in :root above and html.dark toggles them */
html.dark .nav-link:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04)}
html.dark .nav-link{color:var(--muted)}
html.dark .nav-link.active{background:var(--accent);color:white}
html.dark .search input{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.02);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);color:var(--text)}/* Additional responsive tweaks */
@media (max-width: 720px){
  .sidebar{width:260px}
  .main{padding-left:0}
  .topbar .page-title{font-size:16px}
  .brand h1{display:none}
  .brand .logo{width:40px;height:40px}
  .sidebar-footer{display:flex;justify-content:center}
}// Simple localStorage wrapper for settings persistence
const Storage = (() => {
  const KEY = 'medoneai_settings_v1';
  const defaults = {
    darkMode: false,
    defaultTopic: 'Cardiology'
  };

  function _read(){
    try{
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(KEY);
      return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : {...defaults};
    }catch(e){
      console.warn('Storage read failed', e);
      return {...defaults};
    }
  }

  function _write(obj){
    try{
      localStorage.setItem(KEY, JSON.stringify(obj));
    }catch(e){
      console.warn('Storage write failed', e);
    }
  }

  return {
    get(key){
      const state = _read();
      return key ? state[key] : state;
    },
    set(key, value){
      const state = _read();
      state[key] = value;
      _write(state);
    },
    reset(){
      _write({...defaults});
    },
    clear(){
      localStorage.removeItem(KEY);
    }
  };
})();

export default Storage;// Minimal router/utility to mark active navigation links and support simple in-page anchors
export function highlightActiveLinks() {
  const links = document.querySelectorAll('.nav-link');
  links.forEach(a => {
    // Compare filename portion
    try {
      const href = new URL(a.href, location.href);
      const current = location.pathname.split('/').pop() || 'index.html';
      const target = href.pathname.split('/').pop() || 'index.html';
      a.classList.toggle('active', current === target);
    } catch(e){
      // fallback: simple check
      const current = location.href;
      a.classList.toggle('active', current.indexOf(a.getAttribute('href')) !== -1);
    }
  });
}

// highlight on load
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', highlightActiveLinks);export function el(selector, ctx=document){
  return ctx.querySelector(selector);
}
export function els(selector, ctx=document){
  return Array.from(ctx.querySelectorAll(selector));
}

export function safeText(text){
  const div = document.createElement('div');
  div.textContent = text;
  return div.innerHTML;
}

export function formatPercent(n){
  return `${Math.round(n)}%`;
}import Storage from './storage.js';
import { highlightActiveLinks } from './router.js';

// Generic app init: sidebar toggle, theme toggle, mobile support
function initUI(){
  const root = document.documentElement;
  const sidebar = document.getElementById('sidebar');
  const burgerSelectors = ['#burger','#burger-2','#burger-3','#burger-4','#burger-5','#burger-6'];
  const collapseBtns = document.querySelectorAll('[id^="collapse-btn"]');
  const themeButtons = document.querySelectorAll('[id^="theme-toggle"]');

  // Apply persisted theme
  const dark = Storage.get('darkMode') === true;
  root.classList.toggle('dark', dark);

  // burger toggles sidebar on mobile
  burgerSelectors.forEach(id => {
    const btn = document.querySelector(id);
    if(btn) btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      sidebar.classList.toggle('open');
    });
  });

  // collapse toggles a compact sidebar class
  collapseBtns.forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      sidebar.classList.toggle('collapsed');
    });
  });

  // theme toggles
  themeButtons.forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const isDark = !root.classList.toggle('dark');
      // note: toggle returns false when class removed. We want to persist final state
      const finalDark = root.classList.contains('dark');
      Storage.set('darkMode', finalDark);
    });
  });

  // close sidebar on content click for small screens
  document.addEventListener('click', (ev) => {
    if(window.innerWidth <= 720){
      if(!ev.target.closest('.sidebar') && !ev.target.closest('.burger')){
        sidebar.classList.remove('open');
      }
    }
  });

  // connect search inputs (demonstration)
  const globalSearch = document.getElementById('global-search');
  if(globalSearch){
    globalSearch.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => {
      const q = e.target.value.trim();
      // for now, filter recent list in dashboard
      const list = document.getElementById('recent-list');
      if(!list) return;
      Array.from(list.children).forEach(li => {
        li.style.display = q === '' ? '' : li.textContent.toLowerCase().includes(q.toLowerCase()) ? '' : 'none';
      });
    });
  }
}

// Initialize on DOM ready
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  initUI();
  // ensure nav highlights are applied
  highlightActiveLinks();
});import Storage from './storage.js';
import { el, els, safeText } from './utils.js';

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const area = document.getElementById('case-area');
  const startBtn = document.getElementById('start-practice');
  const topicSelect = document.getElementById('topic-select');
  const difficultySelect = document.getElementById('difficulty-select');

  // prefill from storage
  const defaultTopic = Storage.get('defaultTopic');
  if(defaultTopic && topicSelect) topicSelect.value = defaultTopic;

  startBtn && startBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const topic = topicSelect.value;
    const diff = difficultySelect.value;
    startPractice(topic, diff);
  });

  function startPractice(topic, difficulty){
    // create a simple mock case
    area.innerHTML = '';
    const card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'card';
    card.innerHTML = `<h3>${safeText(topic)} — ${safeText(difficulty)}</h3>
      <p><strong>Chief complaint:</strong> 56-year-old with chest pain.</p>
      <ol>
        <li>List differential diagnoses.</li>
        <li>Order two investigations.</li>
        <li>Propose initial management.</li>
      </ol>
      <div style="margin-top:12px;">
        <button id="done-case" class="btn primary">Mark complete</button>
        <button id="flag-case" class="btn">Flag</button>
      </div>`;
    area.appendChild(card);

    document.getElementById('done-case').addEventListener('click', () => {
      alert('Marked complete (demo).');
    });
    document.getElementById('flag-case').addEventListener('click', () => {
      alert('Flagged for review (demo).');
    });
  }
});document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  document.querySelectorAll('.btn.small').forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      const li = e.target.closest('li');
      alert('Starting mock (demo): ' + (li ? li.textContent.trim() : 'mock'));
    });
  });
});document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const list = document.getElementById('flagged-list');
  if(!list) return;
  list.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    const li = e.target.closest('li');
    if(!li) return;
    if(confirm('Mark this item as resolved?')){
      li.remove();
    }
  });
});import { formatPercent } from './utils.js';
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  // Example dynamic values (mocked)
  const acc = 78.3;
  const avgTime = 12; // minutes
  const improvement = 6.2;

  document.getElementById('accuracy').textContent = formatPercent(acc);
  document.getElementById('avg-time').textContent = `${avgTime}m`;
  document.getElementById('improvement').textContent = `+${improvement.toFixed(1)}%`;
});<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />
  <title>MedOne AI — Dashboard</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/style.css">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/dark.css">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/responsive.css">

  <!-- Small dashboard-specific styles -->
  <style>
    /* Placeholder chart sizing */
    .chart {
      width: 100%;
      height: 140px;
      display:flex;
      align-items:center;
      justify-content:center;
      background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(11,99,183,0.02), transparent);
      border-radius:8px;
      padding:8px;
    }
    .chart-svg { width:100%; height:100%; display:block; }
    .card .muted { color:var(--muted); font-size:13px }
    .progress-bar { width:100%; height:14px; background:rgba(11,99,183,0.06); border-radius:999px; overflow:hidden; }
    .progress-fill { height:100%; background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent),var(--accent-600)); width:0%; transition:width .4s; }
    .mini-list { max-height:120px; overflow:auto; padding:6px; }
    .metric-small { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; gap:8px; }
    .small-note { font-size:12px; color:var(--muted); }
    .card .controls { margin-top:10px; display:flex; gap:8px; align-items:center; flex-wrap:wrap; }
    .chip { background:rgba(11,99,183,0.06); padding:6px 8px;border-radius:999px;font-size:13px;color:var(--accent-600) }
    @media (max-width:1000px){
      .cards{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
    }
    @media (max-width:720px){
      .cards{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <div id="app" class="app-layout">
    <aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
      <div class="brand">
        <div class="logo">M1</div>
        <h1>MedOne AI</h1>
      </div>
      <nav class="nav">
        <a href="index.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Dashboard</a>
        <a href="practice.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Practice</a>
        <a href="mock.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Mock Exams</a>
        <a href="review.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Review</a>
        <a href="analytics.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Analytics</a>
        <a href="settings.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Settings</a>
      </nav>
      <div class="sidebar-footer">
        <button id="collapse-btn" class="btn small">Toggle</button>
      </div>
    </aside>

    <div class="main">
      <header class="topbar">
        <div class="left">
          <button id="burger" class="burger" aria-label="Toggle menu">&#9776;</button>
          <div class="page-title">Dashboard</div>
        </div>
        <div class="right">
          <div class="search">
            <input id="global-search" placeholder="Search cases, topics..." />
          </div>
          <button id="theme-toggle" class="icon-btn" title="Toggle dark mode">🌓</button>
          <a href="settings.html" class="icon-btn" title="Settings">⚙️</a>
        </div>
      </header>

      <main class="content" id="content">
        <section class="overview cards" aria-label="Dashboard cards">
          <!-- Row 1 -->
          <article class="card" id="card-continue">
            <h3>Continue Practice</h3>
            <p class="muted" id="continue-desc">No active session</p>
            <div class="controls">
              <a id="continue-btn" class="btn primary" href="practice.html">Resume</a>
              <span class="chip" id="continue-progress-chip">0%</span>
            </div>
          </article>

          <article class="card" id="card-reco">
            <h3>Today's Recommendation</h3>
            <p class="muted" id="reco-desc">Loading...</p>
            <div class="controls">
              <a id="reco-start" class="btn">Start</a>
              <button id="reco-refresh" class="btn small">Refresh</button>
            </div>
          </article>

          <article class="card" id="card-bookmarks">
            <h3>Bookmarks</h3>
            <div class="mini-list" id="bookmarks-list">No bookmarks</div>
            <div class="controls">
              <button id="add-bookmark" class="btn small">Add demo</button>
              <button id="clear-bookmarks" class="btn small">Clear</button>
            </div>
          </article>

          <article class="card" id="card-wrong">
            <h3>Wrong Questions</h3>
            <div class="mini-list" id="wrong-list">No wrong questions</div>
            <div class="controls">
              <a href="review.html" class="btn small">Go to Review</a>
            </div>
          </article>

          <!-- Row 2 -->
          <article class="card" id="card-scores">
            <h3>Recent Scores</h3>
            <div class="chart" aria-hidden="false">
              <svg id="scores-chart" class="chart-svg" viewBox="0 0 300 100" preserveAspectRatio="none"></svg>
            </div>
            <div class="controls">
              <button id="add-score" class="btn small">Add random score</button>
              <button id="clear-scores" class="btn small">Clear</button>
            </div>
          </article>

          <article class="card" id="card-weak">
            <h3>Weak Subjects</h3>
            <div id="weak-list" class="mini-list">No weak subjects</div>
          </article>

          <article class="card" id="card-accuracy">
            <h3>Subject Accuracy</h3>
            <div class="chart">
              <svg id="accuracy-donut" class="chart-svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"></svg>
            </div>
            <p class="small-note">Overall accuracy shown on donut</p>
          </article>

          <article class="card" id="card-goal">
            <h3>Daily Goal</h3>
            <p class="muted">Set your goal (minutes)</p>
            <div class="controls">
              <input id="daily-goal-input" type="number" min="0" style="padding:6px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid rgba(11,99,183,0.08);width:80px" />
              <button id="save-goal" class="btn small">Save</button>
              <button id="reset-data" class="btn small">Reset demo data</button>
            </div>
            <p class="small-note" id="goal-saved-msg" style="display:none;margin-top:8px">Saved</p>
          </article>

          <article class="card" id="card-progress">
            <h3>Today's Progress</h3>
            <p class="muted" id="progress-desc">0 / 0 minutes</p>
            <div class="progress-bar" aria-hidden="false">
              <div id="progress-fill" class="progress-fill" style="width:0%"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="controls">
              <button id="log-5" class="btn small">+5m</button>
              <button id="log-15" class="btn small">+15m</button>
              <button id="clear-progress" class="btn small">Clear</button>
            </div>
          </article>
        </section>

        <section class="recent">
          <h2>Recent Activity</h2>
          <ul id="recent-list" class="list">
            <!-- populated by dashboard.js -->
          </ul>
        </section>
      </main>

      <footer class="footer">
        <small>MedOne AI — offline demo • Theme by Medical Blue</small>
      </footer>
    </div>
  </div>

  <script type="module" src="js/app.js"></script>
  <script type="module" src="js/router.js"></script>
  <script type="module" src="js/utils.js"></script>
  <script type="module" src="js/dashboard.js"></script>
</body>
</html>// Simple localStorage wrapper for settings persistence and simple data storage
const Storage = (() => {
  const SETTINGS_KEY = 'medoneai_settings_v1';
  const DATA_KEY = 'medoneai_data_v1';

  const defaults = {
    darkMode: false,
    defaultTopic: 'Cardiology'
  };

  const dataDefaults = {
    dashboard: {
      continuePractice: null, // { id, title, progressPercent, lastSeen }
      recommendations: [],    // array of strings
      bookmarks: [],          // array of {id,title}
      wrongQuestions: [],     // array of {id,title}
      recentScores: [],       // array of {date,score}
      weakSubjects: [],       // array of strings
      subjectAccuracy: {},    // {subject: percent}
      dailyGoalMinutes: 30,
      todaysProgressMinutes: 0,
      recentActivity: []      // array of strings
    }
  };

  function _readSettings(){
    try{
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(SETTINGS_KEY);
      return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : {...defaults};
    }catch(e){
      console.warn('Storage read failed', e);
      return {...defaults};
    }
  }

  function _writeSettings(obj){
    try{
      localStorage.setItem(SETTINGS_KEY, JSON.stringify(obj));
    }catch(e){
      console.warn('Storage write failed', e);
    }
  }

  function _readData(){
    try{
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(DATA_KEY);
      return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(dataDefaults));
    }catch(e){
      console.warn('Data read failed', e);
      return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(dataDefaults));
    }
  }

  function _writeData(obj){
    try{
      localStorage.setItem(DATA_KEY, JSON.stringify(obj));
    }catch(e){
      console.warn('Data write failed', e);
    }
  }

  return {
    // Settings API (backward compatible)
    get(key){
      const state = _readSettings();
      return key ? state[key] : state;
    },
    set(key, value){
      const state = _readSettings();
      state[key] = value;
      _writeSettings(state);
    },
    reset(){
      _writeSettings({...defaults});
    },
    clear(){
      localStorage.removeItem(SETTINGS_KEY);
    },

    // Data API (dashboard, user content, etc.)
    dataGet(path, fallback){
      const data = _readData();
      if(!path) return data;
      const parts = path.split('.');
      let cur = data;
      for(const p of parts){
        if(cur[p] === undefined) return fallback !== undefined ? fallback : null;
        cur = cur[p];
      }
      return cur;
    },
    dataSet(path, value){
      const data = _readData();
      const parts = path.split('.');
      let cur = data;
      for(let i=0;i<parts.length-1;i++){
        const p = parts[i];
        if(cur[p] === undefined) cur[p] = {};
        cur = cur[p];
      }
      cur[parts[parts.length-1]] = value;
      _writeData(data);
    },
    dataPush(path, item){
      const arr = this.dataGet(path, []);
      if(!Array.isArray(arr)) throw new Error('Target is not array');
      arr.push(item);
      this.dataSet(path, arr);
    },
    dataRemove(path, predicate){
      const arr = this.dataGet(path, []);
      if(!Array.isArray(arr)) return;
      const filtered = arr.filter((it) => !predicate(it));
      this.dataSet(path, filtered);
    },
    dataReset(){
      _writeData(JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(dataDefaults)));
    }
  };
})();

export default Storage;// Simple localStorage wrapper for settings persistence and simple data storage
const Storage = (() => {
  const SETTINGS_KEY = 'medoneai_settings_v1';
  const DATA_KEY = 'medoneai_data_v1';

  const defaults = {
    darkMode: false,
    defaultTopic: 'Cardiology'
  };

  const dataDefaults = {
    dashboard: {
      continuePractice: null, // { id, title, progressPercent, lastSeen }
      recommendations: [],    // array of strings
      bookmarks: [],          // array of {id,title}
      wrongQuestions: [],     // array of {id,title}
      recentScores: [],       // array of {date,score}
      weakSubjects: [],       // array of strings
      subjectAccuracy: {},    // {subject: percent}
      dailyGoalMinutes: 30,
      todaysProgressMinutes: 0,
      recentActivity: []      // array of strings
    }
  };

  function _readSettings(){
    try{
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(SETTINGS_KEY);
      return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : {...defaults};
    }catch(e){
      console.warn('Storage read failed', e);
      return {...defaults};
    }
  }

  function _writeSettings(obj){
    try{
      localStorage.setItem(SETTINGS_KEY, JSON.stringify(obj));
    }catch(e){
      console.warn('Storage write failed', e);
    }
  }

  function _readData(){
    try{
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(DATA_KEY);
      return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(dataDefaults));
    }catch(e){
      console.warn('Data read failed', e);
      return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(dataDefaults));
    }
  }

  function _writeData(obj){
    try{
      localStorage.setItem(DATA_KEY, JSON.stringify(obj));
    }catch(e){
      console.warn('Data write failed', e);
    }
  }

  return {
    // Settings API (backward compatible)
    get(key){
      const state = _readSettings();
      return key ? state[key] : state;
    },
    set(key, value){
      const state = _readSettings();
      state[key] = value;
      _writeSettings(state);
    },
    reset(){
      _writeSettings({...defaults});
    },
    clear(){
      localStorage.removeItem(SETTINGS_KEY);
    },

    // Data API (dashboard, user content, etc.)
    dataGet(path, fallback){
      const data = _readData();
      if(!path) return data;
      const parts = path.split('.');
      let cur = data;
      for(const p of parts){
        if(cur[p] === undefined) return fallback !== undefined ? fallback : null;
        cur = cur[p];
      }
      return cur;
    },
    dataSet(path, value){
      const data = _readData();
      const parts = path.split('.');
      let cur = data;
      for(let i=0;i<parts.length-1;i++){
        const p = parts[i];
        if(cur[p] === undefined) cur[p] = {};
        cur = cur[p];
      }
      cur[parts[parts.length-1]] = value;
      _writeData(data);
    },
    dataPush(path, item){
      const arr = this.dataGet(path, []);
      if(!Array.isArray(arr)) throw new Error('Target is not array');
      arr.push(item);
      this.dataSet(path, arr);
    },
    dataRemove(path, predicate){
      const arr = this.dataGet(path, []);
      if(!Array.isArray(arr)) return;
      const filtered = arr.filter((it) => !predicate(it));
      this.dataSet(path, filtered);
    },
    dataReset(){
      _writeData(JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(dataDefaults)));
    }
  };
})();

export default Storage;import Storage from './storage.js';
import { el, els, safeText, formatPercent } from './utils.js';

// Small helpers for SVG charts
function drawBarChart(svgEl, values = []) {
  // values: array of numbers 0-100
  const w = 300, h = 100, padding = 8;
  const barCount = values.length || 6;
  const barW = (w - padding*2) / Math.max(barCount, values.length) - 4;
  svgEl.setAttribute('viewBox', `0 0 ${w} ${h}`);
  svgEl.innerHTML = '';
  const max = Math.max(...values, 100);
  values.forEach((v, i) => {
    const bx = padding + i * (barW + 4);
    const bh = (v / max) * (h - padding*2);
    const y = h - padding - bh;
    const rect = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','rect');
    rect.setAttribute('x', bx);
    rect.setAttribute('y', y);
    rect.setAttribute('width', barW);
    rect.setAttribute('height', bh);
    rect.setAttribute('rx', 3);
    rect.setAttribute('fill', 'url(#g)');
    svgEl.appendChild(rect);
  });
  // gradient defs
  const defs = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','defs');
  defs.innerHTML = `
    <linearGradient id="g" x1="0" x2="1" y1="0" y2="0">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#0b63b7"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#065a9f"/>
    </linearGradient>`;
  svgEl.prepend(defs);
}

function drawDonut(svgEl, percent = 75) {
  // draw simple donut centered in 100x100
  const size = 100;
  const cx = 50, cy = 50, r = 36;
  svgEl.setAttribute('viewBox', `0 0 ${size} ${size}`);
  svgEl.innerHTML = '';

  const bg = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','circle');
  bg.setAttribute('cx', cx);
  bg.setAttribute('cy', cy);
  bg.setAttribute('r', r);
  bg.setAttribute('fill', 'none');
  bg.setAttribute('stroke', 'rgba(11,99,183,0.08)');
  bg.setAttribute('stroke-width', '12');
  svgEl.appendChild(bg);

  const circ = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','circle');
  circ.setAttribute('cx', cx);
  circ.setAttribute('cy', cy);
  circ.setAttribute('r', r);
  circ.setAttribute('fill', 'none');
  circ.setAttribute('stroke', 'url(#gd)');
  circ.setAttribute('stroke-width', '12');
  circ.setAttribute('stroke-linecap', 'round');
  const circumference = 2 * Math.PI * r;
  const offset = circumference * (1 - (percent / 100));
  circ.setAttribute('stroke-dasharray', `${circumference}`);
  circ.setAttribute('stroke-dashoffset', `${offset}`);
  circ.setAttribute('transform', `rotate(-90 ${cx} ${cy})`);
  svgEl.appendChild(circ);

  const defs = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','defs');
  defs.innerHTML = `
    <linearGradient id="gd" x1="0" x2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#1e9bff"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0b63b7"/>
    </linearGradient>`;
  svgEl.prepend(defs);

  const text = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','text');
  text.setAttribute('x', cx);
  text.setAttribute('y', cy+4);
  text.setAttribute('text-anchor', 'middle');
  text.setAttribute('font-size', '14');
  text.setAttribute('fill', getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--text') || '#0b2540');
  text.textContent = `${Math.round(percent)}%`;
  svgEl.appendChild(text);
}

// Manage dashboard state and rendering
const Dashboard = (() => {
  function seedIfEmpty() {
    const d = Storage.dataGet('dashboard');
    // if dashboard is null/undefined or has no recentScores, consider seeding
    if(!d || !Array.isArray(d.recentScores) || d.recentScores.length === 0) {
      const now = new Date();
      const sample = {
        continuePractice: { id: 'case-004', title: 'Cardiology case 4', progressPercent: 40, lastSeen: now.toISOString() },
        recommendations: ['Respiratory focused review (30m)', 'ECG practice set'],
        bookmarks: [{id:'b1', title:'CXR consolidation guide'}, {id:'b2', title:'Acute coronary syndrome notes'}],
        wrongQuestions: [{id:'w1', title:'ECG interpretation Q12'}, {id:'w2', title:'Endocrine pathway Q3'}],
        recentScores: [
          {date: daysAgo(6), score: 65},
          {date: daysAgo(5), score: 72},
          {date: daysAgo(4), score: 78},
          {date: daysAgo(3), score: 82},
          {date: daysAgo(2), score: 75},
          {date: daysAgo(1), score: 85},
        ],
        weakSubjects: ['Endocrinology', 'Respiratory'],
        subjectAccuracy: {Cardiology:80, Respiratory:58, Endocrinology:45},
        dailyGoalMinutes: 30,
        todaysProgressMinutes: 12,
        recentActivity: ['Completed practice: Cardiology case 4', 'Flagged: Respiratory — abnormal CXR']
      };
      Storage.dataSet('dashboard', sample);
    }
  }

  function daysAgo(n){
    const d = new Date();
    d.setDate(d.getDate() - n);
    return d.toISOString().split('T')[0];
  }

  function renderContinue() {
    const c = Storage.dataGet('dashboard.continuePractice');
    const desc = el('#continue-desc');
    const chip = el('#continue-progress-chip');
    const btn = el('#continue-btn');
    if(!c){
      desc.textContent = 'No active session';
      chip.textContent = '0%';
      btn.classList.remove('primary');
      btn.href = 'practice.html';
    } else {
      desc.textContent = `${c.title} • ${c.progressPercent}%`;
      chip.textContent = `${c.progressPercent}%`;
      btn.classList.add('primary');
      btn.href = 'practice.html';
    }
  }

  function renderRecommendations() {
    const recs = Storage.dataGet('dashboard.recommendations', []);
    const desc = el('#reco-desc');
    desc.textContent = recs.length ? recs[0] : 'No recommendations';
  }

  function renderBookmarks() {
    const list = el('#bookmarks-list');
    const items = Storage.dataGet('dashboard.bookmarks', []);
    if(items.length === 0){
      list.textContent = 'No bookmarks';
      return;
    }
    list.innerHTML = '';
    items.slice(0,8).forEach(it => {
      const d = document.createElement('div');
      d.style.padding = '6px 0';
      d.innerHTML = `<strong>${safeText(it.title)}</strong>`;
      list.appendChild(d);
    });
  }

  function renderWrong() {
    const list = el('#wrong-list');
    const items = Storage.dataGet('dashboard.wrongQuestions', []);
    if(items.length === 0){
      list.textContent = 'No wrong questions';
      return;
    }
    list.innerHTML = '';
    items.slice(0,8).forEach(it => {
      const d = document.createElement('div');
      d.style.padding = '6px 0';
      d.textContent = it.title;
      list.appendChild(d);
    });
  }

  function renderScores() {
    const svg = el('#scores-chart');
    const scores = Storage.dataGet('dashboard.recentScores', []).map(s => s.score);
    const padded = scores.length ? scores : [60,70,75,80,65,78];
    drawBarChart(svg, padded);
  }

  function renderWeakSubjects() {
    const list = el('#weak-list');
    const items = Storage.dataGet('dashboard.weakSubjects', []);
    if(items.length === 0){
      list.textContent = 'No weak subjects';
      return;
    }
    list.innerHTML = '';
    items.forEach(s => {
      const d = document.createElement('div');
      d.style.padding = '6px 0';
      d.innerHTML = `<span style="font-weight:700">${safeText(s)}</span>`;
      list.appendChild(d);
    });
  }

  function renderAccuracy() {
    const obj = Storage.dataGet('dashboard.subjectAccuracy', {});
    // compute average
    const vals = Object.values(obj);
    const avg = vals.length ? vals.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/vals.length : 0;
    const svg = el('#accuracy-donut');
    drawDonut(svg, avg);
  }

  function renderGoal() {
    const input = el('#daily-goal-input');
    const goal = Storage.dataGet('dashboard.dailyGoalMinutes', 30);
    input.value = goal;
    // show saved message hide
    const msg = el('#goal-saved-msg');
    if(msg) msg.style.display = 'none';
  }

  function renderProgress() {
    const prog = Storage.dataGet('dashboard.todaysProgressMinutes', 0);
    const goal = Storage.dataGet('dashboard.dailyGoalMinutes', 30);
    const desc = el('#progress-desc');
    const fill = el('#progress-fill');
    desc.textContent = `${prog} / ${goal} minutes`;
    const pct = goal > 0 ? Math.min(100, Math.round((prog/goal)*100)) : 0;
    if(fill) fill.style.width = `${pct}%`;
  }

  function renderRecentActivity() {
    const list = el('#recent-list');
    const items = Storage.dataGet('dashboard.recentActivity', []);
    list.innerHTML = '';
    if(items.length === 0){
      list.innerHTML = '<li>No activity yet</li>';
      return;
    }
    items.slice().reverse().forEach(it => {
      const li = document.createElement('li');
      li.textContent = it;
      list.appendChild(li);
    });
  }

  // Actions
  function hookActions() {
    el('#reco-refresh').addEventListener('click', () => {
      // simple rotate recommendations
      const recs = Storage.dataGet('dashboard.recommendations', []);
      if(recs.length > 1) {
        recs.push(recs.shift());
        Storage.dataSet('dashboard.recommendations', recs);
      }
      renderRecommendations();
    });

    el('#add-bookmark').addEventListener('click', () => {
      const demo = { id: 'b' + Date.now(), title: 'Demo bookmark ' + new Date().toLocaleTimeString() };
      Storage.dataPush('dashboard.bookmarks', demo);
      Storage.dataPush('dashboard.recentActivity', `Added bookmark: ${demo.title}`);
      renderBookmarks();
      renderRecentActivity();
    });

    el('#clear-bookmarks').addEventListener('click', () => {
      if(confirm('Clear all bookmarks?')) {
        Storage.dataSet('dashboard.bookmarks', []);
        Storage.dataPush('dashboard.recentActivity', 'Cleared bookmarks');
        renderBookmarks();
        renderRecentActivity();
      }
    });

    el('#add-score').addEventListener('click', () => {
      const score = 50 + Math.round(Math.random()*50);
      Storage.dataPush('dashboard.recentScores', { date: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], score });
      Storage.dataPush('dashboard.recentActivity', `Added score ${score}%`);
      renderScores();
      renderRecentActivity();
    });

    el('#clear-scores').addEventListener('click', () => {
      if(confirm('Clear recent scores?')) {
        Storage.dataSet('dashboard.recentScores', []);
        Storage.dataPush('dashboard.recentActivity', 'Cleared recent scores');
        renderScores();
        renderRecentActivity();
      }
    });

    el('#save-goal').addEventListener('click', () => {
      const v = parseInt(el('#daily-goal-input').value, 10) || 0;
      Storage.dataSet('dashboard.dailyGoalMinutes', v);
      Storage.dataPush('dashboard.recentActivity', `Set daily goal to ${v}m`);
      const msg = el('#goal-saved-msg');
      if(msg) { msg.style.display = 'block'; setTimeout(()=> msg.style.display='none', 1500); }
      renderProgress();
      renderRecentActivity();
    });

    el('#reset-data').addEventListener('click', () => {
      if(confirm('Reset demo dashboard data to defaults?')) {
        Storage.dataReset();
        init(); // re-render everything
      }
    });

    el('#log-5').addEventListener('click', () => logMinutes(5));
    el('#log-15').addEventListener('click', () => logMinutes(15));
    el('#clear-progress').addEventListener('click', () => {
      Storage.dataSet('dashboard.todaysProgressMinutes', 0);
      Storage.dataPush('dashboard.recentActivity', 'Cleared today\'s progress');
      renderProgress();
      renderRecentActivity();
    });

    el('#continue-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
      // For demo, increment continue progress slightly
      const cp = Storage.dataGet('dashboard.continuePractice');
      if(cp){
        cp.progressPercent = Math.min(100, cp.progressPercent + 10);
        Storage.dataSet('dashboard.continuePractice', cp);
        Storage.dataPush('dashboard.recentActivity', `Resumed practice: ${cp.title} (${cp.progressPercent}%)`);
        renderContinue();
        renderRecentActivity();
      } else {
        alert('No active practice session — start one in Practice page.');
      }
    });

    el('#reco-start').addEventListener('click', () => {
      const recs = Storage.dataGet('dashboard.recommendations', []);
      if(recs.length){
        const first = recs[0];
        Storage.dataPush('dashboard.recentActivity', `Started recommendation: ${first}`);
        alert('Starting recommendation (demo): ' + first);
        renderRecentActivity();
      }
    });
  }

  function logMinutes(m) {
    const current = Storage.dataGet('dashboard.todaysProgressMinutes', 0);
    const newVal = current + m;
    Storage.dataSet('dashboard.todaysProgressMinutes', newVal);
    Storage.dataPush('dashboard.recentActivity', `Logged ${m} minutes`);
    renderProgress();
    renderRecentActivity();
  }

  function init() {
    seedIfEmpty();
    renderContinue();
    renderRecommendations();
    renderBookmarks();
    renderWrong();
    renderScores();
    renderWeakSubjects();
    renderAccuracy();
    renderGoal();
    renderProgress();
    renderRecentActivity();
    hookActions();
  }

  return { init };
})();

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  Dashboard.init();
});[
  {
    "id": "q1",
    "prompt": "A 65-year-old man presents with sudden-onset chest pain. Which of the following is the most likely diagnosis given ST elevation in leads II, III and aVF?",
    "options": [
      "Anterior myocardial infarction",
      "Inferior myocardial infarction",
      "Lateral myocardial infarction",
      "Pericarditis"
    ],
    "correctIndex": 1,
    "explanation": "ST elevation in leads II, III and aVF localizes to the inferior wall, supplied by the right coronary artery — typical of inferior MI.",
    "tags": ["Cardiology","ECG"],
    "timeLimitSec": 90,
    "difficulty": "Medium"
  },
  {
    "id": "q2",
    "prompt": "Which of the following is the first-line treatment for a patient with suspected bacterial meningitis?",
    "options": [
      "Oral amoxicillin only",
      "Immediate IV antibiotics and dexamethasone",
      "Paracetamol and observation",
      "Lumbar puncture before antibiotics"
    ],
    "correctIndex": 1,
    "explanation": "In suspected bacterial meningitis, give immediate IV broad-spectrum antibiotics and dexamethasone; do not delay for LP if it would postpone therapy.",
    "tags": ["Infectious","Emergency"],
    "timeLimitSec": 120,
    "difficulty": "Hard"
  },
  {
    "id": "q3",
    "prompt": "A patient with type 1 diabetes has tachycardia, confusion and high anion-gap metabolic acidosis. Which is the most likely cause?",
    "options": [
      "Lactic acidosis",
      "Ketoacidosis",
      "Uremic acidosis",
      "Hyperchloremic acidosis"
    ],
    "correctIndex": 1,
    "explanation": "Diabetic ketoacidosis causes high anion-gap metabolic acidosis with dehydration and hyperglycemia.",
    "tags": ["Endocrinology"],
    "timeLimitSec": 90,
    "difficulty": "Medium"
  },
  {
    "id": "q4",
    "prompt": "A 72-year-old with progressive dyspnea and basal crackles: which investigation best assesses heart function?",
    "options": [
      "Chest X-ray",
      "Echocardiography",
      "Spirometry",
      "D-dimer"
    ],
    "correctIndex": 1,
    "explanation": "Echocardiography evaluates cardiac function and structural causes of heart failure.",
    "tags": ["Cardiology","Imaging"],
    "timeLimitSec": 60,
    "difficulty": "Easy"
  },
  {
    "id": "q5",
    "prompt": "Which antibiotic is contraindicated in pregnancy?",
    "options": [
      "Penicillin",
      "Azithromycin",
      "Tetracycline",
      "Cephalexin"
    ],
    "correctIndex": 2,
    "explanation": "Tetracyclines cause fetal bone and tooth discoloration and are contraindicated in pregnancy.",
    "tags": ["Pharmacology","Obstetrics"],
    "timeLimitSec": 75,
    "difficulty": "Medium"
  },
  {
    "id": "q6",
    "prompt": "Which electrolyte disturbance is most commonly associated with severe vomiting?",
    "options": [
      "Hyperkalemia",
      "Metabolic acidosis",
      "Hypochloremic metabolic alkalosis",
      "Hyponatremia"
    ],
    "correctIndex": 2,
    "explanation": "Vomiting causes loss of gastric H+ and Cl- leading to hypochloremic metabolic alkalosis.",
    "tags": ["Electrolytes","GI"],
    "timeLimitSec": 60,
    "difficulty": "Easy"
  ],
  {
    "id": "q7",
    "prompt": "A 55-year-old smoker presents with hemoptysis and weight loss. Which imaging is best to investigate suspected lung cancer?",
    "options": [
      "Chest X-ray",
      "Contrast CT chest",
      "MRI brain",
      "Ultrasound chest wall"
    ],
    "correctIndex": 1,
    "explanation": "Contrast CT chest is the imaging of choice to evaluate a suspected lung mass and staging.",
    "tags": ["Respiratory","Oncology"],
    "timeLimitSec": 90,
    "difficulty": "Medium"
  },
  {
    "id": "q8",
    "prompt": "Best immediate management for anaphylaxis with airway compromise?",
    "options": [
      "Oral antihistamine",
      "IM adrenaline (epinephrine) immediately",
      "IV fluids only",
      "Nebulized salbutamol"
    ],
    "correctIndex": 1,
    "explanation": "Intramuscular adrenaline is first-line for anaphylaxis and should be given immediately.",
    "tags": ["Emergency","Allergy"],
    "timeLimitSec": 45,
    "difficulty": "Easy"
  },
  {
    "id": "q9",
    "prompt": "Which of these is a classic triad of normal pressure hydrocephalus?",
    "options": [
      "Fever, neck stiffness, photophobia",
      "Gait disturbance, urinary incontinence, cognitive impairment",
      "Chest pain, syncope, hypotension",
      "Tremor, rigidity, bradykinesia"

    "correctIndex": 1,
    "explanation": "NPH presents with gait disturbance, urinary incontinence, and dementia (cognitive impairment).",
    "tags": ["Neurology"],
    "timeLimitSec": 75,
    "difficulty": "Medium"
  },
  {
    "id": "q10",
    "prompt": "Which is the most sensitive test to detect early myocardial ischemia?",
    "options": [
      "Resting ECG",
      "Troponin levels",
      "Stress echocardiography",

    "tags": ["Cardiology","Laboratory"],
    "timeLimitSec": 90,
    "difficulty": "Hard"

]<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />
  <title>MedOne AI — Practice</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/style.css">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/dark.css">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/responsive.css">

  <style>
    /* Question engine styles */
    .q-engine { max-width:900px;margin:0 auto; display:flex;flex-direction:column; gap:14px; }
    .q-card { background:var(--surface); padding:18px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:var(--shadow); }
    .q-prompt { font-weight:700; margin-bottom:12px; }
    .options{ display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:8px; }
    .option { padding:12px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid rgba(11,99,183,0.06); display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px; cursor:pointer; user-select:none;}
    .option:hover{background:rgba(11,99,183,0.03)}
    .option.selected{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent),var(--accent-600)); color:white; border:0}
    .option.correct{outline:3px solid rgba(30,155,255,0.12)}
    .option.incorrect{opacity:0.7}
    .meta { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; gap:12px; margin-bottom:8px; color:var(--muted) }
    .controls { display:flex; gap:8px; flex-wrap:wrap; align-items:center }
    .timer { font-weight:700; color:var(--accent-600) }
    .progress-wrap { width:100%; background:rgba(11,99,183,0.06); height:10px;border-radius:999px; overflow:hidden; }
    .progress-fill { height:100%; background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent),var(--accent-600)); width:0%; transition:width .3s; }
    .kbd { background:rgba(0,0,0,0.06); padding:4px 8px;border-radius:6px;font-weight:700 }
    .small-muted { font-size:13px;color:var(--muted) }
    .explanation { background:rgba(11,99,183,0.02); padding:12px;border-radius:8px;margin-top:8px }
    .question-toolbar { display:flex; gap:8px; align-items:center; flex-wrap:wrap; }
    input[type="number"].small { width:70px;padding:6px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(11,99,183,0.08) }
    .file-load { border:1px dashed rgba(11,99,183,0.08); padding:12px;border-radius:8px;text-align:center; }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <div id="app" class="app-layout">
    <aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
      <div class="brand">
        <div class="logo">M1</div>
        <h1>MedOne AI</h1>
      </div>
      <nav class="nav">
        <a href="index.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Dashboard</a>
        <a href="practice.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Practice</a>
        <a href="mock.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Mock Exams</a>
        <a href="review.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Review</a>
        <a href="analytics.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Analytics</a>
        <a href="settings.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Settings</a>
      </nav>
      <div class="sidebar-footer">
        <button id="collapse-btn-2" class="btn small">Toggle</button>
      </div>
    </aside>

    <div class="main">
      <header class="topbar">
        <div class="left">
          <button id="burger-2" class="burger" aria-label="Toggle menu">&#9776;</button>
          <div class="page-title">Practice</div>
        </div>
        <div class="right">
          <div class="search">
            <input id="practice-search" placeholder="Search practice cases..." />
          </div>
          <button id="theme-toggle-2" class="icon-btn" title="Toggle dark mode">🌓</button>
          <a href="settings.html" class="icon-btn" title="Settings">⚙️</a>
        </div>
      </header>

      <main class="content" id="practice-content">
        <section class="q-engine" aria-label="Question engine">

          <div id="loader" class="q-card small-muted">
            Loading questions...
            <div id="loader-actions" style="margin-top:8px"></div>
          </div>

          <div id="engine" style="display:none">
            <div class="q-card" role="region" aria-labelledby="q-number">
              <div class="meta">
                <div>
                  <span id="q-number">Q1</span> • <span id="q-difficulty" class="small-muted"></span> • <span id="q-tags" class="small-muted"></span>
                </div>
                <div class="question-toolbar">
                  <span class="kbd">A</span><span class="kbd">B</span><span class="kbd">C</span><span class="kbd">D</span>
                  <div style="width:12px"></div>
                  <span id="bookmark-btn" class="btn small">☆ Bookmark</span>
                  <span id="flag-btn" class="btn small">⚑ Flag</span>
                  <span id="show-correct" class="btn small">Show Answer</span>
                  <span id="toggle-expl" class="btn small">Explanation</span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="q-prompt" id="q-prompt">Prompt text</div>

              <div class="options" id="options" role="list">
                <!-- options rendered here -->
              </div>

              <div style="margin-top:12px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; gap:12px; flex-wrap:wrap">
                <div class="controls">
                  <button id="prev-btn" class="btn">Previous</button>
                  <button id="next-btn" class="btn primary">Next</button>
                  <button id="random-btn" class="btn small">Random</button>
                  <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px"><input id="auto-advance" type="checkbox" /> Auto-advance on answer</label>
                </div>

                <div style="text-align:right">
                  <div class="timer" id="timer">--:--</div>
                  <div class="small-muted" id="time-used">Time spent: 0s</div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div style="margin-top:12px">
                <div class="progress-wrap">
                  <div id="quest-progress" class="progress-fill" style="width:0%"></div>
                </div>
                <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-top:6px;color:var(--muted)">
                  <div id="progress-count">0 / 0 answered</div>
                  <div id="progress-percent">0%</div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div id="explanation" class="explanation" style="display:none"></div>

              <div style="margin-top:12px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center">
                <div class="small-muted">Question (<span id="current-index">1</span>/<span id="total-questions">0</span>)</div>
                <div>
                  <label>Jump to <input id="jump-input" class="small" type="number" min="1" /> </label>
                  <button id="jump-btn" class="btn small">Go</button>
                </div>
              </div>

            </div>

            <div class="q-card">
              <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center">
                <div>
                  <button id="save-progress-btn" class="btn small">Save Progress</button>
                  <button id="reset-progress-btn" class="btn small">Reset Progress</button>
                </div>

                <div class="small-muted">Keyboard: A/B/C/D select • N/P next/prev • B bookmark • F flag • J jump • R random • E explanation • S show answer</div>
              </div>
            </div>

          </div>

        </section>

      </main>

      <footer class="footer">
        <small>MedOne AI — Practice</small>
      </footer>
    </div>
  </div>

  <script type="module" src="js/app.js"></script>
  <script type="module" src="js/storage.js"></script>
  <script type="module" src="js/utils.js"></script>
  <script type="module" src="js/practice.js"></script>
</body>
</html>// js/practice.js
import Storage from './storage.js';
import { el, els, safeText } from './utils.js';

const DATA_PATH = 'data/questions.json';
const PROGRESS_KEY = 'questionEngineProgress_v1';

const Engine = (() => {
  let questions = [];
  let progress = {}; // keyed by question id: { selectedIndex, flagged, bookmarked, timeSpent }
  let index = 0;
  let timer = null;
  let timeLeft = 0;
  let tickingQuestionStart = null;
  let autoAdvance = false;

  // UI refs
  const loader = el('#loader');
  const loaderActions = el('#loader-actions');
  const engineWrap = el('#engine');
  const qNumber = el('#q-number');
  const qPrompt = el('#q-prompt');
  const qDifficulty = el('#q-difficulty');
  const qTags = el('#q-tags');
  const optionsWrap = el('#options');
  const prevBtn = el('#prev-btn');
  const nextBtn = el('#next-btn');
  const randomBtn = el('#random-btn');
  const bookmarkBtn = el('#bookmark-btn');
  const flagBtn = el('#flag-btn');
  const showCorrectBtn = el('#show-correct');
  const toggleExplBtn = el('#toggle-expl');
  const explanationWrap = el('#explanation');
  const timerEl = el('#timer');
  const timeUsedEl = el('#time-used');
  const progressFill = el('#quest-progress');
  const progressCount = el('#progress-count');
  const progressPercent = el('#progress-percent');
  const totalSpan = el('#total-questions');
  const currentIndexSpan = el('#current-index');
  const jumpInput = el('#jump-input');
  const jumpBtn = el('#jump-btn');
  const autoAdvanceCheckbox = el('#auto-advance');
  const saveProgressBtn = el('#save-progress-btn');
  const resetProgressBtn = el('#reset-progress-btn');

  // Utility: format mm:ss
  function formatMS(s) {
    if (!isFinite(s) || s < 0) s = 0;
    const m = Math.floor(s / 60).toString().padStart(2,'0');
    const sec = Math.floor(s % 60).toString().padStart(2,'0');
    return `${m}:${sec}`;
  }

  // Load questions JSON (try fetch; if fails, present file input fallback)
  async function loadQuestions() {
    try {
      const resp = await fetch(DATA_PATH, {cache: "no-store"});
      if(!resp.ok) throw new Error('Fetch failed');
      const data = await resp.json();
      if(!Array.isArray(data) || data.length === 0) throw new Error('Invalid JSON');
      questions = data;
      loader.style.display = 'none';
      engineWrap.style.display = '';
      initAfterLoad();
    } catch (err) {
      console.warn('Could not fetch questions.json:', err);
      loader.innerHTML = '';
      const msg = document.createElement('div');
      msg.innerHTML = `<div style="font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px">Unable to load ${DATA_PATH} directly.</div>
        <div class="small-muted">Choose a questions JSON file to load, or run a local server (e.g. <code>python -m http.server</code>).</div>`;
      const fileControl = document.createElement('div');
      fileControl.className = 'file-load';
      fileControl.innerHTML = `<input id="questions-file" type="file" accept="application/json" />`;
      loader.appendChild(msg);
      loaderActions.appendChild(fileControl);
      const input = document.getElementById('questions-file');
      input.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
        const f = e.target.files[0];
        if(!f) return;
        const reader = new FileReader();
        reader.onload = (ev) => {
          try {
            const parsed = JSON.parse(ev.target.result);
            if(!Array.isArray(parsed)) throw new Error('JSON must be an array of questions');
            questions = parsed;
            loader.style.display = 'none';
            engineWrap.style.display = '';
            initAfterLoad();
          } catch (ex) {
            alert('Invalid JSON file: ' + ex.message);
          }
        };
        reader.readAsText(f);
      });
    }
  }

  function initAfterLoad(){
    // build progress object from Storage if exists
    const saved = Storage.dataGet('questionProgress') || Storage.dataGet('dashboard.questionProgress') || null;
    if(saved && saved.questions && saved.questionsMap) {
      // support old shape — we will store under questionProgress
      progress = saved.questionsMap;
      index = Math.min(saved.currentIndex || 0, questions.length - 1);
    } else {
      const p = Storage.dataGet(PROGRESS_KEY);
      if(p && p.questionsMap) {
        progress = p.questionsMap;
        index = Math.min(p.currentIndex || 0, questions.length - 1);
      } else {
        // initialize blank progress
        progress = {};
        questions.forEach(q => {
          progress[q.id] = { selectedIndex: null, flagged: false, bookmarked: false, timeSpent: 0 };
        });
        index = 0;
        persistProgress();
      }
    }

    totalSpan.textContent = questions.length;
    autoAdvance = false;
    autoAdvanceCheckbox.checked = false;

    renderQuestion();
    attachHandlers();
  }

  function persistProgress() {
    const store = { currentIndex: index, questionsMap: progress, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() };
    Storage.dataSet(PROGRESS_KEY, store);
  }

  function attachHandlers() {
    prevBtn.addEventListener('click', prev);
    nextBtn.addEventListener('click', next);
    randomBtn.addEventListener('click', random);
    bookmarkBtn.addEventListener('click', toggleBookmark);
    flagBtn.addEventListener('click', toggleFlag);
    showCorrectBtn.addEventListener('click', showCorrectAnswer);
    toggleExplBtn.addEventListener('click', toggleExplanation);
    jumpBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const v = parseInt(jumpInput.value,10);
      if(isFinite(v) && v>=1 && v<=questions.length) jumpTo(v-1);
    });
    saveProgressBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      persistProgress();
      alert('Progress saved to localStorage.');
    });
    resetProgressBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      if(confirm('Reset saved progress?')) {
        questions.forEach(q => progress[q.id] = { selectedIndex: null, flagged:false, bookmarked:false, timeSpent:0 });
        index = 0;
        persistProgress();
        renderQuestion();
      }
    });
    autoAdvanceCheckbox.addEventListener('change', () => {
      autoAdvance = autoAdvanceCheckbox.checked;
    });

    // keyboard shortcuts
    document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
      if(!engineWrap || engineWrap.style.display === 'none') return;
      const tag = e.target.tagName.toLowerCase();
      // ignore when typing in inputs
      if(tag === 'input' || tag==='textarea') return;
      const key = e.key.toLowerCase();
      if(['a','b','c','d'].includes(key)) {
        const idx = ['a','b','c','d'].indexOf(key);
        selectOption(idx);
        e.preventDefault();
        return;
      }
      if(key === 'arrowright' || key === 'n') { next(); e.preventDefault(); return; }
      if(key === 'arrowleft' || key === 'p') { prev(); e.preventDefault(); return; }
      if(key === 'r') { random(); e.preventDefault(); return; }
      if(key === 'b') { toggleBookmark(); e.preventDefault(); return; }
      if(key === 'f') { toggleFlag(); e.preventDefault(); return; }
      if(key === 'e') { toggleExplanation(); e.preventDefault(); return; }
      if(key === 's') { showCorrectAnswer(); e.preventDefault(); return; }
      if(key === 'j') {
        const v = prompt(`Jump to question (1-${questions.length})`);
        const n = parseInt(v,10);
        if(isFinite(n) && n>=1 && n<=questions.length) jumpTo(n-1);
        e.preventDefault();
        return;
      }
      if(/\d/.test(key)) {
        // quick digit jump: if single digit, support small quizzes; otherwise ignore
        const digit = parseInt(key,10);
        if(digit > 0 && digit <= questions.length) {
          jumpTo(digit - 1);
          e.preventDefault();
        }
      }
    });
  }

  // Render functions
  function renderQuestion() {
    stopTimer(); // stop previous timer and record time
    const q = questions[index];
    if(!q) return;
    const p = progress[q.id];
    qNumber.textContent = `Q${index+1}`;
    currentIndexSpan.textContent = index+1;
    totalSpan.textContent = questions.length;
    qPrompt.textContent = q.prompt;
    qDifficulty.textContent = q.difficulty || '';
    qTags.textContent = (q.tags || []).join(', ');

    // Render options
    optionsWrap.innerHTML = '';
    (q.options || []).forEach((optText, i) => {
      const d = document.createElement('div');
      d.className = 'option';
      d.setAttribute('data-index', i);
      d.setAttribute('role','button');
      d.innerHTML = `<div style="width:28px;font-weight:800">${String.fromCharCode(65 + i)}</div><div>${optText}</div>`;
      d.addEventListener('click', () => { selectOption(i); });
      optionsWrap.appendChild(d);
    });

    // set selection state
    if(p.selectedIndex !== null) {
      markSelected(p.selectedIndex, false);
    }

    // bookmark & flag
    bookmarkBtn.textContent = p.bookmarked ? '★ Bookmarked' : '☆ Bookmark';
    flagBtn.textContent = p.flagged ? '⚑ Flagged' : '⚑ Flag';

    // explanation visibility
    explanationWrap.style.display = 'none';
    explanationWrap.textContent = '';

    // update progress UI
    updateProgressUI();

    // timer
    const limit = q.timeLimitSec || 0;
    if(limit > 0) {
      startTimer(limit, p.timeSpent || 0);
    } else {
      timerEl.textContent = '--:--';
      timeUsedEl.textContent = `Time spent: ${p.timeSpent || 0}s`;
    }

    // persist current index
    persistProgress();
  }

  function markSelected(selectedIndex, showFeedback=true) {
    const q = questions[index];
    const p = progress[q.id];
    // update DOM classes
    Array.from(optionsWrap.children).forEach((child, i) => {
      child.classList.remove('selected','correct','incorrect');
      child.style.opacity = '';
    });
    if(selectedIndex !== null && optionsWrap.children[selectedIndex]) {
      optionsWrap.children[selectedIndex].classList.add('selected');
    }
    // show correctness if showFeedback true
    if(showFeedback && selectedIndex !== null) {
      const correct = q.correctIndex;
      if(selectedIndex === correct) {
        optionsWrap.children[selectedIndex].classList.add('correct');
      } else {
        optionsWrap.children[selectedIndex].classList.add('incorrect');
        if(optionsWrap.children[correct]) optionsWrap.children[correct].classList.add('correct');
      }
    }
  }

  function selectOption(i) {
    const q = questions[index];
    const p = progress[q.id];
    p.selectedIndex = i;
    persistProgress();
    markSelected(i, true);

    // show explanation automatically when selected
    explanationWrap.style.display = 'block';
    explanationWrap.innerHTML = `<strong>Explanation:</strong><div style="margin-top:8px">${q.explanation || 'No explanation available.'}</div>`;

    if(autoAdvance) {
      // small delay to show feedback then next
      setTimeout(() => { next(); }, 700);
    }
  }

  function toggleBookmark() {
    const q = questions[index];
    const p = progress[q.id];
    p.bookmarked = !p.bookmarked;
    bookmarkBtn.textContent = p.bookmarked ? '★ Bookmarked' : '☆ Bookmark';
    persistProgress();
  }

  function toggleFlag() {
    const q = questions[index];
    const p = progress[q.id];
    p.flagged = !p.flagged;
    flagBtn.textContent = p.flagged ? '⚑ Flagged' : '⚑ Flag';
    persistProgress();
  }

  function showCorrectAnswer() {
    const q = questions[index];
    const correct = q.correctIndex;
    Array.from(optionsWrap.children).forEach((child, i) => {
      child.classList.remove('correct','incorrect');
      if(i === correct) child.classList.add('correct');
      else child.classList.add('incorrect');
    });
    // show explanation too
    explanationWrap.style.display = 'block';
    explanationWrap.innerHTML = `<strong>Correct answer:</strong> ${String.fromCharCode(65 + correct)} — ${q.options[correct]}<div style="margin-top:8px">${q.explanation || ''}</div>`;
  }

  function toggleExplanation() {
    if(explanationWrap.style.display === 'none' || !explanationWrap.style.display) {
      explanationWrap.style.display = 'block';
      const q = questions[index];
      explanationWrap.innerHTML = `<strong>Explanation:</strong><div style="margin-top:8px">${q.explanation || 'No explanation available.'}</div>`;
    } else {
      explanationWrap.style.display = 'none';
    }
  }

  function prev() {
    if(index > 0) index--;
    renderQuestion();
  }

  function next() {
    if(index < questions.length - 1) {
      index++;
      renderQuestion();
    } else {
      // at end — optionally wrap or alert
      if(confirm('End of questions. Jump to start?')) {
        index = 0;
        renderQuestion();
      }
    }
  }

  function jumpTo(i) {
    if(i >= 0 && i < questions.length) {
      index = i;
      renderQuestion();
    }
  }

  function random() {
    if(questions.length <= 1) return;
    const r = Math.floor(Math.random() * questions.length);
    index = r;
    renderQuestion();
  }

  // Timer: track per-question timeSpent, show time left if limit set
  function startTimer(limitSec, existingTimeSpent = 0) {
    stopTimer();
    // existingTimeSpent is cumulative time already spent on this question
    timeLeft = Math.max(0, (limitSec - existingTimeSpent));
    tickingQuestionStart = Date.now();
    updateTimerOnce(limitSec, existingTimeSpent);
    timer = setInterval(() => {
      updateTimerOnce(limitSec, existingTimeSpent);
    }, 500);
  }

  function updateTimerOnce(limitSec, existingTimeSpent) {
    const elapsedSinceTickStart = (Date.now() - tickingQuestionStart) / 1000;
    const totalSpent = existingTimeSpent + elapsedSinceTickStart;
    const left = Math.max(0, Math.round(limitSec - totalSpent));
    timerEl.textContent = formatMS(left);
    timeUsedEl.textContent = `Time spent: ${Math.round(totalSpent)}s`;
    // update local progress.timeSpent but don't persist every 500ms; we'll set in stopTimer
    if(left <= 0) {
      // time up: record and advance
      stopTimer(true); // record and reset
      // mark as unanswered/time expired but keep selectedIndex as null
      const q = questions[index];
      const p = progress[q.id];
      p.timeSpent = (p.timeSpent || 0) + (limitSec - (p.timeSpent || 0));
      persistProgress();
      if(confirm('Time is up for this question. Move to next?')) {
        next();
      }
    }
  }

  function stopTimer(record=false) {
    if(!tickingQuestionStart) return;
    const delta = (Date.now() - tickingQuestionStart) / 1000;
    const q = questions[index];
    if(q) {
      const p = progress[q.id];
      p.timeSpent = (p.timeSpent || 0) + Math.round(delta);
      if(record) persistProgress();
    }
    tickingQuestionStart = null;
    if(timer) {
      clearInterval(timer);
      timer = null;
    }
  }

  function updateProgressUI() {
    // answered = selectedIndex !== null
    const total = questions.length;
    let answered = 0;
    let bookmarked = 0;
    let flagged = 0;
    questions.forEach(q => {
      const p = progress[q.id];
      if(p.selectedIndex !== null) answered++;
      if(p.bookmarked) bookmarked++;
      if(p.flagged) flagged++;
    });
    const pct = Math.round((answered/total) * 100);
    progressFill.style.width = `${pct}%`;
    progressCount.textContent = `${answered} / ${total} answered`;
    progressPercent.textContent = `${pct}%`;
    // also update small counter
    currentIndexSpan.textContent = index + 1;
  }

  // ensure we persist time spent on unload
  window.addEventListener('beforeunload', () => {
    stopTimer(true);
    persistProgress();
  });

  // When switching questions, ensure we record time for previous question
  // We already call stopTimer() at start of renderQuestion()

  return {
    load: loadQuestions
  };
})();

// Start
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  Engine.load();
});<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />
  <title>MedOne AI — Mock Exam</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/style.css">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/dark.css">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/responsive.css">

  <style>
    /* Mock exam UI tweaks */
    .exam-wrap { max-width:1100px; margin:0 auto; display:flex; gap:16px; align-items:flex-start; }
    .exam-left { flex:1; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:12px; }
    .exam-right { width:320px; min-width:260px; }
    .q-card { background:var(--surface); padding:18px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:var(--shadow); }
    .q-prompt { font-weight:700; margin-bottom:12px; }
    .options{ display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:8px; }
    .option { padding:12px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid rgba(11,99,183,0.06); display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px; cursor:pointer; user-select:none;}
    .option:hover{background:rgba(11,99,183,0.03)}
    .option.selected{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent),var(--accent-600)); color:white; border:0}
    .meta { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; gap:12px; color:var(--muted) }
    .timer-large { font-weight:800; font-size:20px; color:var(--accent-600) }
    .progress-wrap { width:100%; background:rgba(11,99,183,0.06); height:10px;border-radius:999px; overflow:hidden; }
    .progress-fill { height:100%; background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent),var(--accent-600)); width:0%; transition:width .3s; }
    .small-muted { font-size:13px;color:var(--muted) }
    .controls { display:flex; gap:8px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
    .exam-right .panel { margin-bottom:12px }
