    .list-scroll { max-height:240px; overflow:auto; padding:6px; border-radius:8px; background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(11,99,183,0.02), transparent) }
    .btn-block { display:block;width:100%; text-align:center }
    .result-modal { position:fixed; left:50%; top:50%; transform:translate(-50%,-50%); z-index:9999; background:var(--surface); padding:20px;border-radius:10px;box-shadow:var(--shadow); width:90%;max-width:560px }
    .overlay { position:fixed;left:0;top:0;right:0;bottom:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.36);z-index:9998 }
    @media (max-width: 920px){
      .exam-wrap{flex-direction:column}
      .exam-right{width:100%}
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <div id="app" class="app-layout">
    <aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
      <div class="brand">
        <div class="logo">M1</div>
        <h1>MedOne AI</h1>
      </div>
      <nav class="nav">
        <a href="index.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Dashboard</a>
        <a href="practice.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Practice</a>
        <a href="mock.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Mock Exams</a>
        <a href="review.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Review</a>
        <a href="analytics.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Analytics</a>
        <a href="settings.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Settings</a>
      </nav>
      <div class="sidebar-footer">
        <button id="collapse-btn-3" class="btn small">Toggle</button>
      </div>
    </aside>

    <div class="main">
      <header class="topbar">
        <div class="left">
          <button id="burger-3" class="burger" aria-label="Toggle menu">&#9776;</button>
          <div class="page-title">Mock Exam</div>
        </div>
        <div class="right">
          <div class="search">
            <input id="mock-search" placeholder="Search mock exams..." />
          </div>
          <button id="theme-toggle-3" class="icon-btn" title="Toggle dark mode">🌓</button>
          <a href="settings.html" class="icon-btn" title="Settings">⚙️</a>
        </div>
      </header>

      <main class="content" id="mock-content">
        <div class="exam-wrap">

          <div class="exam-left">
            <div class="q-card">
              <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center">
                <div>
                  <div class="small-muted">Exam: <strong id="exam-id">—</strong></div>
                  <div class="small-muted">Questions: <strong id="total-q">0</strong></div>
                </div>
                <div style="text-align:right">
                  <div class="timer-large" id="exam-timer">--:--:--</div>
                  <div class="small-muted" id="timer-note">Remaining</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="q-card" id="question-area" style="display:none">
              <div class="meta">
                <div>
                  <span id="q-topic" class="small-muted"></span> • <span id="q-index" class="small-muted"></span>
                </div>
                <div class="small-muted">Question #: <strong id="q-num">0</strong> / <strong id="q-total">0</strong></div>
              </div>

              <div class="q-prompt" id="q-prompt">Prompt</div>

              <div class="options" id="options"></div>

              <div style="margin-top:12px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap">
                <div class="controls">
                  <button id="prev-q" class="btn">Previous</button>
                  <button id="next-q" class="btn primary">Next</button>
                  <button id="random-q" class="btn small">Random</button>
                </div>

                <div style="text-align:right">
                  <div class="small-muted" id="q-time-limit">Question time: --</div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div style="margin-top:12px">
                <div class="progress-wrap">
                  <div id="exam-progress" class="progress-fill" style="width:0%"></div>
                </div>
                <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-top:6px;color:var(--muted)">
                  <div id="answered-count">0 answered</div>
                  <div id="answered-percent">0%</div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div style="margin-top:12px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center">
                <div class="controls">
                  <button id="bookmark-q" class="btn small">☆ Bookmark</button>
                  <button id="flag-q" class="btn small">⚑ Flag</button>
                  <button id="show-correct-q" class="btn small">Show Answer</button>
                </div>
                <div class="small-muted">Shortcuts: A/B/C/D • N/P • B flag • M bookmark • R random • S submit</div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="q-card" id="start-area">
              <div style="display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap">
                <label>Duration (minutes):
                  <input id="exam-duration" type="number" min="1" value="180" style="width:90px;padding:6px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(11,99,183,0.08)">
                </label>
                <button id="generate-exam" class="btn primary">Generate & Start New Exam</button>
                <button id="resume-exam" class="btn">Resume Saved Exam</button>
                <button id="clear-exam" class="btn small">Clear Saved Exam</button>
                <button id="submit-exam" class="btn danger" style="margin-left:auto">Submit Exam</button>
              </div>
              <div style="margin-top:10px" class="small-muted">The exam will be randomized and questions will not duplicate. You can review flagged or unanswered items before submission.</div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <aside class="exam-right">
            <div class="panel q-card">
              <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center">
                <div><strong>Review / Navigation</strong></div>
                <div><button id="open-review" class="btn small">Open</button></div>
              </div>
              <div class="list-scroll" id="nav-list" style="margin-top:8px"></div>
            </div>

            <div class="panel q-card">
              <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center">
                <div><strong>Stats</strong></div>
              </div>
              <div style="margin-top:8px" class="small-muted">
                Total: <span id="stat-total">0</span><br/>
                Answered: <span id="stat-answered">0</span><br/>
                Bookmarked: <span id="stat-bookmarked">0</span><br/>
                Flagged: <span id="stat-flagged">0</span>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="panel q-card">
              <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center">
                <div><strong>Actions</strong></div>
              </div>
              <div style="margin-top:8px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px">
                <button id="review-flagged" class="btn">Review Flagged</button>
                <button id="review-unanswered" class="btn">Review Unanswered</button>
                <button id="export-exam" class="btn small">Export Exam (JSON)</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </aside>

        </div>
      </main>

      <footer class="footer">
        <small>MedOne AI — Mock Exam</small>
      </footer>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- result modal container -->
  <div id="modal-root"></div>

  <script type="module" src="js/app.js"></script>
  <script type="module" src="js/storage.js"></script>
  <script type="module" src="js/utils.js"></script>
  <script type="module" src="js/mock.js"></script>
</body>
</html>// js/mock.js
import Storage from './storage.js';
import { el, els, safeText } from './utils.js';

/*
 Mock Exam engine
 - Generates 200 questions by topic distribution
 - Randomizes exam
 - Prevents duplicates (unique ids)
 - Timer, review, submit, score
 - Persists exam state in Storage.dataSet('mockExam_v1', ...)
*/

const MOCK_KEY = 'mockExam_v1';

// Topic distribution (topic: count)
const TOPIC_DISTRIBUTION = [
  ['Anatomy', 31],
  ['Embryology', 5],
  ['Histology', 10],
  ['Physiology', 27],
  ['Biochemistry', 27],
  ['Microbiology', 17],
  ['Immunology', 11],
  ['Parasitology', 7],
  ['Biostatistics/Epidemiology/Public Health', 15],
  ['Pharmacology', 25],
  ['Pathology', 25]
];

// Utility: shuffle array in place
function shuffle(arr) {
  for(let i = arr.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
    const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
    [arr[i], arr[j]] = [arr[j], arr[i]];
  }
  return arr;
}

// Utility: generate option set and correct index deterministically
function generateOptions(topic, idx) {
  // We create 4 plausible options by templating; the correct option is position (idx % 4)
  const base = [
    `Most likely about ${topic} (option 1)`,
    `Commonly tested concept in ${topic} (option 2)`,
    `Important principle of ${topic} (option 3)`,
    `Less likely for ${topic} (option 4)`
  ];
  // pick correct position pseudo-randomly
  const correctPos = (Math.abs(hashString(topic + '|' + idx)) % 4);
  // rotate base so that correctPos holds the most plausible-sounding answer
  const opts = [...base];
  // to make the "correct" option sound slightly better, tweak text
  opts[correctPos] = `Correct: Key fact about ${topic}`;
  return { options: opts, correctIndex: correctPos };
}

// simple hash to get deterministic variety
function hashString(s) {
  let h = 2166136261 >>> 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < s.length; i++) {
    h ^= s.charCodeAt(i);
    h = Math.imul(h, 16777619);
  }
  return h >>> 0;
}

// Generate unique question id
function makeQId(topic, localIdx) {
  const t = topic.replace(/[^a-z0-9]/gi, '_').toLowerCase();
  return `${t}_${localIdx}`;
}

function buildQuestion(topic, localIdx, globalIdx) {
  const qid = makeQId(topic, localIdx);
  const prompt = `${topic} — Question ${globalIdx + 1}: Consider ${topic} concept #${localIdx}. Which option is correct?`;
  const { options, correctIndex } = generateOptions(topic, localIdx);
  const explanation = `Explanation (auto-generated) — The best answer pertains to ${topic} and highlights key points.`;
  const timeLimitSec = 90 + (Math.abs(hashString(qid)) % 60); // 90-149s question time variety
  return {
    id: qid + '_' + globalIdx, // ensure global uniqueness using globalIdx
    prompt,
    options,
    correctIndex,
    explanation,
    topic,
    timeLimitSec,
    difficulty: pickDifficulty(topic, localIdx)
  };
}

function pickDifficulty(topic, localIdx) {
  // simple heuristic: pick difficulty based on topic and index
  const seed = Math.abs(hashString(topic + '|' + localIdx)) % 100;
  if(seed < 25) return 'Easy';
  if(seed < 70) return 'Medium';
  return 'Hard';
}

// Build full exam (200 questions) following distribution
function generateExam() {
  const questions = [];
  let global = 0;
  TOPIC_DISTRIBUTION.forEach(([topic, count]) => {
    for(let i=1;i<=count;i++){
      questions.push(buildQuestion(topic, i, global));
      global++;
    }
  });
  // Shuffle questions to randomize exam order
  shuffle(questions);
  // Ensure unique ids (they should be unique because we appended global index)
  const ids = new Set();
  for(const q of questions){
    if(ids.has(q.id)) throw new Error('Duplicate question id: ' + q.id);
    ids.add(q.id);
  }
  return questions;
}

// UI refs
const examIdEl = el('#exam-id');
const totalQEl = el('#total-q');
const examTimerEl = el('#exam-timer');
const questionArea = el('#question-area');
const qTopicEl = el('#q-topic');
const qIndexEl = el('#q-index');
const qNumEl = el('#q-num');
const qTotalEl = el('#q-total');
const qPromptEl = el('#q-prompt');
const optionsEl = el('#options');
const prevQBtn = el('#prev-q');
const nextQBtn = el('#next-q');
const randomQBtn = el('#random-q');
const qTimeLimitEl = el('#q-time-limit');
const examProgressFill = el('#exam-progress');
const answeredCountEl = el('#answered-count');
const answeredPercentEl = el('#answered-percent');
const bookmarkQBtn = el('#bookmark-q');
const flagQBtn = el('#flag-q');
const showCorrectQBtn = el('#show-correct-q');

const generateBtn = el('#generate-exam');
const resumeBtn = el('#resume-exam');
const clearExamBtn = el('#clear-exam');
const submitBtn = el('#submit-exam');
const durationInput = el('#exam-duration');
const navList = el('#nav-list');
const openReviewBtn = el('#open-review');
const reviewFlaggedBtn = el('#review-flagged');
const reviewUnansweredBtn = el('#review-unanswered');
const exportBtn = el('#export-exam');

const statTotal = el('#stat-total');
const statAnswered = el('#stat-answered');
const statBookmarked = el('#stat-bookmarked');
const statFlagged = el('#stat-flagged');

let exam = null; // will hold exam object
let timerInterval = null; // global exam timer

function makeExamState(questions, durationMinutes) {
  // create initial answers map
  const answers = {}; // id -> selectedIndex|null
  const flagged = {}; // id -> boolean
  const bookmarked = {}; // id -> boolean
  const timeSpent = {}; // id -> seconds
  questions.forEach(q => {
    answers[q.id] = null;
    flagged[q.id] = false;
    bookmarked[q.id] = false;
    timeSpent[q.id] = 0;
  });
  return {
    id: 'mock_' + Date.now(),
    questions,
    currentIndex: 0,
    answers,
    flagged,
    bookmarked,
    timeSpent,
    durationSec: Math.max(60, Math.floor((durationMinutes || 180) * 60)),
    remainingSec: Math.max(60, Math.floor((durationMinutes || 180) * 60)),
    startedAt: null,
    lastTickAt: null,
    submitted: false,
    result: null // {score, correctCount, total}
  };
}

function saveExam() {
  Storage.dataSet(MOCK_KEY, exam);
}

function loadSavedExam() {
  const s = Storage.dataGet(MOCK_KEY);
  return s || null;
}

function clearSavedExam() {
  Storage.dataSet(MOCK_KEY, null);
  exam = null;
  stopTimer();
  renderInitial();
}

// Timer functions
function startTimerIfNeeded() {
  if(!exam || exam.submitted) return;
  if(exam.startedAt === null) {
    exam.startedAt = new Date().toISOString();
    exam.lastTickAt = Date.now();
  }
  if(timerInterval) return;
  timerInterval = setInterval(() => {
    tickTimer();
  }, 1000);
  saveExam();
}

function stopTimer() {
  if(timerInterval) {
    clearInterval(timerInterval);
    timerInterval = null;
  }
}

function tickTimer() {
  const now = Date.now();
  const elapsed = Math.floor((now - (exam.lastTickAt || now)) / 1000);
  exam.lastTickAt = now;
  exam.remainingSec = Math.max(0, exam.remainingSec - elapsed);
  // update UI
  updateExamTimerUI();
  if(exam.remainingSec <= 0) {
    // time's up -> auto-submit
    stopTimer();
    submitExam(true);
  } else {
    // periodically save state
    saveExam();
  }
}

// UI helpers
function formatHMS(s) {
  const hrs = Math.floor(s / 3600);
  const mins = Math.floor((s % 3600) / 60);
  const secs = s % 60;
  return `${String(hrs).padStart(2,'0')}:${String(mins).padStart(2,'0')}:${String(secs).padStart(2,'0')}`;
}

function updateExamTimerUI() {
  if(!exam) { examTimerEl.textContent = '--:--:--'; return; }
  examTimerEl.textContent = formatHMS(exam.remainingSec);
}

function renderInitial() {
  // initial UI state
  const saved = loadSavedExam();
  examIdEl.textContent = saved ? (saved.id || 'saved') : '—';
  totalQEl.textContent = saved ? (saved.questions.length || 0) : '0';
  updateExamTimerUI();
  questionArea.style.display = saved ? '' : 'none';
  // fill stats
  statTotal.textContent = saved ? saved.questions.length : 0;
  statAnswered.textContent = saved ? countAnswered(saved) : 0;
  statBookmarked.textContent = saved ? countBookmarked(saved) : 0;
  statFlagged.textContent = saved ? countFlagged(saved) : 0;
  // nav list
  navList.innerHTML = '';
  if(saved) buildNavList(saved);
}

// Build nav list (small grid of question buttons)
function buildNavList(examState) {
  navList.innerHTML = '';
  examState.questions.forEach((q, i) => {
    const btn = document.createElement('button');
    btn.className = 'btn small';
    btn.textContent = String(i+1);
    btn.style.margin = '3px';
    const answered = examState.answers[q.id] !== null;
    if(answered) btn.style.background = 'rgba(11,99,183,0.06)';
    if(examState.flagged[q.id]) btn.style.border = '2px solid rgba(255,165,0,0.9)';
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      jumpTo(i);
    });
    navList.appendChild(btn);
  });
}

// Render question at current index
let questionTimerStart = null;
function renderQuestion() {
  if(!exam) return;
  const q = exam.questions[exam.currentIndex];
  qTopicEl.textContent = q.topic;
  qIndexEl.textContent = `${exam.currentIndex + 1} (${q.difficulty})`;
  qNumEl.textContent = exam.currentIndex + 1;
  qTotalEl.textContent = exam.questions.length;
  qPromptEl.textContent = q.prompt;

  // render options
  optionsEl.innerHTML = '';
  q.options.forEach((opt, idx) => {
    const d = document.createElement('div');
    d.className = 'option';
    d.setAttribute('data-index', idx);
    d.innerHTML = `<div style="width:28px;font-weight:800">${String.fromCharCode(65 + idx)}</div><div>${opt}</div>`;
    d.addEventListener('click', () => selectOption(idx));
    optionsEl.appendChild(d);
  });

  // set selected option styling
  const sel = exam.answers[q.id];
  if(sel !== null && optionsEl.children[sel]) {
    optionsEl.children[sel].classList.add('selected');
  }

  // buttons text
  bookmarkQBtn.textContent = exam.bookmarked[q.id] ? '★ Bookmarked' : '☆ Bookmark';
  flagQBtn.textContent = exam.flagged[q.id] ? '⚑ Flagged' : '⚑ Flag';

  qTimeLimitEl.textContent = `Estimated time: ${q.timeLimitSec}s`;

  // progress
  updateProgressUI();

  // nav list
  buildNavList(exam);

  // show question area
  questionArea.style.display = '';

  // start per-question timer (recording time spent per question)
  if(questionTimerStart) {
    // save prior question time
    const prev = questionTimerStart;
    questionTimerStart = Date.now();
  } else {
    questionTimerStart = Date.now();
  }

  // ensure global timer running
  startTimerIfNeeded();
}

function updateProgressUI() {
  const total = exam.questions.length;
  const answered = countAnswered(exam);
  const pct = Math.round((answered / total) * 100);
  examProgressFill.style.width = `${pct}%`;
  answeredCountEl.textContent = `${answered} answered`;
  answeredPercentEl.textContent = `${pct}%`;

  statTotal.textContent = total;
  statAnswered.textContent = answered;
  statBookmarked.textContent = countBookmarked(exam);
  statFlagged.textContent = countFlagged(exam);
}

function countAnswered(state) {
  let c = 0;
  Object.values(state.answers).forEach(v => { if(v !== null) c++; });
  return c;
}
function countBookmarked(state) {
  let c = 0; Object.values(state.bookmarked).forEach(v => { if(v) c++; }); return c;
}
function countFlagged(state) {
  let c = 0; Object.values(state.flagged).forEach(v => { if(v) c++; }); return c;
}

// navigation
function prevQuestion() {
  recordTimeOnCurrent();
  if(exam.currentIndex > 0) {
    exam.currentIndex--;
    saveExam();
    renderQuestion();
  }
}
function nextQuestion() {
  recordTimeOnCurrent();
  if(exam.currentIndex < exam.questions.length - 1) {
    exam.currentIndex++;
    saveExam();
    renderQuestion();
  }
}
function randomQuestion() {
  recordTimeOnCurrent();
  const r = Math.floor(Math.random() * exam.questions.length);
  exam.currentIndex = r;
  saveExam();
  renderQuestion();
}
function jumpTo(i) {
  if(i < 0 || i >= exam.questions.length) return;
  recordTimeOnCurrent();
  exam.currentIndex = i;
  saveExam();
  renderQuestion();
}

// actions
function selectOption(idx) {
  const q = exam.questions[exam.currentIndex];
  exam.answers[q.id] = idx;
  saveExam();
  // update UI
  Array.from(optionsEl.children).forEach((c, i) => {
    c.classList.toggle('selected', i === idx);
  });
  updateProgressUI();
}

function toggleBookmark() {
  const q = exam.questions[exam.currentIndex];
  exam.bookmarked[q.id] = !exam.bookmarked[q.id];
  saveExam();
  renderQuestion();
}
function toggleFlag() {
  const q = exam.questions[exam.currentIndex];
  exam.flagged[q.id] = !exam.flagged[q.id];
  saveExam();
  renderQuestion();
}

function showCorrect() {
  const q = exam.questions[exam.currentIndex];
  Array.from(optionsEl.children).forEach((c, i) => {
    c.classList.remove('correct','incorrect');
    if(i === q.correctIndex) c.classList.add('correct');
    else c.classList.add('incorrect');
  });
}
function recordTimeOnCurrent() {
  if(!exam || !questionTimerStart) return;
  const delta = Math.floor((Date.now() - questionTimerStart) / 1000);
  const q = exam.questions[exam.currentIndex];
  exam.timeSpent[q.id] = (exam.timeSpent[q.id] || 0) + delta;
  questionTimerStart = Date.now();
  saveExam();
}

// Submit
function submitExam(auto=false) {
  if(!exam) return;
  // stop timer & record current question time
  stopTimer();
  recordTimeOnCurrent();

  // grade
  const total = exam.questions.length;
  let correct = 0;
  exam.questions.forEach(q => {
    const sel = exam.answers[q.id];
    if(sel !== null && sel === q.correctIndex) correct++;
  });
  const pct = Math.round((correct / total) * 100);
  exam.submitted = true;
  exam.result = { correctCount: correct, total, percent: pct, submittedAt: new Date().toISOString(), auto };
  saveExam();
  showResultModal();
}

// export exam JSON
function exportExam() {
  if(!exam) return;
  const copy = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(exam));
  // remove large UI-only fields if any
  const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(copy, null, 2)], {type:'application/json'});
  const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  const a = document.createElement('a');
  a.href = url;
  a.download = `${exam.id || 'mock_exam'}.json`;
  document.body.appendChild(a);
  a.click();
  a.remove();
  URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
}

// Review UI
function openReviewPanel(mode) {
  // mode: 'all' | 'flagged' | 'unanswered'
  const overlay = document.createElement('div');
  overlay.className = 'overlay';
  const modal = document.createElement('div');
  modal.className = 'result-modal';
  modal.innerHTML = `<h3>Review: ${mode}</h3>`;
  const list = document.createElement('div');
  list.style.maxHeight = '360px';
  list.style.overflow = 'auto';
  list.style.marginTop = '8px';

  const items = [];
  exam.questions.forEach((q, i) => {
    const flagged = exam.flagged[q.id];
    const answered = exam.answers[q.id] !== null;
    if(mode === 'flagged' && flagged) items.push({q,i});
    else if(mode === 'unanswered' && !answered) items.push({q,i});
    else if(mode === 'all') items.push({q,i});
  });

  if(items.length === 0) {
    list.innerHTML = '<div class="small-muted">No items</div>';
  } else {
    items.forEach(({q,i}) => {
      const row = document.createElement('div');
      row.style.padding = '8px';
      row.style.borderBottom = '1px solid rgba(11,99,183,0.04)';
      row.innerHTML = `<strong>Q${i+1}</strong> ${safeText(q.prompt)} <div class="small-muted">${q.topic}</div>`;
      row.addEventListener('click', () => {
        document.body.removeChild(overlay);
        jumpTo(i);
      });
      list.appendChild(row);
    });
  }

  modal.appendChild(list);

  const close = document.createElement('div');
  close.style.marginTop = '12px';
  close.style.display = 'flex';
  close.style.justifyContent = 'flex-end';
  close.innerHTML = `<button class="btn small">Close</button>`;
  close.querySelector('button').addEventListener('click', () => {
    document.body.removeChild(overlay);
  });
  modal.appendChild(close);

  overlay.appendChild(modal);
  document.body.appendChild(overlay);
}

// result modal
function showResultModal() {
  const root = el('#modal-root');
  root.innerHTML = '';
  const overlay = document.createElement('div');
  overlay.className = 'overlay';
  const modal = document.createElement('div');
  modal.className = 'result-modal';
  const r = exam.result || {};
  modal.innerHTML = `<h2>Exam Results</h2>
    <div style="margin-top:8px">
      <div><strong>Score:</strong> ${r.percent || 0}% (${r.correctCount || 0}/${r.total || 0})</div>
      <div style="margin-top:8px" class="small-muted">Submitted at: ${r.submittedAt}</div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:12px;display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end">
      <button class="btn" id="close-result">Close</button>
      <button class="btn primary" id="review-wrong">Review Wrong</button>
      <button class="btn small" id="export-result">Export Results</button>
    </div>
  `;
  overlay.appendChild(modal);
  root.appendChild(overlay);

  document.getElementById('close-result').addEventListener('click', () => {
    root.innerHTML = '';
  });
  document.getElementById('review-wrong').addEventListener('click', () => {
    root.innerHTML = '';
    openReviewPanel('all');
  });
  document.getElementById('export-result').addEventListener('click', () => {
    const res = { examId: exam.id, result: exam.result, answers: exam.answers };
    const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(res, null, 2)], {type:'application/json'});
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = url;
    a.download = `${exam.id}_result.json`;
    document.body.appendChild(a);
    a.click();
    a.remove();
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  });
}

// Keyboard shortcuts
function attachShortcuts() {
  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if(!exam || exam.submitted) return;
    const tag = e.target.tagName.toLowerCase();
    if(tag === 'input' || tag === 'textarea') return;
    const key = e.key.toLowerCase();
    if(['a','b','c','d'].includes(key)) {
      const idx = ['a','b','c','d'].indexOf(key);
      selectOption(idx);
      e.preventDefault();
      return;
    }
    if(key === 'n' || key === 'arrowright') { nextQBtn.click(); e.preventDefault(); return; }
    if(key === 'p' || key === 'arrowleft') { prevQBtn.click(); e.preventDefault(); return; }
    if(key === 'r') { randomQBtn.click(); e.preventDefault(); return; }
    if(key === 'b' || key === 'm') { bookmarkQBtn.click(); e.preventDefault(); return; }
    if(key === 'f') { flagQBtn.click(); e.preventDefault(); return; }
    if(key === 's') { submitBtn.click(); e.preventDefault(); return; }
  });
}

// Hook up UI
function wireUI() {
  generateBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const dur = parseInt(durationInput.value, 10) || 180;
    const questions = generateExam();
    exam = makeExamState(questions, dur);
    exam.startedAt = new Date().toISOString();
    exam.lastTickAt = Date.now();
    saveExam();
    renderQuestion();
    updateExamTimerUI();
    startTimerIfNeeded();
    examIdEl.textContent = exam.id;
    totalQEl.textContent = exam.questions.length;
  });

  resumeBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const saved = loadSavedExam();
    if(!saved) return alert('No saved exam found.');
    exam = saved;
    renderQuestion();
    updateExamTimerUI();
    startTimerIfNeeded();
  });

  clearExamBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    if(confirm('Clear saved exam?')) {
      clearSavedExam();
      alert('Saved exam cleared.');
      renderInitial();
    }
  });

  prevQBtn.addEventListener('click', prevQuestion);
  nextQBtn.addEventListener('click', nextQuestion);
  randomQBtn.addEventListener('click', randomQuestion);

  bookmarkQBtn.addEventListener('click', toggleBookmark);
  flagQBtn.addEventListener('click', toggleFlag);
  showCorrectQBtn.addEventListener('click', showCorrect);

  submitBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    if(!exam) return alert('No active exam');
    if(!confirm('Submit exam? You will not be able to change answers after submission.')) return;
    submitExam(false);
  });

  openReviewBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    if(!exam) return;
    openReviewPanel('all');
  });

  reviewFlaggedBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    if(!exam) return;
    openReviewPanel('flagged');
  });

  reviewUnansweredBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    if(!exam) return;
    openReviewPanel('unanswered');
  });

  exportBtn.addEventListener('click', exportExam);

  attachShortcuts();
  renderInitial();
}

// Initialize on DOM ready
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  wireUI();
});<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />
  <title>MedOne AI — Review</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/style.css">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/dark.css">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/responsive.css">

  <style>
    /* Review page layout */
    .review-wrap { max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto; display:grid; grid-template-columns:320px 1fr; gap:16px; align-items:start; }
    .panel { background:var(--surface); padding:14px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:var(--shadow); }
    .filters { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:8px; }
    .filter-row { display:flex; gap:8px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
    .search-box { display:flex; gap:8px; align-items:center; }
    .search-box input { padding:8px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid rgba(11,99,183,0.08); width:100% }
    .list { max-height:560px; overflow:auto; margin-top:8px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:6px; }
    .q-item { padding:8px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid rgba(11,99,183,0.04); display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:8px; cursor:pointer; }
    .q-item:hover { background:rgba(11,99,183,0.02); }
    .q-item .meta { font-size:13px;color:var(--muted) }
    .badges { display:flex; gap:6px; align-items:center; flex-wrap:wrap }
    .badge { padding:4px 6px;border-radius:6px;background:rgba(11,99,183,0.06); color:var(--accent-600); font-weight:600 }
    .detail { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:8px; }
    .option { padding:8px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid rgba(11,99,183,0.06); }
    .option.correct { outline:3px solid rgba(30,155,255,0.12) }
    .note { width:100%; min-height:80px; padding:8px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid rgba(11,99,183,0.06); resize:vertical }
    .filters .btn { width:100%; }
    .small-muted { font-size:13px;color:var(--muted) }
    @media (max-width: 980px) {
      .review-wrap { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <div id="app" class="app-layout">
    <aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
      <div class="brand">
        <div class="logo">M1</div>
        <h1>MedOne AI</h1>
      </div>
      <nav class="nav">
        <a href="index.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Dashboard</a>
        <a href="practice.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Practice</a>
        <a href="mock.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Mock Exams</a>
        <a href="review.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Review</a>
        <a href="analytics.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Analytics</a>
        <a href="settings.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Settings</a>
      </nav>
      <div class="sidebar-footer">
        <button id="collapse-btn-4" class="btn small">Toggle</button>
      </div>
    </aside>

    <div class="main">
      <header class="topbar">
        <div class="left">
          <button id="burger-4" class="burger" aria-label="Toggle menu">&#9776;</button>
          <div class="page-title">Review</div>
        </div>
        <div class="right">
          <div class="search">
            <input id="review-search" placeholder="Search review..." />
          </div>
          <button id="theme-toggle-4" class="icon-btn" title="Toggle dark mode">🌓</button>
          <a href="settings.html" class="icon-btn" title="Settings">⚙️</a>
        </div>
      </header>

      <main class="content" id="review-content">
        <div class="review-wrap">
          <div class="panel">
            <div class="filters">
              <div class="search-box">
                <input id="global-search" placeholder="Search question text, tags, notes..." />
                <button id="clear-search" class="btn small">Clear</button>
              </div>

              <div>
                <div class="small-muted">Quick filters</div>
                <div class="filter-row">
                  <button data-filter="all" class="btn">All</button>
                  <button data-filter="correct" class="btn">Correct</button>
                  <button data-filter="wrong" class="btn">Wrong</button>
                  <button data-filter="skipped" class="btn">Skipped</button>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div>
                <div class="small-muted">Flags / Bookmarks</div>
                <div class="filter-row">
                  <button data-filter="bookmarked" class="btn">Bookmarks</button>
                  <button data-filter="flagged" class="btn">Flagged</button>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div>
                <div class="small-muted">Annotations</div>
                <div class="filter-row">
                  <button data-filter="highYield" class="btn">High Yield</button>
                  <button data-filter="commonTrap" class="btn">Common Trap</button>
                  <button data-filter="hasNotes" class="btn">Has Notes</button>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div>
                <div class="small-muted">Source</div>
                <div class="filter-row">
                  <button data-filter="source:practice" class="btn">Practice</button>
                  <button data-filter="source:mock" class="btn">Mock</button>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div style="margin-top:6px">
                <div style="display:flex;gap:6px">
                  <button id="export-filtered" class="btn small">Export Filtered</button>
                  <button id="clear-annotations" class="btn small">Clear Annotations</button>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="small-muted" style="margin-top:8px">Results: <span id="result-count">0</span></div>

              <div class="list" id="question-list" role="list" aria-label="Review results"></div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="panel detail" id="detail-panel">
            <div id="detail-empty" class="small-muted">Select a question to view details, explanations and add annotations.</div>
            <div id="detail" style="display:none">
              <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center">
                <div>
                  <div class="small-muted" id="detail-source"></div>
                  <h3 id="detail-prompt"></h3>
                  <div class="small-muted" id="detail-tags"></div>
                </div>
                <div class="badges" id="detail-badges"></div>
              </div>

              <div id="detail-options"></div>

              <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center">
                <button id="detail-bookmark" class="btn small">☆ Bookmark</button>
                <button id="detail-flag" class="btn small">⚑ Flag</button>
                <button id="detail-show-correct" class="btn small">Show Correct</button>
                <button id="detail-toggle-expl" class="btn small">Toggle Explanation</button>
              </div>

              <div id="detail-explanation" class="explanation" style="display:none;margin-top:8px"></div>

              <div style="margin-top:8px">
                <label><input id="chk-high-yield" type="checkbox" /> High Yield</label>
                <label style="margin-left:12px"><input id="chk-common-trap" type="checkbox" /> Common Trap</label>
              </div>

              <div style="margin-top:8px">
                <div class="small-muted">Related Knowledge / Notes</div>
                <textarea id="detail-notes" class="note" placeholder="Add related knowledge, references, or mnemonic..."></textarea>
                <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:8px">
                  <button id="save-notes" class="btn small">Save</button>
                  <button id="clear-notes" class="btn small">Clear</button>
                </div>
              </div>

            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </main>

      <footer class="footer">
        <small>MedOne AI — Review</small>
      </footer>
    </div>
  </div>

  <script type="module" src="js/app.js"></script>
  <script type="module" src="js/storage.js"></script>
  <script type="module" src="js/utils.js"></script>
  <script type="module" src="js/review.js"></script>
</body>
</html>// js/review.js
import Storage from './storage.js';
import { el, els, safeText } from './utils.js';

const QUESTIONS_PATH = 'data/questions.json';
const PRACTICE_PROGRESS_KEY = 'questionEngineProgress_v1'; // where practice stores progress
const MOCK_KEY = 'mockExam_v1'; // mock exam key
const ANNOTATIONS_KEY = 'review.annotations';

// page elements
const questionListEl = el('#question-list');
const resultCountEl = el('#result-count');
const searchInput = el('#global-search');
const clearSearchBtn = el('#clear-search');

const detailPanel = el('#detail');
const detailEmpty = el('#detail-empty');
const detailPrompt = el('#detail-prompt');
const detailSource = el('#detail-source');
const detailTags = el('#detail-tags');
const detailBadges = el('#detail-badges');
const detailOptions = el('#detail-options');
const detailBookmark = el('#detail-bookmark');
const detailFlag = el('#detail-flag');
const detailShowCorrect = el('#detail-show-correct');
const detailToggleExpl = el('#detail-toggle-expl');
const detailExplanation = el('#detail-explanation');
const chkHighYield = el('#chk-high-yield');
const chkCommonTrap = el('#chk-common-trap');
const detailNotes = el('#detail-notes');
const saveNotesBtn = el('#save-notes');
const clearNotesBtn = el('#clear-notes');

const filterButtons = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[data-filter]'));
const exportBtn = el('#export-filtered');
const clearAnnotationsBtn = el('#clear-annotations');

let questionBank = []; // loaded questions.json
let questionMap = {}; // id -> question data (from bank or mock)
let items = []; // unified list of items to display
let annotations = {}; // read from Storage
let currentFilter = 'all';
let currentQuery = '';
let selectedId = null;

// Utility to attempt loading questions.json, with fallback file input
async function loadQuestionBank() {
  try {
    const resp = await fetch(QUESTIONS_PATH, {cache: "no-store"});
    if (!resp.ok) throw new Error('Fetch failed');
    const json = await resp.json();
    if (!Array.isArray(json)) throw new Error('Invalid JSON');
    questionBank = json;
    buildQuestionMapFromBank();
  } catch (err) {
    // show file input fallback in left panel
    const loader = document.getElementById('question-list');
    loader.innerHTML = '';
    const msg = document.createElement('div');
    msg.className = 'small-muted';
    msg.textContent = `Unable to load ${QUESTIONS_PATH}. If you used practice questions from a custom file, load it here.`;
    const input = document.createElement('input');
    input.type = 'file';
    input.accept = 'application/json';
    input.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
      const f = e.target.files[0];
      if(!f) return;
      const reader = new FileReader();
      reader.onload = (ev) => {
        try {
          const parsed = JSON.parse(ev.target.result);
          if(!Array.isArray(parsed)) throw new Error('JSON must be an array of questions.');
          questionBank = parsed;
          buildQuestionMapFromBank();
          buildUnifiedItems();
          renderList();
        } catch (ex) {
          alert('Invalid JSON: ' + ex.message);
        }
      };
      reader.readAsText(f);
    });
    loader.appendChild(msg);
    loader.appendChild(input);
  }
}

function buildQuestionMapFromBank() {
  questionMap = {};
  questionBank.forEach(q => {
    questionMap[q.id] = q;
  });
}

// Load stored data (practice progress and mock exam) and build a unified items array
function buildUnifiedItems() {
  annotations = Storage.dataGet(ANNOTATIONS_KEY, {}) || {};
  items = [];

  // Load practice progress
  const practice = Storage.dataGet(PRACTICE_PROGRESS_KEY, null);
  if(practice && practice.questionsMap) {
    for(const [qid, qstate] of Object.entries(practice.questionsMap)) {
      const q = questionMap[qid] || { id: qid, prompt: `Question ${qid} (source: practice)`, options: [], correctIndex: null, explanation: '' };
      items.push({
        id: qid,
        prompt: q.prompt,
        options: q.options || [],
        correctIndex: q.correctIndex,
        explanation: q.explanation || '',
        tags: q.tags || [],
        source: 'practice',
        difficulty: q.difficulty || '',
        selectedIndex: qstate.selectedIndex,
        flagged: !!qstate.flagged,
        bookmarked: !!qstate.bookmarked,
        timeSpent: qstate.timeSpent || 0,
        annotation: annotations[qid] || { highYield:false, commonTrap:false, notes: '' }
      });
    }
  }

  // Load mock exam
  const mock = Storage.dataGet(MOCK_KEY, null);
  if(mock && Array.isArray(mock.questions)) {
    mock.questions.forEach(q => {
      items.push({
        id: q.id,
        prompt: q.prompt,
        options: q.options || [],
        correctIndex: q.correctIndex,
        explanation: q.explanation || '',
        tags: q.topic ? [q.topic] : (q.tags || []),
        source: 'mock',
        difficulty: q.difficulty || '',
        selectedIndex: (mock.answers && mock.answers[q.id] !== undefined) ? mock.answers[q.id] : null,
        flagged: (mock.flagged && mock.flagged[q.id]) || false,
        bookmarked: (mock.bookmarked && mock.bookmarked[q.id]) || false,
        timeSpent: (mock.timeSpent && mock.timeSpent[q.id]) || 0,
        annotation: annotations[q.id] || { highYield:false, commonTrap:false, notes: '' }
      });
    });
  }

  // For any standalone questions in questionBank not covered, optionally include (commented out)
  // questionBank.forEach(q => {
  //   if(!items.some(it => it.id === q.id)) {
  //     items.push({...});
  //   }
  // });

  // Sort by source then id by default
  items.sort((a,b) => {
    if(a.source === b.source) return a.id.localeCompare(b.id);
    return a.source.localeCompare(b.source);
  });
}

function computeStatus(item) {
  // Correct / Wrong / Skipped
  if(item.selectedIndex === null || item.selectedIndex === undefined) return 'skipped';
  if(item.correctIndex === null || item.correctIndex === undefined) return 'unknown';
  return (item.selectedIndex === item.correctIndex) ? 'correct' : 'wrong';
}

// Rendering list based on current filter and query
function renderList() {
  const q = (currentQuery || '').trim().toLowerCase();
  const filtered = items.filter(item => {
    // filter by currentFilter
    switch(currentFilter) {
      case 'all': break;
      case 'correct': if(computeStatus(item) !== 'correct') return false; break;
      case 'wrong': if(computeStatus(item) !== 'wrong') return false; break;
      case 'skipped': if(computeStatus(item) !== 'skipped') return false; break;
      case 'bookmarked': if(!item.bookmarked) return false; break;
      case 'flagged': if(!item.flagged) return false; break;
      case 'highYield': if(!(item.annotation && item.annotation.highYield)) return false; break;
      case 'commonTrap': if(!(item.annotation && item.annotation.commonTrap)) return false; break;
      case 'hasNotes': if(!(item.annotation && item.annotation.notes && item.annotation.notes.trim().length>0)) return false; break;
      default:
        if(currentFilter.startsWith('source:')) {
          const src = currentFilter.split(':')[1];
          if(item.source !== src) return false;
        }
    }
    // search query (prompt, tags, notes)
    if(q) {
      const hay = (item.prompt + ' ' + (item.tags || []).join(' ') + ' ' + (item.annotation && item.annotation.notes || '')).toLowerCase();
      if(!hay.includes(q)) return false;
    }
    return true;
  });

  questionListEl.innerHTML = '';
  if(filtered.length === 0) {
    questionListEl.innerHTML = '<div class="small-muted">No questions found for this filter/search.</div>';
  } else {
    filtered.forEach((it, idx) => {
      const row = document.createElement('div');
      row.className = 'q-item';
      row.dataset.id = it.id;
      row.tabIndex = 0;
      const status = computeStatus(it);
      const left = document.createElement('div');
      left.style.flex = '1';
      left.innerHTML = `<div style="font-weight:700">${safeText(truncate(it.prompt, 120))}</div>
                        <div class="meta">${safeText(it.tags ? it.tags.join(', ') : '')} • ${it.source} • ${it.difficulty || ''}</div>`;

      const right = document.createElement('div');
      right.style.display = 'flex';
      right.style.flexDirection = 'column';
      right.style.alignItems = 'flex-end';
      right.style.gap = '6px';
      const badges = document.createElement('div');
      badges.className = 'badges';
      if(status === 'correct') {
        const b = makeBadge('Correct', '#0e9f6e'); badges.appendChild(b);
      } else if(status === 'wrong') {
        const b = makeBadge('Wrong', '#d9534f'); badges.appendChild(b);
      } else {
        const b = makeBadge('Skipped', 'var(--muted)'); badges.appendChild(b);
      }
      if(it.bookmarked) badges.appendChild(makeBadge('★', 'gold'));
      if(it.flagged) badges.appendChild(makeBadge('⚑', 'orange'));
      if(it.annotation && it.annotation.highYield) badges.appendChild(makeBadge('High Yield', 'var(--accent-600)'));
      if(it.annotation && it.annotation.commonTrap) badges.appendChild(makeBadge('Trap', 'crimson'));
      right.appendChild(badges);
      right.appendChild(document.createElement('div'));
      row.appendChild(left);
      row.appendChild(right);

      row.addEventListener('click', () => {
        openDetail(it.id);
      });

      row.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
        if(e.key === 'Enter') openDetail(it.id);
      });

      questionListEl.appendChild(row);
    });
  }
  resultCountEl.textContent = filtered.length;
}

// helpers
function makeBadge(text, color) {
  const b = document.createElement('span');
  b.className = 'badge';
  b.textContent = text;
  if(color) b.style.background = 'rgba(11,99,183,0.06)';
  return b;
}
function truncate(s, n) {
  if(!s) return '';
  return s.length > n ? s.slice(0,n) + '…' : s;
}

// Detail view
function openDetail(id) {
  selectedId = id;
  const item = items.find(it => it.id === id);
  if(!item) return;
  detailEmpty.style.display = 'none';
  detailPanel.style.display = '';
  detailPrompt.textContent = item.prompt;
  detailSource.textContent = `Source: ${item.source} • ${item.id}`;
  detailTags.textContent = (item.tags || []).join(', ');
  detailBadges.innerHTML = '';
  const status = computeStatus(item);
  detailBadges.appendChild(makeBadge(status.toUpperCase(), ''));
  if(item.bookmarked) detailBadges.appendChild(makeBadge('★', 'gold'));
  if(item.flagged) detailBadges.appendChild(makeBadge('⚑', 'orange'));
  if(item.annotation && item.annotation.highYield) detailBadges.appendChild(makeBadge('High Yield',''));
  if(item.annotation && item.annotation.commonTrap) detailBadges.appendChild(makeBadge('Common Trap',''));

  // render options, highlight selected and correct
  detailOptions.innerHTML = '';
  (item.options || []).forEach((opt, i) => {
    const d = document.createElement('div');
    d.className = 'option';
    if(item.selectedIndex !== null && item.selectedIndex === i) d.style.fontWeight = '700';
    if(item.correctIndex !== null && item.correctIndex === i) d.classList.add('correct');
    d.innerHTML = `<strong>${String.fromCharCode(65+i)}</strong> ${safeText(opt)}`;
    detailOptions.appendChild(d);
  });

  // toggle bookmark/flag button text
  detailBookmark.textContent = item.bookmarked ? '★ Bookmarked' : '☆ Bookmark';
  detailFlag.textContent = item.flagged ? '⚑ Flagged' : '⚑ Flag';

  // explanation hidden initially
  detailExplanation.style.display = 'none';
  detailExplanation.innerHTML = `<strong>Explanation</strong><div style="margin-top:8px">${safeText(item.explanation || '')}</div>`;

  // annotations
  chkHighYield.checked = !!(item.annotation && item.annotation.highYield);
  chkCommonTrap.checked = !!(item.annotation && item.annotation.commonTrap);
  detailNotes.value = (item.annotation && item.annotation.notes) || '';

  // wire detail actions
  detailBookmark.onclick = () => {
    toggleBookmarkForItem(item.id);
    openDetail(item.id); // re-render
    renderList();
  };
  detailFlag.onclick = () => {
    toggleFlagForItem(item.id);
    openDetail(item.id);
    renderList();
  };
  detailShowCorrect.onclick = () => {
    // reveal correct option by highlighting
    Array.from(detailOptions.children).forEach((c, idx) => {
      c.style.background = '';
      if(item.correctIndex === idx) c.style.outline = '3px solid rgba(30,155,255,0.12)';
    });
  };
  detailToggleExpl.onclick = () => {
    detailExplanation.style.display = detailExplanation.style.display === 'none' ? '' : 'none';
  };
  saveNotesBtn.onclick = () => {
    saveAnnotationForItem(item.id);
    renderList();
  };
  clearNotesBtn.onclick = () => {
    if(confirm('Clear notes and annotations for this question?')) {
      annotations[item.id] = { highYield:false, commonTrap:false, notes: '' };
      Storage.dataSet(ANNOTATIONS_KEY, annotations);
      // also update items
      const it = items.find(x => x.id === item.id);
      if(it) { it.annotation = annotations[item.id]; }
      openDetail(item.id);
      renderList();
    }
  };
}

// Toggle bookmark/flag for item and persist both in annotation and source storage if applicable
function toggleBookmarkForItem(id) {
  // update in annotations and in source if found
  const it = items.find(x => x.id === id);
  if(!it) return;
  it.bookmarked = !it.bookmarked;
  // If source is practice or mock, update their storages
  if(it.source === 'practice') {
    const practice = Storage.dataGet(PRACTICE_PROGRESS_KEY, null);
    if(practice && practice.questionsMap && practice.questionsMap[id]) {
      practice.questionsMap[id].bookmarked = !!it.bookmarked;
      Storage.dataSet(PRACTICE_PROGRESS_KEY, practice);
    }
  } else if(it.source === 'mock') {
    const mock = Storage.dataGet(MOCK_KEY, null);
    if(mock && mock.bookmarked) {
      mock.bookmarked[id] = !!it.bookmarked;
      Storage.dataSet(MOCK_KEY, mock);
    }
  }
  // Save into annotations too (for UI convenience)
  annotations[id] = annotations[id] || { highYield:false, commonTrap:false, notes: '' };
  // optionally keep bookmarked in annotation object for easy filtering
  annotations[id]._bookmarked = !!it.bookmarked;
  Storage.dataSet(ANNOTATIONS_KEY, annotations);
}

function toggleFlagForItem(id) {
  const it = items.find(x => x.id === id);
  if(!it) return;
  it.flagged = !it.flagged;
  if(it.source === 'practice') {
    const practice = Storage.dataGet(PRACTICE_PROGRESS_KEY, null);
    if(practice && practice.questionsMap && practice.questionsMap[id]) {
      practice.questionsMap[id].flagged = !!it.flagged;
      Storage.dataSet(PRACTICE_PROGRESS_KEY, practice);
    }
  } else if(it.source === 'mock') {
    const mock = Storage.dataGet(MOCK_KEY, null);
    if(mock && mock.flagged) {
      mock.flagged[id] = !!it.flagged;
      Storage.dataSet(MOCK_KEY, mock);
    }
  }
  annotations[id] = annotations[id] || { highYield:false, commonTrap:false, notes: '' };
  annotations[id]._flagged = !!it.flagged;
  Storage.dataSet(ANNOTATIONS_KEY, annotations);
}

function saveAnnotationForItem(id) {
  const it = items.find(x => x.id === id);
  if(!it) return;
  annotations[id] = annotations[id] || { highYield:false, commonTrap:false, notes: '' };
  annotations[id].highYield = !!chkHighYield.checked;
  annotations[id].commonTrap = !!chkCommonTrap.checked;
  annotations[id].notes = detailNotes.value || '';
  // reflect in items
  it.annotation = annotations[id];
  Storage.dataSet(ANNOTATIONS_KEY, annotations);
  alert('Annotation saved.');
}

// Filters and search wiring
function attachFilterHandlers() {
  filterButtons.forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const f = btn.dataset.filter;
      currentFilter = f;
      renderList();
    });
  });

  searchInput.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
    currentQuery = e.target.value;
    renderList();
  });
  clearSearchBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    searchInput.value = '';
    currentQuery = '';
    renderList();
  });

  // keyboard focus for search using '/'
  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if(e.key === '/') { e.preventDefault(); searchInput.focus(); }
  });

  exportBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    // export filtered items
    const q = (currentQuery || '').trim().toLowerCase();
    const filtered = Array.from(items).filter(item => {
      // same filter logic as renderList
      switch(currentFilter) {
        case 'all': break;
        case 'correct': if(computeStatus(item) !== 'correct') return false; break;
        case 'wrong': if(computeStatus(item) !== 'wrong') return false; break;
        case 'skipped': if(computeStatus(item) !== 'skipped') return false; break;
        case 'bookmarked': if(!item.bookmarked) return false; break;
        case 'flagged': if(!item.flagged) return false; break;
        case 'highYield': if(!(item.annotation && item.annotation.highYield)) return false; break;
        case 'commonTrap': if(!(item.annotation && item.annotation.commonTrap)) return false; break;
        case 'hasNotes': if(!(item.annotation && item.annotation.notes && item.annotation.notes.trim().length>0)) return false; break;
        default:
          if(currentFilter.startsWith('source:')) {
            const src = currentFilter.split(':')[1];
            if(item.source !== src) return false;
          }
      }
      if(q) {
        const hay = (item.prompt + ' ' + (item.tags || []).join(' ') + ' ' + (item.annotation && item.annotation.notes || '')).toLowerCase();
        if(!hay.includes(q)) return false;
      }
      return true;
    });
    const out = filtered.map(it => ({
      id: it.id, prompt: it.prompt, source: it.source, status: computeStatus(it), bookmarked: it.bookmarked, flagged: it.flagged, annotation: it.annotation
    }));
    const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(out, null, 2)], { type: 'application/json' });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = url;
    a.download = `review_export_${Date.now()}.json`;
    document.body.appendChild(a);
    a.click();
    a.remove();
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  });

  clearAnnotationsBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    if(confirm('Clear all review annotations (High Yield / Common Trap / Notes)? This will not unflag/unbookmark questions in original storages.')) {
      Storage.dataSet(ANNOTATIONS_KEY, {});
      annotations = {};
      // update items
      items.forEach(it => it.annotation = { highYield:false, commonTrap:false, notes: '' });
      renderList();
      if(selectedId) openDetail(selectedId);
    }
  });
}

// initial load and setup
async function init() {
  await loadQuestionBank();
  buildUnifiedItems();
  renderList();
  attachFilterHandlers();
}

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />
  <title>MedOne AI — Analytics</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/style.css">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/dark.css">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/responsive.css">

  <style>
    .analytics-grid { max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto; display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 420px; gap:16px; align-items:start; }
    .panel { background:var(--surface); padding:14px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:var(--shadow); }
    .chart-wrap { height:260px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; }
    .small-muted { font-size:13px; color:var(--muted) }
    .stat-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:10px; margin-bottom:12px }
    .stat { padding:12px; border-radius:8px; background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(11,99,183,0.03), transparent); text-align:center }
    .stat strong { display:block; font-size:20px; color:var(--accent-600) }
    @media (max-width: 980px) {
      .analytics-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <div id="app" class="app-layout">
    <aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
      <div class="brand">
        <div class="logo">M1</div>
        <h1>MedOne AI</h1>
      </div>
      <nav class="nav">
        <a href="index.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Dashboard</a>
        <a href="practice.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Practice</a>
        <a href="mock.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Mock Exams</a>
        <a href="review.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Review</a>
        <a href="analytics.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Analytics</a>
        <a href="settings.html" class="nav-link" data-route>Settings</a>
      </nav>
      <div class="sidebar-footer">
        <button id="collapse-btn-5" class="btn small">Toggle</button>
      </div>
    </aside>

    <div class="main">
      <header class="topbar">
        <div class="left">
          <button id="burger-5" class="burger" aria-label="Toggle menu">&#9776;</button>
          <div class="page-title">Analytics</div>
        </div>
        <div class="right">
          <div class="search">
            <input id="analytics-search" placeholder="Search subjects..." />
          </div>
          <button id="theme-toggle-5" class="icon-btn" title="Toggle dark mode">🌓</button>
          <a href="settings.html" class="icon-btn" title="Settings">⚙️</a>
        </div>
      </header>

      <main class="content" id="analytics-content">
        <div class="analytics-grid">

          <div>
            <div class="panel">
              <h3>Overview</h3>
              <div class="stat-grid" id="overview-stats">
                <div class="stat">
                  <small class="small-muted">Overall Accuracy</small>
                  <strong id="stat-accuracy">—%</strong>
                </div>
                <div class="stat">
                  <small class="small-muted">Practice Time Today</small>
                  <strong id="stat-today">—m</strong>
                </div>
                <div class="stat">
                  <small class="small-muted">Mock Attempts</small>
                  <strong id="stat-mocks">—</strong>
                </div>
              </div>
              <p class="small-muted">All metrics are computed from LocalStorage (practice progress, mock exams, dashboard data).</p>
            </div>

            <div class="panel" style="margin-top:12px;">
              <h3>Accuracy by Subject</h3>
              <div class="chart-wrap">
                <canvas id="subject-accuracy-chart" style="width:100%;height:100%"></canvas>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="panel" style="margin-top:12px;">
              <h3>Accuracy by Difficulty</h3>
              <div class="chart-wrap">
                <canvas id="difficulty-pie-chart" style="width:100%;height:100%"></canvas>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="panel" style="margin-top:12px;">
              <h3>Line Chart — Recent Scores</h3>
              <div class="chart-wrap">
                <canvas id="scores-line-chart" style="width:100%;height:100%"></canvas>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <aside>
            <div class="panel">
              <h3>Practice Activity</h3>
              <div style="margin-top:10px">
                <small class="small-muted">Daily practice (last 7 days)</small>
                <div class="chart-wrap" style="height:180px">
                  <canvas id="daily-practice-chart" style="width:100%;height:100%"></canvas>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div style="margin-top:12px">
                <small class="small-muted">Weekly practice (last 12 weeks)</small>
                <div class="chart-wrap" style="height:180px">
                  <canvas id="weekly-practice-chart" style="width:100%;height:100%"></canvas>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="panel" style="margin-top:12px">
              <h3>Subjects — Weakest / Strongest</h3>
              <div style="margin-top:8px">
                <small class="small-muted">Weakest Subjects</small>
                <div class="chart-wrap" style="height:160px">
                  <canvas id="weakest-chart"></canvas>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div style="margin-top:10px">
                <small class="small-muted">Strongest Subjects</small>
                <div class="chart-wrap" style="height:160px">
                  <canvas id="strongest-chart"></canvas>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="panel" style="margin-top:12px">
              <h3>Radar — Subject Profile</h3>
              <div class="chart-wrap" style="height:240px">
                <canvas id="radar-chart"></canvas>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="panel" style="margin-top:12px">
              <h3>Difficulty Distribution</h3>
              <div class="chart-wrap" style="height:160px">
                <canvas id="difficulty-dist-pie"></canvas>
              </div>
            </div>

          </aside>

        </div>
      </main>

      <footer class="footer">
        <small>MedOne AI — Analytics</small>
      </footer>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Load Chart.js from CDN with a local fallback -->
  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js"></script>
  <script>
    // fallback: if Chart is undefined try local asset
    if(typeof Chart === 'undefined') {
      const s = document.createElement('script');
      s.src = 'assets/chart.min.js';
      s.onload = () => console.log('Loaded local Chart.js fallback');
      s.onerror = () => console.warn('Chart.js not available (CDN and local fallback failed). Charts will not render.');
      document.head.appendChild(s);
    }
  </script>

  <script type="module" src="js/analytics.js"></script>
</body>
</html>// js/analytics.js
import Storage from './storage.js';

// Chart instances (to destroy when re-rendering)
let charts = {};

function destroyAllCharts() {
  Object.values(charts).forEach(ch => {
    try { ch.destroy(); } catch (e) {}
  });
  charts = {};
}

// Helpers
function el(id) { return document.getElementById(id); }
function safeNumber(n) { return isFinite(n) ? n : 0; }

function getDashboard() {
  return Storage.dataGet('dashboard') || {};
}

function getPracticeProgress() {
  // returns object stored under 'questionEngineProgress_v1' or null
  return Storage.dataGet('questionEngineProgress_v1') || null;
}

function getMockExam() {
  return Storage.dataGet('mockExam_v1') || null;
}

// Attempt to load question bank for metadata (subject/difficulty) — optional
async function loadQuestionBank() {
  try {
    const resp = await fetch('data/questions.json', {cache:'no-store'});
    if(!resp.ok) throw new Error('no bank');
    const j = await resp.json();
    const map = {};
    j.forEach(q => { map[q.id] = q; });
    return map;
  } catch (e) {
    return {}; // empty map
  }
}

// Compute subject and difficulty accuracy from available data
async function computeAccuracies() {
  const qBank = await loadQuestionBank();
  const mock = getMockExam();
  const practice = getPracticeProgress();

  const subjectStats = {}; // subject -> {correct, total}
  const difficultyStats = {}; // diff -> {correct, total}
  const difficultyDist = {}; // diff -> count
  const scoreSeries = []; // from dashboard.recentScores

  // from mock exam
  if(mock && Array.isArray(mock.questions)) {
    mock.questions.forEach(q => {
      const subj = q.topic || (q.tags && q.tags[0]) || 'Unknown';
      const diff = q.difficulty || 'Unknown';
      const answered = (mock.answers && (mock.answers[q.id] !== null && mock.answers[q.id] !== undefined));
      const selected = answered ? mock.answers[q.id] : null;
      const correct = (selected !== null && selected === q.correctIndex) ? 1 : 0;
      if(!subjectStats[subj]) subjectStats[subj] = {correct:0,total:0};
      subjectStats[subj].correct += correct;
      subjectStats[subj].total += 1;
      if(!difficultyStats[diff]) difficultyStats[diff] = {correct:0,total:0};
      difficultyStats[diff].correct += correct;
      difficultyStats[diff].total += 1;
      difficultyDist[diff] = (difficultyDist[diff]||0) + 1;
    });
  }

  // from practice progress: we need to map question IDs to subject/difficulty via question bank if possible
  if(practice && practice.questionsMap) {
    for(const [qid, qstate] of Object.entries(practice.questionsMap)) {
      const bankMeta = qBank[qid];
      const subj = (bankMeta && (bankMeta.tags && bankMeta.tags[0])) || (bankMeta && bankMeta.topic) || 'Unknown';
      const diff = (bankMeta && bankMeta.difficulty) || 'Unknown';
      const selected = qstate.selectedIndex;
      const correct = (bankMeta && selected !== null && bankMeta.correctIndex === selected) ? 1 : 0;
      // Only count if bankMeta available and correctIndex present; otherwise skip accuracy calculation
      if(bankMeta && bankMeta.correctIndex !== undefined) {
        if(!subjectStats[subj]) subjectStats[subj] = {correct:0,total:0};
        subjectStats[subj].correct += correct;
        subjectStats[subj].total += 1;
        if(!difficultyStats[diff]) difficultyStats[diff] = {correct:0,total:0};
        difficultyStats[diff].correct += correct;
        difficultyStats[diff].total += 1;
      }
      difficultyDist[diff] = (difficultyDist[diff]||0) + 1;
    }
  }

  // Dashboard recent scores (line)
  const dashboard = getDashboard();
  if(dashboard && Array.isArray(dashboard.recentScores)) {
    dashboard.recentScores.forEach(s => {
      // expect {date,score}
      if(s && s.date && typeof s.score === 'number') {
        scoreSeries.push({date:s.date,score:s.score});
      }
    });
    // sort by date
    scoreSeries.sort((a,b) => new Date(a.date) - new Date(b.date));
  }

  // Build percent maps
  const subjectPercent = {};
  for(const [subj, st] of Object.entries(subjectStats)) {
    subjectPercent[subj] = st.total > 0 ? Math.round((st.correct / st.total) * 100) : null;
  }
  const difficultyPercent = {};
  for(const [d, s] of Object.entries(difficultyStats)) {
    difficultyPercent[d] = s.total > 0 ? Math.round((s.correct / s.total) * 100) : null;
  }

  return { subjectPercent, difficultyPercent, scoreSeries, difficultyDist };
}

// Build daily/weekly practice series from dashboard or fallback
function buildPracticeTimeSeries() {
  const dashboard = getDashboard();

  // Try to read a daily history if present under dashboard.practiceHistory (expected: array of {date:'2026-06-01', minutes: 12})
  const practiceHistory = dashboard.practiceHistory || null;
  if(Array.isArray(practiceHistory) && practiceHistory.length > 0) {
    // take last 14 days
    const sorted = practiceHistory.sort((a,b) => new Date(a.date) - new Date(b.date));
    const last7 = sorted.slice(-7);
    return {
      daily: last7.map(d => ({date: d.date, minutes: d.minutes})),
      weekly: aggregateWeekly(sorted)
    };
  }

  // fallback: use dashboard.todaysProgressMinutes as today's value and fill others with zeros
  const todayMinutes = dashboard.todaysProgressMinutes || 0;
  const days = [];
  for(let i=6;i>=0;i--){
    const dt = new Date(); dt.setDate(dt.getDate() - i);
    const label = dt.toISOString().split('T')[0];
    days.push({date: label, minutes: (i===0 ? todayMinutes : 0)});
  }
  // weekly: create 12-week array with mostly zeros except current week
  const weeks = [];
  for(let w = 11; w >= 0; w--) {
    weeks.push({week: `W-${w}`, minutes: (w === 0 ? todayMinutes : 0)});
  }
  return { daily: days, weekly: weeks };
}

function aggregateWeekly(sortedHistory) {
  // Input: sorted array of {date, minutes}
  const weeks = {};
  sortedHistory.forEach(d => {
    const dt = new Date(d.date);
    // ISO week year-week
    const weekKey = getWeekKey(dt);
    weeks[weekKey] = (weeks[weekKey] || 0) + (d.minutes || 0);
  });
  const arr = Object.entries(weeks).map(([wk, mins]) => ({week:wk, minutes: mins}));
  arr.sort((a,b) => a.week.localeCompare(b.week));
  return arr.slice(-12);
}
function getWeekKey(dt) {
  const year = dt.getFullYear();
  const oneJan = new Date(year,0,1);
  const days = Math.floor((dt - oneJan) / (24*60*60*1000));
  const weekNum = Math.ceil((days + oneJan.getDay()+1)/7);
  return `${year}-W${String(weekNum).padStart(2,'0')}`;
}

// Draw charts
async function renderCharts() {
  // Wait until Chart is available
  if(typeof Chart === 'undefined') {
    console.warn('Chart.js not loaded; retrying in 300ms');
    setTimeout(renderCharts, 300);
    return;
  }

  destroyAllCharts();

  const { subjectPercent, difficultyPercent, scoreSeries, difficultyDist } = await computeAccuracies();
  const practiceSeries = buildPracticeTimeSeries();

  // Overview stats
  const overallAccuracy = computeOverallAccuracy(subjectPercent);
  el('stat-accuracy').textContent = overallAccuracy !== null ? `${overallAccuracy}%` : '—';
  const dashboard = getDashboard();
  el('stat-today').textContent = (dashboard.todaysProgressMinutes || 0) + 'm';
  const mock = getMockExam();
  el('stat-mocks').textContent = mock ? 1 : 0;

  // Subject accuracy bar
  const subjects = Object.keys(subjectPercent);
  const subjValues = subjects.map(s => subjectPercent[s] !== null ? subjectPercent[s] : 0);
  const subjectCtx = el('subject-accuracy-chart').getContext('2d');
  charts.subject = new Chart(subjectCtx, {
    type: 'bar',
    data: { labels: subjects, datasets: [{ label:'Accuracy %', data: subjValues, backgroundColor: subjects.map(()=>getGradient(subjectCtx)) }] },
    options: { responsive:true, maintainAspectRatio:false, scales:{ y: { beginAtZero:true, max:100 } } }
  });
  charts.subjects = charts.subject;

  // Difficulty pie
  const diffs = Object.keys(difficultyPercent);
  const diffVals = diffs.map(d => difficultyPercent[d] !== null ? difficultyPercent[d] : 0);
  const difficultyCtx = el('difficulty-pie-chart').getContext('2d');
  charts.difficulty = new Chart(difficultyCtx, {
    type: 'doughnut',
    data: { labels: diffs, datasets: [{ data: diffVals, backgroundColor: generateColors(diffs.length) }] },
    options: { responsive:true, maintainAspectRatio:false }
  });

  // Recent scores line (from dashboard.recentScores)
  const scoreLabels = scoreSeries.map(s => s.date);
  const scoreVals = scoreSeries.map(s => s.score);
  const scoresCtx = el('scores-line-chart').getContext('2d');
  charts.scores = new Chart(scoresCtx, {
    type: 'line',
    data: { labels: scoreLabels, datasets: [{ label:'Score %', data: scoreVals, borderColor:'#0b63b7', backgroundColor:'rgba(11,99,183,0.08)', tension:0.2 }] },
    options: { responsive:true, maintainAspectRatio:false, scales:{ y:{ beginAtZero:true, max:100 } } }
  });

  // Daily practice bar
  const dailyLabels = practiceSeries.daily.map(d => d.date);
  const dailyVals = practiceSeries.daily.map(d => d.minutes);
  const dailyCtx = el('daily-practice-chart').getContext('2d');
  charts.daily = new Chart(dailyCtx, {
    type: 'bar',
    data: { labels: dailyLabels, datasets: [{ label:'Minutes', data: dailyVals, backgroundColor: generateColors(dailyLabels.length) }] },
    options: { responsive:true, maintainAspectRatio:false, scales:{ y:{ beginAtZero:true } } }
  });

  // Weekly practice line
  const weeklyLabels = practiceSeries.weekly.map(w => w.week || w.date);
  const weeklyVals = practiceSeries.weekly.map(w => w.minutes);
  const weeklyCtx = el('weekly-practice-chart').getContext('2d');
  charts.weekly = new Chart(weeklyCtx, {
    type: 'line',
    data: { labels: weeklyLabels, datasets: [{ label:'Minutes / week', data: weeklyVals, borderColor:'#065a9f', backgroundColor:'rgba(6,90,159,0.06)', tension:0.2 }] },
    options: { responsive:true, maintainAspectRatio:false, scales:{ y:{ beginAtZero:true } } }
  });

  // Weakest / Strongest subjects
  const subjPairs = Object.entries(subjectPercent).map(([k,v]) => ({k,v: (v===null?0:v)}));
  subjPairs.sort((a,b) => a.v - b.v);
  const weakest = subjPairs.slice(0,6);
  const strongest = subjPairs.slice(-6).reverse();

  const weakestCtx = el('weakest-chart').getContext('2d');
  charts.weakest = new Chart(weakestCtx, {
    type: 'bar',
    data: { labels: weakest.map(x => x.k), datasets: [{ label:'Accuracy', data: weakest.map(x=>x.v), backgroundColor:'#d9534f' }] },
    options: { indexAxis:'y', responsive:true, maintainAspectRatio:false, scales:{ x:{ beginAtZero:true, max:100 } } }
  });

  const strongestCtx = el('strongest-chart').getContext('2d');
  charts.strongest = new Chart(strongestCtx, {
    type: 'bar',
    data: { labels: strongest.map(x => x.k), datasets: [{ label:'Accuracy', data: strongest.map(x=>x.v), backgroundColor:'#0e9f6e' }] },
    options: { indexAxis:'y', responsive:true, maintainAspectRatio:false, scales:{ x:{ beginAtZero:true, max:100 } } }
  });

  // Radar chart subjects
  const radarCtx = el('radar-chart').getContext('2d');
  charts.radar = new Chart(radarCtx, {
    type: 'radar',
    data: {
      labels: subjects,
      datasets: [{ label:'Subject accuracy', data: subjValues, backgroundColor:'rgba(30,155,255,0.12)', borderColor:'#1e9bff', pointBackgroundColor:'#0b63b7' }]
    },
    options: { responsive:true, maintainAspectRatio:false, scales:{ r:{ min:0, max:100 } } }
  });

  // Difficulty distribution pie
  const ddLabels = Object.keys(difficultyDist);
  const ddVals = Object.values(difficultyDist);
  const ddCtx = el('difficulty-dist-pie').getContext('2d');
  charts.difficultyDist = new Chart(ddCtx, {
    type: 'pie',
    data: { labels: ddLabels, datasets: [{ data: ddVals, backgroundColor: generateColors(ddLabels.length) }] },
    options: { responsive:true, maintainAspectRatio:false }
  });
}

function computeOverallAccuracy(subjectPercent) {
  const vals = Object.values(subjectPercent).filter(v => v !== null && v !== undefined);
  if(vals.length === 0) return null;
  const avg = Math.round(vals.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0) / vals.length);
  return avg;
}

function getGradient(ctx) {
  try {
    const g = ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,ctx.canvas.width,0);
    g.addColorStop(0,'#1e9bff'); g.addColorStop(1,'#065a9f');
    return g;
  } catch(e) {
    return '#0b63b7';
  }
}

function generateColors(n) {
  const base = ['#0b63b7','#1e9bff','#065a9f','#0e9f6e','#d9534f','#f0ad4e','#6f42c1','#20c997','#6610f2','#20a8d8'];
  const out = [];
  for(let i=0;i<n;i++) out.push(base[i % base.length]);
  return out;
}

// on load
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  // render charts (handles missing Chart.js gracefully)
  renderCharts();

  // refresh when clicking search or pings (simple reload)
  el('analytics-search').addEventListener('input', (e) => {
    // allow user to filter subjects client-side by re-drawing subject chart with a subset
    const q = e.target.value.trim().toLowerCase();
    // For simplicity, re-render full charts; in a larger app we'd filter datasets
    renderCharts();
  });

  // add a small refresh on storage changes (not auto evented) — add button or periodic refresh
  // Here we add a refresh every 60s to catch changes
  setInterval(() => {
    renderCharts();
  }, 60000);
});{
  "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
  "title": "MedOne AI Question Schema",
  "description": "Schema for a single question object used by MedOne AI engines.",
  "type": "object",
  "required": [
    "id",
    "subject",
    "chapter",
    "topic",
    "difficulty",
    "highYield",
    "stem",
    "choices",
    "answer",
    "explanation",
    "trap",
    "related",
    "tags",
    "image",
    "reference"
  ],
  "additionalProperties": false,
  "properties": {
    "id": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 1,
      "pattern": "^[A-Za-z0-9_\\-:.]+$",
      "description": "Unique identifier for the question (alphanumeric, -, _, :, . permitted)."
    },
    "subject": { "type": "string", "minLength": 1 },
    "chapter": { "type": "string", "minLength": 1 },
    "topic": { "type": "string", "minLength": 1 },
    "difficulty": {
      "type": "string",
      "enum": ["Easy", "Medium", "Hard", "Unknown"]
    },
    "highYield": { "type": "boolean" },
    "stem": { "type": "string", "minLength": 1 },
    "choices": {
      "type": "array",
      "minItems": 2,
      "maxItems": 10,
      "items": { "type": "string", "minLength": 1 }
    },
    "answer": {
      "oneOf": [
        { "type": "integer", "minimum": 0 },
        { "type": "string", "minLength": 1 }
      ],
      "description": "Either an index (0-based) into choices or the exact choice text."
    },
    "explanation": { "type": "string" },
    "trap": { "type": "string" },
    "related": { "type": "string" },
    "tags": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": { "type": "string", "minLength": 1 },
      "uniqueItems": true,
      "minItems": 0
    },
    "image": {
      "type": ["string", "null"],
      "minLength": 0,
      "description": "Optional image filename or URL. Use null or empty string when not present."
    },
    "reference": {
      "type": ["string", "null"],
      "minLength": 0,
      "description": "Optional reference text or URL. Use null or empty string when not present."
    }
  }
}// js/schema-validator.js
// Simple, dependency-free question validator that enforces the same rules
// as the JSON Schema above and returns readable errors.
//
// Usage:
// import { validateQuestions } from './schema-validator.js';
// const result = await validateQuestions(parsedJsonArray);
// if (!result.valid) { show errors; } else proceed.

export async function validateQuestions(questions) {
  const errors = [];

  if (!Array.isArray(questions)) {
    errors.push({ index: null, field: null, message: 'Top-level JSON must be an array of question objects.' });
    return { valid: false, errors };
  }

  const seenIds = new Set();

  questions.forEach((q, idx) => {
    const prefix = `Question index ${idx}`;
    if (q === null || typeof q !== 'object' || Array.isArray(q)) {
      errors.push({ index: idx, field: null, message: `${prefix}: must be an object.` });
      return;
    }

    // Helper
    const add = (field, msg) => errors.push({ index: idx, field, message: `${prefix} • ${field}: ${msg}` });

    // Required fields
    const required = [
      'id','subject','chapter','topic','difficulty','highYield','stem',
      'choices','answer','explanation','trap','related','tags','image','reference'
    ];
    for (const key of required) {
      if (!(key in q)) add(key, 'missing required field');
    }

    // If missing required fields, skip further checks for this item
    const missing = required.some(k => !(k in q));
    if (missing) return;

    // id
    if (typeof q.id !== 'string' || q.id.trim() === '') add('id', 'must be a non-empty string');
    else {
      const id = q.id;
      if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9_\-:.]+$/.test(id)) add('id', 'contains invalid characters (allowed: letters, digits, _, -, :, .)');
      if (seenIds.has(id)) add('id', 'duplicate id in file');
      seenIds.add(id);
    }

    // subject/chapter/topic
    ['subject','chapter','topic'].forEach(f => {
      if (typeof q[f] !== 'string' || q[f].trim() === '') add(f, 'must be non-empty string');
    });

    // difficulty
    const difficulties = ['Easy','Medium','Hard','Unknown'];
    if (typeof q.difficulty !== 'string' || !difficulties.includes(q.difficulty)) {
