      currentStreak: this.adaptiveEngine?.calculateStreaks() || { current_streak: 0 }
    };
  }

  /**
   * Check if app is ready
   * @returns {boolean}
   */
  isReady() {
    return this.initialized && this.questionEngine.getTotalQuestionCount() > 0;
  }
}

// =====================================================
// PART 9: GLOBAL APP INSTANCE & INITIALIZATION
// =====================================================

// Create global app instance
const medoneApp = new MedOneAdaptiveApp();

/**
 * Initialize MedOne app when DOM is ready
 */
if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    medoneApp.initialize();
  });
} else {
  medoneApp.initialize();
}

// Export for external use
if (typeof module !== 'undefined' && module.exports) {
  module.exports = {
    MedOneAdaptiveApp,
    QuestionEngine,
    PracticeModeRecorder,
    EnhancedRecommendationEngine,
    DashboardManager,
    ReviewManager,
    MockExamManager,
    BackupManager,
    medoneApp
  };
}<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>MedOne AI - Adaptive Learning</title>
  <style>
    * {
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
      box-sizing: border-box;
    }

    body {
      font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif;
      background: #f5f7fa;
    }

    .container {
      max-width: 1400px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      padding: 20px;
    }

    .header {
      background: white;
      padding: 30px;
      border-radius: 12px;
      box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
      margin-bottom: 30px;
    }

    .dashboard-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(250px, 1fr));
      gap: 20px;
      margin-bottom: 30px;
    }

    .stat-card {
      background: white;
      padding: 20px;
      border-radius: 12px;
      box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    }

    .stat-label {
      font-size: 14px;
      color: #666;
      margin-bottom: 10px;
    }

    .stat-value {
      font-size: 32px;
      font-weight: bold;
      color: #333;
    }

    .loading {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      height: 400px;
      font-size: 18px;
      color: #666;
    }

    .btn {
      background: #007AFF;
      color: white;
      border: none;
      padding: 12px 24px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      cursor: pointer;
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 600;
      transition: background 0.2s;
    }

    .btn:hover {
      background: #0051D5;
    }

    .btn-secondary {
      background: #F3F4F6;
      color: #333;
    }

    .btn-secondary:hover {
      background: #E5E7EB;
    }

    .progress-bar {
      width: 100%;
      height: 8px;
      background: #E5E7EB;
      border-radius: 4px;
      overflow: hidden;
      margin-top: 10px;
    }

    .progress-fill {
      height: 100%;
      background: #10B981;
      transition: width 0.3s;
    }

    .tab-container {
      background: white;
      border-radius: 12px;
      box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .tab-buttons {
      display: flex;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #E5E7EB;
    }

    .tab-btn {
      flex: 1;
      padding: 16px;
      background: transparent;
      border: none;
      cursor: pointer;
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: #666;
      border-bottom: 3px solid transparent;
      transition: all 0.2s;
    }

    .tab-btn.active {
      color: #007AFF;
      border-bottom-color: #007AFF;
    }

    .tab-content {
      display: none;
      padding: 30px;
    }

    .tab-content.active {
      display: block;
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <div class="container">
    <div class="header">
      <h1>MedOne AI - Adaptive Learning</h1>
      <p id="loadingStatus">Initializing...</p>
      <div id="loadingProgress" style="margin-top: 10px;"></div>
    </div>

    <div id="appContent" style="display: none;">
      <!-- Dashboard -->
      <div class="dashboard-grid">
        <div class="stat-card">
          <div class="stat-label">Overall Accuracy</div>
          <div class="stat-value" id="overallAccuracy">0%</div>
          <div class="progress-bar">
            <div class="progress-fill" id="accuracyFill" style="width: 0%;"></div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="stat-card">
          <div class="stat-label">Average Response Time</div>
          <div class="stat-value" id="avgTime">0s</div>
        </div>

        <div class="stat-card">
          <div class="stat-label">Questions Today</div>
          <div class="stat-value" id="questionsToday">0</div>
        </div>

        <div class="stat-card">
          <div class="stat-label">Study Streak</div>
          <div class="stat-value" id="studyStreak">0</div>
        </div>

        <div class="stat-card">
          <div class="stat-label">Weakest Subject</div>
          <div class="stat-value" id="weakestSubject" style="font-size: 18px;">-</div>
        </div>

        <div class="stat-card">
          <div class="stat-label">Recommended</div>
          <div class="stat-value" id="recommended" style="font-size: 18px;">-</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Main Controls -->
      <div style="margin-bottom: 30px; display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
        <button class="btn" onclick="startPractice()">Start Practice</button>
        <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="startMockExam()">Start Mock Exam</button>
        <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="viewReview()">Review Questions</button>
        <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="downloadBackup()">Backup Data</button>
      </div>

      <!-- Tabs -->
      <div class="tab-container">
        <div class="tab-buttons">
          <button class="tab-btn active" onclick="switchTab('analytics')">Analytics</button>
          <button class="tab-btn" onclick="switchTab('review')">Review</button>
          <button class="tab-btn" onclick="switchTab('settings')">Settings</button>
        </div>

        <div class="tab-content active" id="analytics">
          <h3>Your Performance Analytics</h3>
          <div id="analyticsContent" style="margin-top: 20px;"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="tab-content" id="review">
          <h3>Review Questions</h3>
          <div id="reviewContent" style="margin-top: 20px;"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="tab-content" id="settings">
          <h3>Settings & Backup</h3>
          <div id="settingsContent" style="margin-top: 20px;">
            <button class="btn" onclick="downloadBackup()">Download Full Backup</button>
            <button class="btn btn-secondary" style="margin-left: 10px;" onclick="importBackup()">Import Backup</button>
            <button class="btn btn-secondary" style="margin-left: 10px;" onclick="clearAllData()">Clear All Data</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <script src="adaptive_learning.js"></script>
  <script src="medone_adaptive_integration.js"></script>

  <script>
    /**
     * Application UI Controller
     */

    function updateDashboard() {
      const metrics = medoneApp.dashboardManager.getDashboardMetrics();
      
      document.getElementById('overallAccuracy').textContent = metrics.currentAccuracy + '%';
      document.getElementById('accuracyFill').style.width = metrics.currentAccuracy + '%';
      document.getElementById('avgTime').textContent = metrics.averageResponseTime + 's';
      document.getElementById('questionsToday').textContent = metrics.questionsToday;
      document.getElementById('studyStreak').textContent = metrics.studyStreak + ' days';
      document.getElementById('weakestSubject').textContent = metrics.weakestSubject || '-';
      document.getElementById('recommended').textContent = metrics.recommendedSubject || '-';
    }

    function switchTab(tabName) {
      document.querySelectorAll('.tab-content').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
      document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
      
      document.getElementById(tabName).classList.add('active');
      event.target.classList.add('active');

      if (tabName === 'analytics') {
        loadAnalytics();
      } else if (tabName === 'review') {
        loadReview();
      }
    }

    function loadAnalytics() {
      const accuracy = medoneApp.dashboardManager.getAccuracyBySubject();
      let html = '<h4>Accuracy by Subject</h4><table style="width:100%; margin-top:10px; border-collapse: collapse;">';
      accuracy.forEach(item => {
        html += `<tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #E5E7EB;">
          <td style="padding:10px;">${item.subject}</td>
          <td style="padding:10px; text-align:right;">${item.accuracy}%</td>
          <td style="padding:10px; text-align:right;">${item.correct}/${item.total}</td>
        </tr>`;
      });
      html += '</table>';
      document.getElementById('analyticsContent').innerHTML = html;
    }

    function loadReview() {
      const wrong = medoneApp.reviewManager.getWrongQuestions();
      let html = `<p>Wrong Questions: ${wrong.length}</p>`;
      document.getElementById('reviewContent').innerHTML = html;
    }

    async function downloadBackup() {
      await medoneApp.backupManager.downloadBackup();
    }

    function importBackup() {
      const input = document.createElement('input');
      input.type = 'file';
      input.accept = '.json';
      input.onchange = async (e) => {
        await medoneApp.backupManager.importData(e.target.files[0]);
        alert('Backup imported successfully');
      };
      input.click();
    }

    function startPractice() {
      alert('Practice mode starting...');
    }

    function startMockExam() {
      alert('Mock exam starting...');
    }

    function viewReview() {
      switchTab('review');
    }

    function clearAllData() {
      if (confirm('Are you sure? This will clear all your learning data.')) {
        localStorage.clear();
        location.reload();
      }
    }

    // Initialize app
    window.addEventListener('medoneInitialized', (e) => {
      const app = e.detail.app;
      
      if (app.isReady()) {
        document.getElementById('loadingStatus').textContent = 'Ready!';
        document.getElementById('appContent').style.display = 'block';
        updateDashboard();
        setInterval(updateDashboard, 10000); // Update every 10 seconds
      }
    });

    window.addEventListener('questionLoadingProgress', (e) => {
      const progress = e.detail.progress;
      document.getElementById('loadingProgress').innerHTML = 
        `<div style="background:#E5E7EB; height:8px; border-radius:4px; overflow:hidden;">
          <div style="background:#007AFF; height:100%; width:${progress}%; transition:width 0.3s;"></div>
        </div>
        <p style="margin-top:10px; font-size:12px; color:#666;">${progress}% loaded</p>`;
    });
  </script>
</body>
</html>/**
 * MedOne AI - Exam Generator for Taiwan Medical Licensing Examination Step 1
 * Generates unlimited mock exams following official distribution
 * 
 * Distribution (200 questions total):
 * - Anatomy: 31
 * - Embryology: 5
 * - Histology: 10
 * - Physiology: 27
 * - Biochemistry: 27
 * - Microbiology: 17
 * - Immunology: 11
 * - Parasitology: 7
 * - Biostatistics/Epidemiology/Public Health: 15
 * - Pharmacology: 25
 * - Pathology: 25
 * 
 * Features:
 * - No question duplication
 * - Balanced difficulty distribution
 * - High-yield topic prioritization
 * - Randomized question and answer order
 * - Unlimited exam generation (Mock001-Mock999)
 * - Complete exam history storage
 * - Review mode support
 */

/**
 * ExamDistribution
 * Defines the official Taiwan Medical Licensing Exam Step 1 distribution
 */
class ExamDistribution {
  static OFFICIAL_DISTRIBUTION = {
    'Anatomy': 31,
    'Embryology': 5,
    'Histology': 10,
    'Physiology': 27,
    'Biochemistry': 27,
    'Microbiology': 17,
    'Immunology': 11,
    'Parasitology': 7,
    'Biostatistics': 15,  // includes Epidemiology & Public Health
    'Pharmacology': 25,
    'Pathology': 25
  };

  static TOTAL_QUESTIONS = 200;

  static DIFFICULTY_DISTRIBUTION = {
    'Easy': 0.20,      // 20%
    'Medium': 0.50,    // 50%
    'Hard': 0.30       // 30%
  };

  /**
   * Get distribution for a specific subject
   * @param {string} subject
   * @returns {number}
   */
  static getSubjectQuestionCount(subject) {
    return this.OFFICIAL_DISTRIBUTION[subject] || 0;
  }

  /**
   * Get all subjects in order
   * @returns {Array}
   */
  static getAllSubjects() {
    return Object.keys(this.OFFICIAL_DISTRIBUTION).sort();
  }

  /**
   * Validate distribution sums to 200
   * @returns {boolean}
   */
  static isValid() {
    const total = Object.values(this.OFFICIAL_DISTRIBUTION).reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
    return total === this.TOTAL_QUESTIONS;
  }
}

/**
 * QuestionPoolManager
 * Manages the question pool to prevent duplicates and track usage
 */
class QuestionPoolManager {
  constructor() {
    this.usedQuestions = new Set();
    this.questionsBySubject = new Map();
    this.questionDifficultyCounts = new Map();
    this.highYieldQuestions = new Map();
    this.loadState();
  }

  /**
   * Initialize question pool from question engine
   * @param {QuestionEngine} questionEngine
   */
  initializeFromQuestionEngine(questionEngine) {
    const allSubjects = ExamDistribution.getAllSubjects();

    allSubjects.forEach(subject => {
      const subjectQuestions = questionEngine.getQuestionsBySubject(subject);
      const grouped = this.groupByDifficulty(subjectQuestions);
      this.questionsBySubject.set(subject, grouped);

      // Track high-yield questions
      const highYield = subjectQuestions.filter(q => q.highYield);
      this.highYieldQuestions.set(subject, highYield);

      // Initialize difficulty counts
      const diffCounts = { 'Easy': 0, 'Medium': 0, 'Hard': 0 };
      subjectQuestions.forEach(q => {
        const diff = q.difficulty || 'Medium';
        if (diff in diffCounts) {
          diffCounts[diff]++;
        }
      });
      this.questionDifficultyCounts.set(subject, diffCounts);
    });

    console.log('Question pool initialized from question engine');
  }

  /**
   * Group questions by difficulty
   * @param {Array} questions
   * @returns {Object}
   * @private
   */
  groupByDifficulty(questions) {
    const grouped = {
      'Easy': [],
      'Medium': [],
      'Hard': []
    };

    questions.forEach(q => {
      const diff = q.difficulty || 'Medium';
      if (diff in grouped) {
        grouped[diff].push(q);
      }
    });

    return grouped;
  }

  /**
   * Select questions for an exam without duplicates
   * @param {string} subject
   * @param {number} count
   * @returns {Array}
   */
  selectQuestionsForExam(subject, count) {
    const subjectQuestions = this.questionsBySubject.get(subject);
    if (!subjectQuestions) {
      console.warn(`No questions found for subject: ${subject}`);
      return [];
    }

    const selectedQuestions = [];
    const targetDifficulty = this.calculateDifficultyTarget(count);

    // Attempt to balance difficulty distribution
    for (const difficulty of ['Easy', 'Medium', 'Hard']) {
      const target = Math.round(count * ExamDistribution.DIFFICULTY_DISTRIBUTION[difficulty]);
      const available = subjectQuestions[difficulty] || [];

      // Filter out already used questions
      const availableUnused = available.filter(q => !this.usedQuestions.has(q.id));

      // Select random questions from this difficulty up to target
      const toSelect = Math.min(target, availableUnused.length);
      const selected = this.randomSample(availableUnused, toSelect);

      selectedQuestions.push(...selected);
      selected.forEach(q => this.usedQuestions.add(q.id));
    }

    // If we need more questions due to rounding, select from any difficulty
    if (selectedQuestions.length < count) {
      const allAvailable = Object.values(subjectQuestions)
        .flat()
        .filter(q => !this.usedQuestions.has(q.id));

      const needed = count - selectedQuestions.length;
      const additional = this.randomSample(allAvailable, Math.min(needed, allAvailable.length));

      selectedQuestions.push(...additional);
      additional.forEach(q => this.usedQuestions.add(q.id));
    }

    return selectedQuestions.slice(0, count);
  }

  /**
   * Random sample without replacement
   * @param {Array} array
   * @param {number} count
   * @returns {Array}
   * @private
   */
  randomSample(array, count) {
    const shuffled = [...array].sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5);
    return shuffled.slice(0, count);
  }

  /**
   * Reset used questions (when resetting exam history)
   */
  resetUsedQuestions() {
    this.usedQuestions.clear();
  }

  /**
   * Get statistics on question usage
   * @returns {Object}
   */
  getUsageStatistics() {
    return {
      totalUsed: this.usedQuestions.size,
      bySubject: this.getUsageBySubject()
    };
  }

  /**
   * Get usage count by subject
   * @returns {Object}
   * @private
   */
  getUsageBySubject() {
    const usage = {};

    ExamDistribution.getAllSubjects().forEach(subject => {
      const subjectQuestions = this.questionsBySubject.get(subject) || {};
      const allQuestionsInSubject = Object.values(subjectQuestions).flat();
      const usedCount = allQuestionsInSubject.filter(q => this.usedQuestions.has(q.id)).length;
      const totalCount = allQuestionsInSubject.length;

      usage[subject] = {
        used: usedCount,
        total: totalCount,
        availableRemaining: totalCount - usedCount
      };
    });

    return usage;
  }

  /**
   * Check if sufficient questions available for exam
   * @returns {boolean}
   */
  canGenerateExam() {
    const usage = this.getUsageBySubject();
    let canGenerate = true;

    ExamDistribution.getAllSubjects().forEach(subject => {
      const required = ExamDistribution.getSubjectQuestionCount(subject);
      const available = usage[subject].availableRemaining;

      if (available < required) {
        canGenerate = false;
        console.warn(
          `Insufficient questions for ${subject}: need ${required}, available ${available}`
        );
      }
    });

    return canGenerate;
  }

  /**
   * Load state from localStorage
   * @private
   */
  loadState() {
    const saved = localStorage.getItem('exam_question_pool_state');
    if (saved) {
      try {
        const state = JSON.parse(saved);
        this.usedQuestions = new Set(state.usedQuestions || []);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error loading question pool state:', error);
      }
    }
  }

  /**
   * Save state to localStorage
   */
  saveState() {
    const state = {
      usedQuestions: Array.from(this.usedQuestions)
    };
    localStorage.setItem('exam_question_pool_state', JSON.stringify(state));
  }
}

/**
 * ExamGenerator
 * Generates mock exams following Taiwan Medical Licensing Exam Step 1 format
 */
class ExamGenerator {
  constructor(questionEngine, adaptiveEngine = null) {
    this.questionEngine = questionEngine;
    this.adaptiveEngine = adaptiveEngine;
    this.questionPool = new QuestionPoolManager();
    this.examCounter = 0;
    this.loadExamCounter();
  }

  /**
   * Initialize generator with question engine
   */
  initialize() {
    this.questionPool.initializeFromQuestionEngine(this.questionEngine);
    console.log('Exam generator initialized');
  }

  /**
   * Generate a complete mock exam
   * @returns {Object|null} Exam object or null if insufficient questions
   */
  generateExam() {
    // Check if enough questions available
    if (!this.questionPool.canGenerateExam()) {
      console.warn('Insufficient questions available for exam generation');
      return null;
    }

    // Increment exam counter and get ID
    this.examCounter++;
    const examId = `Mock${String(this.examCounter).padStart(3, '0')}`;

    // Generate exam structure
    const exam = {
      id: examId,
      mockNumber: this.examCounter,
      timestamp: Date.now(),
      createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      questions: [],
      distribution: {},
      totalQuestions: 0,
      status: 'pending', // pending, in-progress, completed
      answers: {},
      userAnswers: {},
      results: null
    };

    // Select questions according to official distribution
    const allExamQuestions = [];

    for (const subject of ExamDistribution.getAllSubjects()) {
      const requiredCount = ExamDistribution.getSubjectQuestionCount(subject);
      const selectedQuestions = this.questionPool.selectQuestionsForExam(subject, requiredCount);

      if (selectedQuestions.length < requiredCount) {
        console.error(
          `Failed to select enough questions for ${subject}: ` +
          `got ${selectedQuestions.length}, needed ${requiredCount}`
        );
        this.examCounter--; // Decrement counter since this exam failed
        return null;
      }

      exam.distribution[subject] = {
        required: requiredCount,
        selected: selectedQuestions.length
      };

      allExamQuestions.push(...selectedQuestions);
    }

    // Randomize question order
    const shuffledQuestions = this.shuffleArray(allExamQuestions);

    // Prepare exam questions with randomized answers
    exam.questions = shuffledQuestions.map((question, index) => ({
      index: index + 1,
      id: question.id,
      subject: question.subject,
      chapter: question.chapter,
      topic: question.topic,
      difficulty: question.difficulty,
      highYield: question.highYield,
      stem: question.stem,
      explanation: question.explanation,
      correctAnswer: question.answer,
      choices: this.randomizeChoices(
        question.choices,
        question.answer
      ),
      imageUrl: question.imageUrl || null,
      reference: question.reference || null
    }));

    exam.totalQuestions = exam.questions.length;

    // Save exam to history
    this.saveExamToHistory(exam);

    // Save question pool state
    this.questionPool.saveState();
    this.saveExamCounter();

    console.log(`Generated exam ${examId} with ${exam.totalQuestions} questions`);
    return exam;
  }

  /**
   * Randomize answer choices and return mapping
   * @param {Array} choices
   * @param {number} correctIndex
   * @returns {Object} { choices: Array, correctIndex: number }
   * @private
   */
  randomizeChoices(choices, correctIndex) {
    if (!Array.isArray(choices) || choices.length === 0) {
      return { choices: [], correctIndex: 0 };
    }

    const indexed = choices.map((choice, index) => ({
      choice,
      originalIndex: index
    }));

    // Shuffle
    indexed.sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5);

    // Find new index of correct answer
    const newCorrectIndex = indexed.findIndex(
      item => item.originalIndex === correctIndex
    );

    return {
      choices: indexed.map(item => item.choice),
      correctIndex: newCorrectIndex >= 0 ? newCorrectIndex : 0
    };
  }

  /**
   * Shuffle array using Fisher-Yates algorithm
   * @param {Array} array
   * @returns {Array}
   * @private
   */
  shuffleArray(array) {
    const shuffled = [...array];
    for (let i = shuffled.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
      const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
      [shuffled[i], shuffled[j]] = [shuffled[j], shuffled[i]];
    }
    return shuffled;
  }

  /**
   * Save exam to localStorage history
   * @param {Object} exam
   * @private
   */
  saveExamToHistory(exam) {
    const history = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('exam_history') || '[]');
    
    // Store only metadata and basic info (not full questions to save space)
    const examRecord = {
      id: exam.id,
      mockNumber: exam.mockNumber,
      timestamp: exam.timestamp,
      createdAt: exam.createdAt,
      totalQuestions: exam.totalQuestions,
      distribution: exam.distribution,
      status: exam.status,
      results: exam.results
    };

    history.push(examRecord);
    localStorage.setItem('exam_history', JSON.stringify(history));

    // Store full exam separately for access during exam
    localStorage.setItem(`exam_${exam.id}`, JSON.stringify(exam));
  }

  /**
   * Load exam from storage
   * @param {string} examId
   * @returns {Object|null}
   */
  loadExam(examId) {
    const examData = localStorage.getItem(`exam_${examId}`);
    if (!examData) {
      return null;
    }

    try {
      return JSON.parse(examData);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(`Error loading exam ${examId}:`, error);
      return null;
    }
  }

  /**
   * Get exam history
   * @param {number} limit
   * @returns {Array}
   */
  getExamHistory(limit = 50) {
    const history = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('exam_history') || '[]');
    return history.slice(-limit).reverse();
  }

  /**
   * Get exam by ID
   * @param {string} examId
   * @returns {Object|null}
   */
  getExamById(examId) {
    const history = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('exam_history') || '[]');
    return history.find(exam => exam.id === examId) || null;
  }

  /**
   * Save user answers during exam
   * @param {string} examId
   * @param {number} questionIndex
   * @param {number} selectedChoiceIndex
   */
  saveAnswer(examId, questionIndex, selectedChoiceIndex) {
    const exam = this.loadExam(examId);
    if (!exam) {
      console.error(`Exam ${examId} not found`);
      return false;
    }

    exam.userAnswers[questionIndex] = selectedChoiceIndex;
    exam.status = 'in-progress';
    localStorage.setItem(`exam_${examId}`, JSON.stringify(exam));

    // Track in adaptive engine if available
    if (this.adaptiveEngine) {
      const question = exam.questions[questionIndex];
      const isCorrect = selectedChoiceIndex === question.correctAnswer;
      // Will be recorded when exam is submitted
    }

    return true;
  }

  /**
   * Submit exam and calculate results
   * @param {string} examId
   * @returns {Object} Results object
   */
  submitExam(examId) {
    const exam = this.loadExam(examId);
    if (!exam) {
      console.error(`Exam ${examId} not found`);
      return null;
    }

    const results = this.calculateResults(exam);
    exam.results = results;
    exam.status = 'completed';
    exam.submittedAt = new Date().toISOString();

    // Save exam with results
    localStorage.setItem(`exam_${examId}`, JSON.stringify(exam));

    // Update exam history
    const history = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('exam_history') || '[]');
    const historyIndex = history.findIndex(e => e.id === examId);
    if (historyIndex >= 0) {
      history[historyIndex].status = 'completed';
      history[historyIndex].results = results;
      history[historyIndex].submittedAt = exam.submittedAt;
      localStorage.setItem('exam_history', JSON.stringify(history));
    }

    // Record in adaptive engine if available
    if (this.adaptiveEngine) {
      exam.questions.forEach((question, index) => {
        const userAnswer = exam.userAnswers[index];
        const isCorrect = userAnswer === question.correctAnswer;
        const timeSpent = 0; // Would need to track separately

        this.adaptiveEngine.recordQuestionAttempt(
          {
            id: question.id,
            subject: question.subject,
            chapter: question.chapter,
            difficulty: question.difficulty,
            answer: question.correctAnswer,
            bookmarked: false,
            flagged: false
          },
          userAnswer,
          isCorrect,
          timeSpent
        );
      });
    }

    console.log(`Exam ${examId} submitted with results:`, results);
    return results;
  }

  /**
   * Calculate exam results
   * @param {Object} exam
   * @returns {Object}
   * @private
   */
  calculateResults(exam) {
    let totalCorrect = 0;
    let totalAnswered = 0;
    const resultsBySubject = {};
    const resultsByDifficulty = {};
    const wrongQuestions = [];
    const skippedQuestions = [];

    // Initialize tracking structures
    ExamDistribution.getAllSubjects().forEach(subject => {
      resultsBySubject[subject] = {
        correct: 0,
        total: 0,
        accuracy: 0
      };
    });

    ['Easy', 'Medium', 'Hard'].forEach(difficulty => {
      resultsByDifficulty[difficulty] = {
        correct: 0,
        total: 0,
        accuracy: 0
      };
    });

    // Analyze answers
    exam.questions.forEach((question, index) => {
      const userAnswer = exam.userAnswers[index];
      const isCorrect = userAnswer === question.correctAnswer;

      // Track by subject
      if (resultsBySubject[question.subject]) {
        resultsBySubject[question.subject].total++;
        if (isCorrect) {
          resultsBySubject[question.subject].correct++;
        }
      }

      // Track by difficulty
      const difficulty = question.difficulty || 'Medium';
      if (resultsByDifficulty[difficulty]) {
        resultsByDifficulty[difficulty].total++;
        if (isCorrect) {
          resultsByDifficulty[difficulty].correct++;
        }
      }

      // Track unanswered
      if (userAnswer === undefined || userAnswer === null) {
        skippedQuestions.push({
          index,
          questionId: question.id,
          subject: question.subject,
          chapter: question.chapter
        });
      } else {
        totalAnswered++;
        if (isCorrect) {
          totalCorrect++;
        } else {
          wrongQuestions.push({
            index,
            questionId: question.id,
            subject: question.subject,
            chapter: question.chapter,
            difficulty: question.difficulty,
            userAnswer,
            correctAnswer: question.correctAnswer,
            explanation: question.explanation
          });
        }
      }
    });

    // Calculate accuracies
    ExamDistribution.getAllSubjects().forEach(subject => {
      if (resultsBySubject[subject].total > 0) {
        resultsBySubject[subject].accuracy = Math.round(
          (resultsBySubject[subject].correct / resultsBySubject[subject].total) * 100
        );
      }
    });

    ['Easy', 'Medium', 'Hard'].forEach(difficulty => {
      if (resultsByDifficulty[difficulty].total > 0) {
        resultsByDifficulty[difficulty].accuracy = Math.round(
          (resultsByDifficulty[difficulty].correct / resultsByDifficulty[difficulty].total) * 100
        );
      }
    });

    const overallAccuracy = totalAnswered > 0
      ? Math.round((totalCorrect / totalAnswered) * 100)
      : 0;

    return {
      overallScore: overallAccuracy,
      totalCorrect,
      totalAnswered,
      totalUnanswered: exam.totalQuestions - totalAnswered,
      overallAccuracy,
      bySubject: resultsBySubject,
      byDifficulty: resultsByDifficulty,
      wrongQuestions,
      skippedQuestions,
      highYieldAccuracy: this.calculateHighYieldAccuracy(exam),
      estimatedPass: overallAccuracy >= 60,  // Taiwan exam typically requires 60% pass
      submittedAt: new Date().toISOString()
    };
  }

  /**
   * Calculate accuracy on high-yield questions
   * @param {Object} exam
   * @returns {Object}
   * @private
   */
  calculateHighYieldAccuracy(exam) {
    let highYieldCorrect = 0;
    let highYieldTotal = 0;

    exam.questions.forEach((question, index) => {
      if (question.highYield) {
        highYieldTotal++;
        const userAnswer = exam.userAnswers[index];
        if (userAnswer === question.correctAnswer) {
          highYieldCorrect++;
        }
      }
    });

    return {
      correct: highYieldCorrect,
      total: highYieldTotal,
      accuracy: highYieldTotal > 0 ? Math.round((highYieldCorrect / highYieldTotal) * 100) : 0
    };
  }

  /**
   * Load exam counter from localStorage
   * @private
   */
  loadExamCounter() {
    const saved = localStorage.getItem('exam_counter');
    this.examCounter = saved ? parseInt(saved, 10) : 0;
  }

  /**
   * Save exam counter to localStorage
   * @private
   */
  saveExamCounter() {
    localStorage.setItem('exam_counter', this.examCounter.toString());
  }

  /**
   * Get statistics on generated exams
   * @returns {Object}
   */
  getStatistics() {
    const history = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('exam_history') || '[]');
    const completed = history.filter(e => e.status === 'completed');

    let totalScore = 0;
    let avgScore = 0;

    if (completed.length > 0) {
      totalScore = completed.reduce((sum, exam) => sum + (exam.results?.overallScore || 0), 0);
      avgScore = Math.round(totalScore / completed.length);
    }

    return {
      totalGenerated: history.length,
      totalCompleted: completed.length,
      inProgress: history.filter(e => e.status === 'in-progress').length,
      averageScore: avgScore,
      questionPoolUsage: this.questionPool.getUsageStatistics(),
      nextExamNumber: this.examCounter + 1,
      maxExamNumber: 999
    };
  }

  /**
   * Clear exam history and reset counter
   */
  clearHistory() {
    if (confirm('Clear all exam history and reset question pool?')) {
      localStorage.removeItem('exam_history');
      localStorage.removeItem('exam_counter');
      this.questionPool.resetUsedQuestions();
      this.questionPool.saveState();
      this.examCounter = 0;
      this.saveExamCounter();
      console.log('Exam history cleared and question pool reset');
      return true;
    }
    return false;
  }
}

/**
 * ExamReviewManager
 * Manages exam review functionality
 */
class ExamReviewManager {
  constructor(examGenerator) {
    this.examGenerator = examGenerator;
  }

  /**
   * Get detailed review for an exam
   * @param {string} examId
   * @returns {Object}
   */
  getExamReview(examId) {
    const exam = this.examGenerator.loadExam(examId);
    if (!exam || !exam.results) {
      return null;
    }

    return {
      exam: {
        id: exam.id,
        createdAt: exam.createdAt,
        submittedAt: exam.submittedAt,
        duration: exam.submittedAt ? 
          new Date(exam.submittedAt) - new Date(exam.createdAt) : null
      },
      results: exam.results,
      questions: exam.questions.map((question, index) => ({
        index: index + 1,
        question,
        userAnswer: exam.userAnswers[index],
        isCorrect: exam.userAnswers[index] === question.correctAnswer,
        selectedChoice: question.choices[exam.userAnswers[index]] || null,
        correctChoice: question.choices[question.correctAnswer]
      })),
      weakAreas: this.identifyWeakAreas(exam),
      strongAreas: this.identifyStrongAreas(exam),
      recommendations: this.generateRecommendations(exam)
    };
  }

  /**
   * Identify weak areas from exam results
   * @param {Object} exam
   * @returns {Array}
   * @private
   */
  identifyWeakAreas(exam) {
    if (!exam.results || !exam.results.bySubject) {
      return [];
    }

    return Object.entries(exam.results.bySubject)
      .filter(([subject, data]) => data.accuracy < 70)
      .map(([subject, data]) => ({
        subject,
        accuracy: data.accuracy,
        correct: data.correct,
        total: data.total
      }))
      .sort((a, b) => a.accuracy - b.accuracy);
  }

  /**
   * Identify strong areas from exam results
   * @param {Object} exam
   * @returns {Array}
   * @private
   */
  identifyStrongAreas(exam) {
    if (!exam.results || !exam.results.bySubject) {
      return [];
    }

    return Object.entries(exam.results.bySubject)
      .filter(([subject, data]) => data.accuracy >= 80)
      .map(([subject, data]) => ({
        subject,
        accuracy: data.accuracy,
        correct: data.correct,
        total: data.total
      }))
      .sort((a, b) => b.accuracy - a.accuracy);
  }

  /**
   * Generate recommendations for next study session
   * @param {Object} exam
   * @returns {Array}
   * @private
   */
  generateRecommendations(exam) {
    const weakAreas = this.identifyWeakAreas(exam);
    const recommendations = [];

    weakAreas.forEach(area => {
      const wrongQuestions = exam.results.wrongQuestions.filter(
        q => q.subject === area.subject
      );

      recommendations.push({
        priority: 'high',
        subject: area.subject,
        reason: `Low accuracy (${area.accuracy}%) in ${area.subject}`,
        suggestedAction: `Review ${area.subject} concepts and practice ${Math.ceil(area.total * 0.5)} additional questions`,
        wrongQuestionCount: wrongQuestions.length,
        topics: [...new Set(wrongQuestions.map(q => q.chapter))]
      });
    });

    // Add high-yield recommendation if accuracy is low
    if (exam.results.highYieldAccuracy.accuracy < 80) {
      recommendations.push({
        priority: 'critical',
        subject: 'High-Yield Topics',
        reason: `Low accuracy on high-yield questions (${exam.results.highYieldAccuracy.accuracy}%)`,
        suggestedAction: 'Focus on high-yield topics - these are likely to appear on the real exam',
        wrongQuestionCount: exam.results.highYieldAccuracy.total - exam.results.highYieldAccuracy.correct
      });
    }

    return recommendations;
  }

  /**
   * Compare multiple exams
   * @param {Array} examIds
   * @returns {Object}
   */
  compareExams(examIds) {
    const exams = examIds.map(id => this.examGenerator.loadExam(id)).filter(e => e && e.results);

    if (exams.length === 0) {
      return null;
    }

    return {
      examCount: exams.length,
      averageScore: Math.round(
        exams.reduce((sum, e) => sum + e.results.overallScore, 0) / exams.length
      ),
      highestScore: Math.max(...exams.map(e => e.results.overallScore)),
      lowestScore: Math.min(...exams.map(e => e.results.overallScore)),
      trend: this.calculateTrend(exams),
      subjectComparison: this.compareBySubject(exams),
      difficultyComparison: this.compareByDifficulty(exams)
    };
  }

  /**
   * Calculate score trend
   * @param {Array} exams
   * @returns {string}
   * @private
   */
  calculateTrend(exams) {
    if (exams.length < 2) {
      return 'insufficient_data';
    }

    const scores = exams.map(e => e.results.overallScore);
    const recent = scores.slice(-3);
    const previous = scores.slice(-6, -3);

    if (previous.length === 0) {
      return 'insufficient_data';
    }

    const recentAvg = recent.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / recent.length;
    const prevAvg = previous.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / previous.length;

    if (recentAvg > prevAvg + 5) {
      return 'improving';
    } else if (recentAvg < prevAvg - 5) {
      return 'declining';
    } else {
      return 'stable';
    }
  }

  /**
   * Compare performance by subject across exams
   * @param {Array} exams
   * @returns {Object}
   * @private
   */
  compareBySubject(exams) {
    const comparison = {};

    ExamDistribution.getAllSubjects().forEach(subject => {
      const accuracies = exams
        .map(e => e.results.bySubject[subject]?.accuracy || 0)
        .filter(acc => acc > 0);

      if (accuracies.length > 0) {
        comparison[subject] = {
          average: Math.round(accuracies.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / accuracies.length),
          highest: Math.max(...accuracies),
          lowest: Math.min(...accuracies),
          trend: accuracies.length > 1 
            ? accuracies[accuracies.length - 1] - accuracies[0] > 0 ? 'up' : 'down'
            : 'new'
        };
      }
    });

    return comparison;
  }

  /**
   * Compare performance by difficulty across exams
   * @param {Array} exams
   * @returns {Object}
   * @private
   */
  compareByDifficulty(exams) {
    const comparison = {};

    ['Easy', 'Medium', 'Hard'].forEach(difficulty => {
      const accuracies = exams
        .map(e => e.results.byDifficulty[difficulty]?.accuracy || 0)
        .filter(acc => acc > 0);

      if (accuracies.length > 0) {
        comparison[difficulty] = {
          average: Math.round(accuracies.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / accuracies.length),
          highest: Math.max(...accuracies),
          lowest: Math.min(...accuracies)
        };
      }
    });

    return comparison;
  }

  /**
   * Get frequently wrong questions across exams
   * @param {number} limit
   * @returns {Array}
   */
  getFrequentlyWrongQuestions(limit = 10) {
    const history = this.examGenerator.getExamHistory(999);
    const completed = history.filter(e => e.status === 'completed');
    const wrongCounts = {};

    completed.forEach(exam => {
      const examData = this.examGenerator.loadExam(exam.id);
      if (examData && examData.results && examData.results.wrongQuestions) {
        examData.results.wrongQuestions.forEach(wrong => {
          if (!wrongCounts[wrong.questionId]) {
            wrongCounts[wrong.questionId] = {
              questionId: wrong.questionId,
              subject: wrong.subject,
              chapter: wrong.chapter,
              count: 0
            };
          }
          wrongCounts[wrong.questionId].count++;
        });
      }
    });

    return Object.values(wrongCounts)
      .sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count)
      .slice(0, limit);
  }
}

/**
 * Taiwan Medical Exam Integration
 * Integrates exam generator with MedOne adaptive system
 */
class TaiwanMedicalExamIntegration {
  constructor(medoneApp) {
    this.medoneApp = medoneApp;
    this.examGenerator = null;
    this.reviewManager = null;
  }

  /**
   * Initialize exam generator with MedOne app
   */
  async initialize() {
    // Wait for app to be ready
    if (!this.medoneApp.isReady()) {
      console.error('MedOne app not ready');
      return false;
    }

    try {
      // Initialize exam generator
      this.examGenerator = new ExamGenerator(
        this.medoneApp.questionEngine,
        this.medoneApp.adaptiveEngine
      );
      this.examGenerator.initialize();

      // Initialize review manager
      this.reviewManager = new ExamReviewManager(this.examGenerator);

      console.log('Taiwan Medical Exam Integration initialized');
      return true;
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to initialize Taiwan Medical Exam Integration:', error);
      return false;
    }
  }

  /**
   * Generate new mock exam
   * @returns {Object|null}
   */
  generateNewMockExam() {
    const exam = this.examGenerator.generateExam();
    if (exam) {
      this.triggerEvent('examGenerated', exam);
    }
    return exam;
  }

  /**
   * Get exam for taking
   * @param {string} examId
   * @returns {Object|null}
   */
  getExam(examId) {
    return this.examGenerator.loadExam(examId);
  }

  /**
   * Submit exam for grading
   * @param {string} examId
   * @returns {Object|null}
   */
  submitExam(examId) {
    const results = this.examGenerator.submitExam(examId);
    if (results) {
      this.triggerEvent('examSubmitted', { examId, results });
    }
    return results;
  }

  /**
   * Get exam review
   * @param {string} examId
   * @returns {Object|null}
   */
  getExamReview(examId) {
    return this.reviewManager.getExamReview(examId);
  }

  /**
   * Compare exams
   * @param {Array} examIds
   * @returns {Object|null}
   */
  compareExams(examIds) {
    return this.reviewManager.compareExams(examIds);
  }

  /**
   * Get exam statistics
   * @returns {Object}
   */
  getStatistics() {
    return this.examGenerator.getStatistics();
  }

  /**
   * Get exam history
   * @param {number} limit
   * @returns {Array}
   */
  getExamHistory(limit = 50) {
    return this.examGenerator.getExamHistory(limit);
  }

  /**
   * Get frequently wrong questions
   * @returns {Array}
   */
  getFrequentlyWrongQuestions(limit = 10) {
    return this.reviewManager.getFrequentlyWrongQuestions(limit);
  }

  /**
   * Trigger event for UI update
   * @param {string} eventName
   * @param {Object} detail
   * @private
   */
  triggerEvent(eventName, detail) {
    window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent(eventName, { detail }));
  }
}

// Export classes
if (typeof module !== 'undefined' && module.exports) {
  module.exports = {
    ExamDistribution,
    QuestionPoolManager,
    ExamGenerator,
    ExamReviewManager,
    TaiwanMedicalExamIntegration
  };
}<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Taiwan Medical Licensing Exam - Mock Exams</title>
  <style>
    * {
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
      box-sizing: border-box;
    }

    body {
      font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
      min-height: 100vh;
      padding: 20px;
    }

    .container {
      max-width: 1400px;
      margin: 0 auto;
    }

    .header {
      background: white;
      padding: 40px;
      border-radius: 16px;
      box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
      margin-bottom: 30px;
      text-align: center;
    }

    .header h1 {
      color: #333;
      margin-bottom: 10px;
      font-size: 32px;
    }

    .header p {
      color: #666;
      font-size: 16px;
    }

    .exam-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
      gap: 30px;
      margin-bottom: 30px;
    }

    .exam-card {
      background: white;
      border-radius: 16px;
      box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
      overflow: hidden;
      transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
    }

    .exam-card:hover {
      transform: translateY(-5px);
      box-shadow: 0 15px 50px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
    }

    .exam-card-header {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
      color: white;
      padding: 20px;
      font-size: 20px;
      font-weight: bold;
    }

    .exam-card-body {
      padding: 20px;
    }

    .exam-stat {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 10px 0;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;
    }

    .exam-stat:last-child {
      border-bottom: none;
    }

    .stat-label {
      color: #666;
      font-size: 14px;
    }

    .stat-value {
      color: #333;
      font-weight: bold;
    }

    .btn {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
      color: white;
      border: none;
      padding: 12px 24px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      cursor: pointer;
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 600;
      transition: all 0.2s;
      width: 100%;
      margin-top: 15px;
    }

    .btn:hover {
      box-shadow: 0 5px 20px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.4);
      transform: scale(1.02);
    }

    .btn-secondary {
      background: #f0f2f5;
      color: #333;
      margin-top: 10px;
    }

    .btn-secondary:hover {
      background: #e4e6eb;
      box-shadow: none;
    }

    .stats-panel {
      background: white;
      border-radius: 16px;
      box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
      padding: 30px;
      margin-bottom: 30px;
    }

    .stats-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
      gap: 20px;
      margin-top: 20px;
    }

    .stat-box {
      background: #f8f9fa;
      padding: 20px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      border-left: 4px solid #667eea;
    }

    .stat-box h4 {
      color: #666;
      font-size: 12px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      margin-bottom: 10px;
    }

    .stat-box .value {
      font-size: 28px;
      font-weight: bold;
      color: #333;
    }

    .modal {
      display: none;
      position: fixed;
      top: 0;
      left: 0;
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7);
      z-index: 1000;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
    }

    .modal.active {
      display: flex;
    }

    .modal-content {
      background: white;
      border-radius: 16px;
      max-width: 800px;
      width: 90%;
      max-height: 90vh;
      overflow-y: auto;
      padding: 40px;
    }

    .modal-content h2 {
      margin-bottom: 20px;
      color: #333;
    }

    .close-btn {
      position: absolute;
      top: 20px;
      right: 20px;
      background: none;
      border: none;
      font-size: 24px;
      cursor: pointer;
      color: #666;
    }

    .question {
      background: #f8f9fa;
      padding: 20px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      margin-bottom: 15px;
    }

    .question-text {
      font-weight: bold;
      margin-bottom: 15px;
      color: #333;
    }

    .choices {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 10px;
    }

    .choice {
      background: white;
      border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
      padding: 12px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.2s;
    }

    .choice:hover {
      border-color: #667eea;
      background: #f0f2f5;
    }

    .choice.selected {
      background: #e0e7ff;
      border-color: #667eea;
    }

    .choice.correct {
      background: #d4edda;
      border-color: #28a745;
    }

    .choice.incorrect {
      background: #f8d7da;
      border-color: #dc3545;
    }

    @media (max-width: 768px) {
      .exam-grid {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      .header h1 {
        font-size: 24px;
      }

      .modal-content {
        padding: 20px;
      }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <div class="container">
    <div class="header">
      <h1>Taiwan Medical Licensing Exam - Step 1</h1>
      <p>200 Questions | Follow Official Distribution</p>
    </div>

    <!-- Statistics Panel -->
    <div class="stats-panel">
      <h3>Your Progress</h3>
      <div class="stats-grid">
        <div class="stat-box">
          <h4>Exams Generated</h4>
          <div class="value" id="examsGenerated">0</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-box">
          <h4>Exams Completed</h4>
          <div class="value" id="examsCompleted">0</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-box">
          <h4>Average Score</h4>
          <div class="value" id="averageScore">0%</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-box">
          <h4>Highest Score</h4>
          <div class="value" id="highestScore">0%</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Main Exam Grid -->
    <div id="examGrid" class="exam-grid">
      <!-- Exams will be rendered here -->
    </div>

    <!-- Generate New Exam Button -->
    <div style="text-align: center; margin: 30px 0;">
      <button class="btn" onclick="generateNewExam()" style="max-width: 300px; margin: 0 auto;">
        Generate New Mock Exam
      </button>
    </div>

    <!-- Exam History -->
    <div class="stats-panel">
      <h3>Recent Exams</h3>
      <div id="examHistory"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Exam Modal -->
  <div id="examModal" class="modal">
    <div class="modal-content">
      <button class="close-btn" onclick="closeExamModal()">×</button>
      <h2 id="examTitle"></h2>
      <div id="examContent"></div>
      <button class="btn" onclick="submitCurrentExam()" style="margin-top: 20px;">Submit Exam</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Results Modal -->
  <div id="resultsModal" class="modal">
    <div class="modal-content">
      <button class="close-btn" onclick="closeResultsModal()">×</button>
      <h2>Exam Results</h2>
      <div id="resultsContent"></div>
      <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="downloadResults()" style="margin-top: 20px;">Download Results</button>
      <button class="btn" onclick="viewReview()" style="margin-top: 10px;">View Detailed Review</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <script src="adaptive_learning.js"></script>
  <script src="medone_adaptive_integration.js"></script>
  <script src="taiwan_medical_exam_generator.js"></script>

  <script>
    /**
     * UI Controller for Taiwan Medical Exam Generator
     */

    let taiwanExamIntegration = null;
    let currentExamId = null;
    let currentExam = null;

    /**
     * Initialize the exam system
     */
    async function initializeExamSystem() {
      // Wait for MedOne app to be ready
      const checkMedOne = setInterval(() => {
        if (medoneApp && medoneApp.isReady()) {
          clearInterval(checkMedOne);

          // Initialize Taiwan exam integration
          taiwanExamIntegration = new TaiwanMedicalExamIntegration(medoneApp);
          taiwanExamIntegration.initialize().then(() => {
            console.log('Taiwan Medical Exam System Ready');
            updateDashboard();
            loadExamHistory();
            refreshAllExams();
          });
        }
      }, 500);
    }

    /**
     * Generate a new mock exam
     */
    function generateNewExam() {
      if (!taiwanExamIntegration) {
        alert('System not ready. Please wait...');
        return;
      }

      const exam = taiwanExamIntegration.generateNewMockExam();
      if (exam) {
        alert(`✓ ${exam.id} generated with ${exam.totalQuestions} questions`);
        refreshAllExams();
        updateDashboard();
      } else {
        alert('Failed to generate exam. Question pool may be exhausted.');
      }
    }

    /**
     * Start an exam
     */
    function startExam(examId) {
      currentExamId = examId;
      currentExam = taiwanExamIntegration.getExam(examId);

      if (!currentExam) {
        alert('Exam not found');
        return;
      }

      document.getElementById('examTitle').textContent = `${currentExam.id} - 200 Questions`;
      
      let html = '';
      currentExam.questions.forEach((question, index) => {
        html += `
          <div class="question">
            <div style="color: #999; font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: 10px;">
              Question ${question.index} of ${currentExam.totalQuestions} | ${question.subject}
            </div>
            <div class="question-text">${question.stem}</div>
            <div class="choices">
              ${question.choices.map((choice, choiceIndex) => `
                <div class="choice" onclick="selectAnswer(${index}, ${choiceIndex})">
                  <span style="margin-right: 10px; font-weight: bold;">
                    ${String.fromCharCode(65 + choiceIndex)}.
                  </span>
                  ${choice}
                </div>
              `).join('')}
            </div>
          </div>
        `;
      });

      document.getElementById('examContent').innerHTML = html;
      document.getElementById('examModal').classList.add('active');
    }

    /**
     * Select an answer
     */
    function selectAnswer(questionIndex, choiceIndex) {
      taiwanExamIntegration.examGenerator.saveAnswer(currentExamId, questionIndex, choiceIndex);
      
      // Update UI to show selection
      const choices = document.querySelectorAll('.question')[questionIndex].querySelectorAll('.choice');
      choices.forEach((choice, idx) => {
        choice.classList.remove('selected');
        if (idx === choiceIndex) {
          choice.classList.add('selected');
        }
      });
    }

    /**
     * Submit the current exam
     */
    function submitCurrentExam() {
      if (!currentExamId) return;

      if (!confirm('Submit exam? You cannot change answers after submission.')) {
        return;
      }

      const results = taiwanExamIntegration.submitExam(currentExamId);
      if (results) {
        displayResults(results);
        closeExamModal();
      }
    }

    /**
     * Display exam results
     */
    function displayResults(results) {
      let html = `
        <div style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 30px;">
          <div style="font-size: 48px; font-weight: bold; color: #667eea; margin-bottom: 10px;">
            ${results.overallScore}%
          </div>
          <div style="font-size: 18px; color: #666; margin-bottom: 5px;">
            ${results.totalCorrect} / ${results.totalAnswered} Correct
          </div>
          <div style="font-size: 16px; color: ${results.estimatedPass ? '#28a745' : '#dc3545'};">
            ${results.estimatedPass ? '✓ PASS' : '✗ FAIL'} (60% required)
          </div>
        </div>

        <h4 style="margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px;">Performance by Subject</h4>
        <table style="width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse;">
          ${Object.entries(results.bySubject).map(([subject, data]) => `
            <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; padding: 10px 0;">
              <td style="padding: 10px;">${subject}</td>
              <td style="padding: 10px; text-align: right;">
                ${data.accuracy}% (${data.correct}/${data.total})
              </td>
            </tr>
          `).join('')}
        </table>

        <h4 style="margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px;">Performance by Difficulty</h4>
        <table style="width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse;">
          ${Object.entries(results.byDifficulty).map(([difficulty, data]) => `
            <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; padding: 10px 0;">
              <td style="padding: 10px;">${difficulty}</td>
              <td style="padding: 10px; text-align: right;">
                ${data.accuracy}% (${data.correct}/${data.total})
              </td>
            </tr>
          `).join('')}
        </table>

        ${results.highYieldAccuracy.total > 0 ? `
          <h4 style="margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px;">High-Yield Questions</h4>
          <div style="padding: 10px; background: #f0f2f5; border-radius: 8px;">
            ${results.highYieldAccuracy.accuracy}% 
            (${results.highYieldAccuracy.correct}/${results.highYieldAccuracy.total})
          </div>
        ` : ''}
      `;

      document.getElementById('resultsContent').innerHTML = html;
      document.getElementById('resultsModal').classList.add('active');
    }

    /**
     * Update dashboard statistics
     */
    function updateDashboard() {
      const stats = taiwanExamIntegration.getStatistics();
      
      document.getElementById('examsGenerated').textContent = stats.totalGenerated;
      document.getElementById('examsCompleted').textContent = stats.totalCompleted;
      document.getElementById('averageScore').textContent = stats.averageScore + '%';

      const history = taiwanExamIntegration.getExamHistory(999);
      const completed = history.filter(e => e.status === 'completed');
      const scores = completed.map(e => e.results?.overallScore || 0);
      const highest = scores.length > 0 ? Math.max(...scores) : 0;

      document.getElementById('highestScore').textContent = highest + '%';
    }

    /**
     * Load and display exam history
     */
    function loadExamHistory() {
      const history = taiwanExamIntegration.getExamHistory(10);
      
      let html = '<table style="width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse;">';
      html += '<tr style="border-bottom: 2px solid #ddd;"><th style="text-align: left; padding: 10px;">Exam</th><th style="text-align: right; padding: 10px;">Score</th><th style="text-align: right; padding: 10px;">Date</th></tr>';

      history.forEach(exam => {
        const score = exam.results?.overallScore || '-';
        const date = new Date(exam.createdAt).toLocaleDateString();
        
        html += `
          <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;">
            <td style="padding: 10px; cursor: pointer; color: #667eea;" onclick="startExam('${exam.id}')">${exam.id}</td>
            <td style="padding: 10px; text-align: right; font-weight: bold;">${score}%</td>
            <td style="padding: 10px; text-align: right; color: #999;">${date}</td>
          </tr>
        `;
      });

      html += '</table>';
      document.getElementById('examHistory').innerHTML = html;
    }

    /**
     * Refresh all exams display
     */
    function refreshAllExams() {
      const history = taiwanExamIntegration.getExamHistory(50);
      
      let html = '';
      history.slice(0, 12).forEach(exam => {
        const statusColor = exam.status === 'completed' ? '#28a745' : exam.status === 'in-progress' ? '#ffc107' : '#999';
        const score = exam.results?.overallScore || '-';

        html += `
          <div class="exam-card">
            <div class="exam-card-header">${exam.id}</div>
            <div class="exam-card-body">
              <div class="exam-stat">
                <span class="stat-label">Status</span>
                <span class="stat-value" style="color: ${statusColor}; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 12px;">
                  ${exam.status}
                </span>
              </div>
              <div class="exam-stat">
                <span class="stat-label">Score</span>
                <span class="stat-value">${score}%</span>
              </div>
              <div class="exam-stat">
                <span class="stat-label">Questions</span>
                <span class="stat-value">${exam.totalQuestions}</span>
              </div>
              <div class="exam-stat" style="border: none;">
                <span class="stat-label">Created</span>
                <span class="stat-value">${new Date(exam.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}</span>
              </div>
              <button class="btn" onclick="startExam('${exam.id}')">
                ${exam.status === 'completed' ? 'Review' : 'Start'}
              </button>
              <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="viewExamReview('${exam.id}')">Details</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        `;
      });

      document.getElementById('examGrid').innerHTML = html;
    }

    /**
     * View detailed exam review
     */
    function viewExamReview(examId) {
      const review = taiwanExamIntegration.getExamReview(examId);
      if (!review) {
        alert('Review not available for this exam');
        return;
      }

      let html = `
        <h3>${review.exam.id} - Detailed Review</h3>
        <div style="margin-top: 20px;">
          <h4>Summary</h4>
          <p>Overall Score: <strong>${review.results.overallScore}%</strong></p>
          <p>Correct: <strong>${review.results.totalCorrect}</strong> / ${review.results.totalAnswered} answered</p>
          <p>Unanswered: <strong>${review.results.totalUnanswered}</strong></p>
        </div>

        ${review.weakAreas.length > 0 ? `
          <h4 style="margin-top: 20px;">Weak Areas (Need Focus)</h4>
          <ul style="margin-left: 20px;">
            ${review.weakAreas.map(area => `
              <li>${area.subject}: ${area.accuracy}% (${area.correct}/${area.total})</li>
            `).join('')}
          </ul>
        ` : ''}

        ${review.recommendations.length > 0 ? `
          <h4 style="margin-top: 20px;">Recommendations</h4>
          <ul style="margin-left: 20px;">
            ${review.recommendations.slice(0, 3).map(rec => `
              <li><strong>${rec.subject}</strong>: ${rec.suggestedAction}</li>
            `).join('')}
          </ul>
        ` : ''}
      `;

      document.getElementById('resultsContent').innerHTML = html;
      document.getElementById('resultsModal').classList.add('active');
    }

    /**
     * Close exam modal
     */
    function closeExamModal() {
      document.getElementById('examModal').classList.remove('active');
      currentExamId = null;
      currentExam = null;
    }

    /**
     * Close results modal
     */
    function closeResultsModal() {
      document.getElementById('resultsModal').classList.remove('active');
    }

    /**
     * Download exam results as JSON
     */
    function downloadResults() {
      if (!currentExamId) return;

      const exam = taiwanExamIntegration.getExam(currentExamId);
      if (exam && exam.results) {
        const json = JSON.stringify(exam.results, null, 2);
        const blob = new Blob([json], { type: 'application/json' });
        const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
        const link = document.createElement('a');
        link.href = url;
        link.download = `${currentExamId}_results.json`;
        document.body.appendChild(link);
        link.click();
        document.body.removeChild(link);
        URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
      }
    }

    /**
     * View detailed review
     */
    function viewReview() {
      if (currentExamId) {
        viewExamReview(currentExamId);
      }
    }

    // Initialize when document is ready
    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
      document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initializeExamSystem);
    } else {
      initializeExamSystem();
    }
  </script>
</body>
</html>/**
 * MedOne AI - Intelligent Question Generator
 * Generates 5-10 unique question variations from knowledge nodes
 * Transforms 2,000 nodes into 20,000+ questions
 * 
 * Question Types Generated:
 * 1. Clinical Scenario - Real-world case presentation
 * 2. Basic Recall - Direct factual recall
 * 3. Concept Comparison - Compare/contrast concepts
 * 4. Mechanism - How/why something works
 * 5. Image Question - Image-based with pathology/anatomy
 * 6. Negative Question - EXCEPT/LEAST LIKELY question
 * 7. Most Likely Diagnosis - Clinical diagnosis question
 * 8. Most Appropriate Treatment - Treatment selection
 * 9. Most Likely Nerve - Nerve involvement question
 * 10. Most Likely Enzyme - Biochemical pathway question
 * 11. Most Likely Receptor - Pharmacology/mechanism question
 */

/**
 * KnowledgeNode
 * Represents a medical knowledge concept that can generate multiple questions
 */
class KnowledgeNode {
  constructor(data) {
    this.id = data.id || `node_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
    this.subject = data.subject; // Anatomy, Physiology, Biochemistry, etc.
    this.chapter = data.chapter;
    this.topic = data.topic;
    this.concept = data.concept; // Core concept name
    this.definition = data.definition;
    this.characteristics = data.characteristics || []; // Key features
    this.clinicalRelevance = data.clinicalRelevance || []; // Clinical uses
    this.relatedConcepts = data.relatedConcepts || []; // Differential diagnoses, comparisons
    this.mechanisms = data.mechanisms || []; // How it works
    this.nerves = data.nerves || []; // Involved nerves
    this.enzymes = data.enzymes || []; // Involved enzymes
    this.receptors = data.receptors || []; // Involved receptors
    this.treatments = data.treatments || []; // Management options
    this.imageUrl = data.imageUrl || null;
    this.highYield = data.highYield !== false; // Default true
    this.difficulty = data.difficulty || 'Medium';
    this.negativeFeatures = data.negativeFeatures || []; // Features NOT present
    this.epidemiology = data.epidemiology || {}; // Age, gender, prevalence
    this.pathophysiology = data.pathophysiology || {}; // Mechanism of disease
  }

  /**
   * Validate node has minimum required data
   * @returns {boolean}
   */
  isValid() {
    return this.subject && this.concept && this.definition;
  }
}

/**
 * QuestionVariationGenerator
 * Generates question variations from a knowledge node
 */
class QuestionVariationGenerator {
  constructor() {
    this.questionId = 0;
    this.templates = this.initializeTemplates();
  }

  /**
   * Initialize question templates for each question type
   * @returns {Object}
   * @private
   */
  initializeTemplates() {
    return {
      clinicalScenario: {
        name: 'Clinical Scenario',
        type: 'multiple_choice',
        templates: [
          'A {age}-year-old {gender} presents with {symptoms}. Examination reveals {findings}. Which of the following is the most likely diagnosis?',
          'A patient with a history of {history} develops {symptoms}. Laboratory tests show {labs}. What is the underlying pathophysiology?',
          'A {age}-year-old is admitted with {presentation}. Risk factors include {riskFactors}. What is the most likely cause?'
        ]
      },
      basicRecall: {
        name: 'Basic Recall',
        type: 'multiple_choice',
        templates: [
          'Which of the following best describes {concept}?',
          '{concept} is characterized by:',
          'What is the definition of {concept}?',
          'Which statement about {concept} is correct?'
        ]
      },
      conceptComparison: {
        name: 'Concept Comparison',
        type: 'multiple_choice',
        templates: [
          'Which of the following distinguishes {concept} from {relatedConcept}?',
          'Compared to {relatedConcept}, {concept} is characterized by:',
          'How does {concept} differ from {relatedConcept}?'
        ]
      },
      mechanism: {
        name: 'Mechanism',
        type: 'multiple_choice',
        templates: [
          'The mechanism by which {concept} produces its effect involves:',
          'Which of the following best explains how {concept} works?',
          'The pathophysiological mechanism of {concept} includes:'
        ]
      },
      imageQuestion: {
        name: 'Image Question',
        type: 'image_multiple_choice',
        templates: [
          'This image shows findings consistent with {concept}. Which of the following is the next appropriate step?',
          'This histological appearance is most consistent with {concept}. What is the underlying cause?',
          'This imaging finding is characteristic of {concept}. What is the most likely {feature}?'
        ]
      },
      negativeQuestion: {
        name: 'Negative Question',
        type: 'multiple_choice',
        templates: [
          'A patient with {concept} would be LEAST likely to have:',
          'All of the following are features of {concept} EXCEPT:',
          'Which finding is NOT consistent with {concept}?',
          'Which of the following would NOT be expected in {concept}?'
        ]
      },
      mostLikelyDiagnosis: {
        name: 'Most Likely Diagnosis',
        type: 'multiple_choice',
        templates: [
          'Based on the clinical presentation of {symptoms} and {findings}, the most likely diagnosis is:',
          'A {age}-year-old {gender} with {epidemiology} presents with {clinicalFeatures}. The most likely diagnosis is:',
          'Given the laboratory abnormalities of {labs} in a patient with {symptoms}, what is the most likely diagnosis?'
        ]
      },
      mostAppropiateTreatment: {
        name: 'Most Appropriate Treatment',
        type: 'multiple_choice',
        templates: [
          'A patient diagnosed with {concept} should be treated with:',
          'First-line management of {concept} includes:',
          'What is the most appropriate treatment for a patient with {concept}?',
          'In a {age}-year-old with {concept}, the best initial treatment would be:'
        ]
      },
      mostLikelyNerve: {
        name: 'Most Likely Nerve',
        type: 'multiple_choice',
        templates: [
          'Damage to which nerve would result in {deficit}?',
          'A lesion affecting {anatomicalLocation} would most likely damage the {concept} nerve, resulting in:',
          'The {concept} nerve is responsible for {function}. Injury would cause:',
          'Which nerve dysfunction explains the findings of {findings}?'
        ]
      },
      mostLikelyEnzyme: {
        name: 'Most Likely Enzyme',
        type: 'multiple_choice',
        templates: [
          'A deficiency of {concept} enzyme would result in:',
          'Inhibition of {concept} would lead to:',
          'In the {pathway} pathway, the rate-limiting enzyme is {concept}, which:',
          'Decreased activity of {concept} enzyme causes accumulation of:'
        ]
      },
      mostLikelyReceptor: {
        name: 'Most Likely Receptor',
        type: 'multiple_choice',
        templates: [
          'The primary mechanism of action of {drug} is through {concept} receptor, resulting in:',
          'Blockade of {concept} receptors would cause:',
          '{concept} receptor activation leads to:',
          'Which receptor antagonist would be most appropriate for treating {condition}?'
        ]
      }
    };
  }

  /**
   * Generate all question variations from a knowledge node
   * @param {KnowledgeNode} node
   * @returns {Array} Array of question objects
   */
  generateAllVariations(node) {
    if (!node.isValid()) {
      console.error('Invalid knowledge node:', node);
      return [];
    }

    const questions = [];

    // Generate each question type if applicable
    if (node.clinicalRelevance.length > 0) {
      questions.push(...this.generateClinicalScenario(node));
    }

    questions.push(...this.generateBasicRecall(node));

    if (node.relatedConcepts.length > 0) {
      questions.push(...this.generateConceptComparison(node));
    }

    if (node.mechanisms.length > 0) {
      questions.push(...this.generateMechanism(node));
    }

    if (node.imageUrl) {
      questions.push(...this.generateImageQuestion(node));
    }

    if (node.negativeFeatures.length > 0) {
      questions.push(...this.generateNegativeQuestion(node));
    }

    if (node.clinicalRelevance.length > 0) {
      questions.push(...this.generateMostLikelyDiagnosis(node));
    }

    if (node.treatments.length > 0) {
      questions.push(...this.generateMostAppropiateTreatment(node));
    }

    if (node.nerves && node.nerves.length > 0) {
      questions.push(...this.generateMostLikelyNerve(node));
    }

    if (node.enzymes && node.enzymes.length > 0) {
      questions.push(...this.generateMostLikelyEnzyme(node));
    }

    if (node.receptors && node.receptors.length > 0) {
      questions.push(...this.generateMostLikelyReceptor(node));
    }

    return questions;
  }

  /**
   * Generate Clinical Scenario questions
   * @param {KnowledgeNode} node
   * @returns {Array}
   * @private
   */
  generateClinicalScenario(node) {
    const questions = [];
    const ageGroups = ['newborn', '5-year-old', 'adolescent', 'young adult', '45-year-old', 'elderly'];
    const genders = ['male', 'female'];
    const symptoms = node.clinicalRelevance.slice(0, 3);
    const template = this.templates.clinicalScenario.templates[0];

    for (let i = 0; i < 2; i++) {
      const age = this.randomSelect(ageGroups);
      const gender = this.randomSelect(genders);
      const symptom = this.randomSelect(symptoms);

      const stem = template
        .replace('{age}', age)
        .replace('{gender}', gender)
        .replace('{symptoms}', symptom)
        .replace('{findings}', this.randomSelect(node.characteristics));

      const correctAnswer = node.concept;
      const distractors = this.generateDistractors(node.relatedConcepts, 3);

      questions.push(this.createQuestion(
        `Clinical Scenario - ${node.concept}`,
        stem,
        [correctAnswer, ...distractors],
        0,
        node
      ));
    }

    return questions;
  }

  /**
   * Generate Basic Recall questions
   * @param {KnowledgeNode} node
   * @returns {Array}
   * @private
   */
  generateBasicRecall(node) {
    const questions = [];
    const template = this.templates.basicRecall.templates[0];

    const stem = template.replace('{concept}', node.concept);
    const correctAnswer = node.definition;
    const distractors = this.generateDefinitionDistractors(node.concept, node.topic, 3);

    questions.push(this.createQuestion(
      'Basic Recall',
      stem,
      [correctAnswer, ...distractors],
      0,
      node
    ));

    // Add characteristic-based recall
    if (node.characteristics.length > 0) {
      const char = this.randomSelect(node.characteristics);
      const stem2 = `${node.concept} is characterized by which of the following?`;
      const distractors2 = this.generateDistractors(node.characteristics.slice(1), 3);

      questions.push(this.createQuestion(
        'Basic Recall - Characteristics',
        stem2,
        [char, ...distractors2],
        0,
        node
      ));
    }

    return questions;
  }

  /**
   * Generate Concept Comparison questions
   * @param {KnowledgeNode} node
   * @returns {Array}
   * @private
   */
  generateConceptComparison(node) {
    const questions = [];
    const relatedConcept = this.randomSelect(node.relatedConcepts);
    const template = this.templates.conceptComparison.templates[0];

    const stem = template
      .replace('{concept}', node.concept)
      .replace('{relatedConcept}', relatedConcept);

    const distinction = `${node.concept} differs by having ${this.randomSelect(node.characteristics)}`;
    const distractors = [
      `Both are identical in presentation`,
      `${relatedConcept} shows ${this.randomSelect(node.characteristics)}`,
      `The conditions are indistinguishable clinically`
    ];

    questions.push(this.createQuestion(
      'Concept Comparison',
      stem,
      [distinction, ...distractors],
      0,
      node
    ));

    return questions;
  }

  /**
   * Generate Mechanism questions
   * @param {KnowledgeNode} node
   * @returns {Array}
   * @private
   */
  generateMechanism(node) {
    const questions = [];
    const mechanism = this.randomSelect(node.mechanisms);
    const template = this.templates.mechanism.templates[0];

    const stem = template.replace('{concept}', node.concept);
    const distractors = this.generateDistractors(node.relatedConcepts, 3);

    questions.push(this.createQuestion(
      'Mechanism',
      stem,
      [mechanism, ...distractors],
      0,
      node
    ));

    return questions;
  }

  /**
   * Generate Image-based questions
   * @param {KnowledgeNode} node
   * @returns {Array}
   * @private
   */
  generateImageQuestion(node) {
    const questions = [];
    const template = this.templates.imageQuestion.templates[0];

    const stem = template
      .replace('{concept}', node.concept)
      .replace('{feature}', 'diagnosis');

    const correctAnswer = node.concept;
    const distractors = this.generateDistractors(node.relatedConcepts, 3);

    const question = this.createQuestion(
      'Image Question',
      stem,
      [correctAnswer, ...distractors],
      0,
      node
    );

    question.imageUrl = node.imageUrl;
    question.type = 'image_multiple_choice';

    questions.push(question);

    return questions;
  }

  /**
   * Generate Negative (EXCEPT/LEAST LIKELY) questions
   * @param {KnowledgeNode} node
   * @returns {Array}
   * @private
   */
  generateNegativeQuestion(node) {
    const questions = [];
    const template = this.templates.negativeQuestion.templates[0];

    const stem = template.replace('{concept}', node.concept);

    // Correct answer is the LEAST likely (from negativeFeatures)
    const correctAnswer = this.randomSelect(node.negativeFeatures);
    // Distractors are actual features
    const distractors = node.characteristics.slice(0, 3);

    questions.push(this.createQuestion(
      'Negative Question',
      stem,
      [...distractors, correctAnswer],
      3, // Correct answer is at index 3
      node,
      true // Mark as negative question
    ));

    return questions;
  }

  /**
   * Generate Most Likely Diagnosis questions
   * @param {KnowledgeNode} node
   * @returns {Array}
   * @private
   */
  generateMostLikelyDiagnosis(node) {
    const questions = [];
    const template = this.templates.mostLikelyDiagnosis.templates[0];

    const clinicalFeature = this.randomSelect(node.clinicalRelevance);
    const finding = this.randomSelect(node.characteristics);

    const stem = template
      .replace('{symptoms}', clinicalFeature)
      .replace('{findings}', finding);

    const correctAnswer = node.concept;
    const distractors = this.generateDistractors(node.relatedConcepts, 3);

    questions.push(this.createQuestion(
      'Most Likely Diagnosis',
      stem,
      [correctAnswer, ...distractors],
      0,
      node
    ));

    return questions;
  }

  /**
   * Generate Most Appropriate Treatment questions
   * @param {KnowledgeNode} node
   * @returns {Array}
   * @private
   */
  generateMostAppropiateTreatment(node) {
    const questions = [];
    const template = this.templates.mostAppropiateTreatment.templates[0];

    const treatment = this.randomSelect(node.treatments);
    const stem = template.replace('{concept}', node.concept);

    const distractors = this.generateDistractors(node.treatments.slice(1), 3);

    questions.push(this.createQuestion(
